hash_63cefb15aaf67: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, grand. We are well and truly buggered.
hash_a0f475d6ba600: ^1Scarlett: ^7You do have your moments, senor. This was one of them.
hash_a12475d6bab19: ^1Bruno: ^7I am not too proud to thank you. Keep this up and I may even call you friend.
hash_a14475d6bae7f: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, that was a sobering experience. Which means it's time for more 'special vitamins'...
hash_c1b3de7a21df8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Reckon it's time to get another damn shield.
hash_c1c3de7a21fab: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My shield is dead. Long live my next fucking shield!
hash_f39885a31acb7: ^1Godfrey: ^7And the meek shall inherit the earth. It's scorched earth, but I'll take it.
hash_f3a885a31ae6a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I don't believe in magic, but that's the best word for this gun.
hash_f3b885a31b01d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This thing is so overwrought -- like butter upon bacon. Not that I'm complaining...
hash_164e4116cfce5c: ^1Ghost: ^7Standards have slipped around here, Godfrey. Escort me at once!
hash_2333c767cdd329: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Admit it: you had that coming.
hash_23f77b0e7c55b9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Is this it? At last, eternal slumber?
hash_29af1be0c43418: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not that I'm keeping count, Bruno - but that was a LOT of ass kicking in a very short time!
hash_29b11be0c4377e: ^1Diego: ^7See what happens when you loosen up, Bruno? You have fun!
hash_29b41be0c43c97: ^1Shaw: ^7Easy Bruno - You're starting to get a bit 'indiscriminate'... It scares me.
hash_3c6ac62c2e19df: ^1Ghost: ^7This may be the last time we speak, cowboy, but I have a parting gift. Several in fact.
hash_53ece912992874: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I'm loathe to admit it, but that was rather satisfying!
hash_53eee912992bda: ^1Godfrey: ^7For the last time: No! Animals! In the house!
hash_62663921bbfe43: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7So you knew I was a phony psychic, even before the walking corpses showed up?
hash_945977614a3de0: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7And now for my next trick...
hash_99c54f5bb29eb0: ^1Bruno: ^7Minus one arm, the monstre just seems a bit... ridiculous, non?
hash_99c64f5bb2a063: ^1Diego: ^7I want you dead, bestia! Not falling apart!
hash_99c84f5bb2a3c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's one less arm to whack me with.
hash_99cb4f5bb2a8e2: ^1Shaw: ^7Even wit no arms, these worm-brains are relentless!
hash_9c40423b077b40: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Sorry, but I tend to hold a grudge.
hash_ae5ac6653aa098: ^1Shaw: ^7No more mafficking about for you, you pus-filled, four-legged monster!

hash_c3babb8a316a8a: ^1Diego: ^7You could at least buy me dinner first!
hash_e760796bc87a48: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That little monster's a killin' machine!
hash_eb408dee2a25fa: ^1Shaw: ^7Statistically speaking, we were bound to do something right eventually.
hash_efc9cf90d1b50b: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to shred some shamblers.    Or blast them. That works, too.
hash_efcccf90d1ba24: ^1Scarlett: ^7C'mon, girls, let's cut 'em down and blow 'em up.
hash_efcecf90d1bd8a: ^1Diego: ^7The question is not which will I use. It is which I will use first.
hash_efcfcf90d1bf3d: ^1Bruno: ^7Such beautiful craftsmanship. Such power. Such a bloody mess.
hash_10193565d989b50: ^1Bruno: ^7I think my stomach just turned inside out.
hash_10194565d989d03: ^1Diego: ^7I only put my trust in this, because it has worked before.     I hope I am not mistaken.
hash_10199565d98a582: ^1Shaw: ^7ZZZZZ! Fuck me! That's left my synapses twitching like a bastard!
hash_1164b10b145780a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Get out of there, Gideon. Yyou may be cute, but not cute enough to eat!
hash_11f8bca875fd3f8: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wanna set all the bone-brains on fire? Be my guest.
hash_11f8dca875fd75e: ^1Diego: ^7Burn, bestias. Truly - It is all you deserve.
hash_11f8eca875fd911: ^1Bruno: ^7They all just caught fire! Bravo! I am... entertained. Eh?
hash_11f90ca875fdc77: ^1Shaw: ^7Hang on a minute! How on earth did that cataclysmic explosion suddenly manifest out of nowhere?!
hash_15fbb5621d4b491: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I'll be back once I scrape up some cash.
hash_18329908b8a3650: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I think we're about to see a Butler get well and truly buttled.
hash_1832a908b8a3803: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Get clear, Godfrey! They're not coming to you for afternoon tea!
hash_185b25774ef6bec: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I have a bloody big hammer, and I am all out of nails. Any volunteers?
hash_185b45774ef6f52: ^1Godfrey: ^7Time to put the "mean" in menial labor...
hash_1874d02ed4a06ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't I warn you before? Too late now!
hash_18e24e7c2503030: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Pardon. Didn't mean to cut you off there.
hash_191218a2d2f136e: ^1Narrator: ^7Aiming down your sights significantly improves accuracy.
hash_195092b28e6513a: ^1Godfrey: ^7What do you mean? I've done nothing wrong. I've tried to be a good man.
hash_1acc7f372c824ba: ^1Shaw: ^7You can run right off, you stabby-legged minge-bag!
hash_1c444bf35720cd2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Is it a whip? Is it a sword? Never mind -- not your problem anymore.
hash_1dbb742542bc9f6: ^1Shaw: ^7Hmmm... This really feels like Cambodia all over again. But with a lot more water.
hash_1dbb942542bcd5c: ^1Bruno: ^7If you are the company you keep, then I must have died a long time ago.
hash_1dbba42542bcf0f: ^1Diego: ^7You all wish to face me? I can only assume you are unaware of my talents!
hash_1dbbc42542bd275: ^1Scarlett: ^7You think strength in numbers gives you an advantage? It doesn't.
hash_1ff17a026e1e65b: ^1Diego: ^7I have seen what mechanized weaponry can do - Many of my brothers fell before their unimaginable firepower.
hash_1ff19a026e1e9c1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oughtta be enough wipe the brain-deads clean off this deck.
hash_1ff1ca026e1eeda: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, this IS disproportionately out of proportion.

hash_2212ea980fd2553: HÝ\v–†®nŗüŔg∂qą≤q√ĖŪęžls, let's see what you got.
hash_2212fa980fd2706: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, if I cannot escape violence, at least I deliver it with style.
hash_22130a980fd28b9: ^1Diego: ^7Ahhh si. The three of us were made for each other, weren't we?
hash_22131a980fd2a6c: ^1Shaw: ^7Let's conduct a little experiment, shall we? Who gets the higher body count?
hash_237e64f38cd4389: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7No! Not like this! Anything but this!

hash_273b9c65313ffb3: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Tell 'em your dance card's full, Briggy-boy!
hash_274431a89a1ad73: ^1Godfrey: ^7By whatever means necessary, I shall stand my ground. I shall not succumb to evil.
hash_274441a89a1af26: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7When it comes to "pick-me-ups," my tastes barely extend further a cup of hot, black coffee.
hash_274451a89a1b0d9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I am...refreshed and ready for battle. Bring me my horses! No...wait. We don't need horses.
hash_278261afa1b91d8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'd always feel better when I'm packing a bit more stopping power.
hash_278281afa1b953e: ^1Diego: ^7In days gone by, our disputes were resolved in an duel. It was a simpler time.
hash_278291afa1b96f1: ^1Bruno: ^7Do you know what makes this weapon so beautiful?  At least one bullet is guaranteed to hit something.
hash_2782b1afa1b9a57: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh my. This weapon is... rather large, isn't it?

hash_2898cc2827e20bb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Apologies for not coming sooner. It's been that kind of night.
hash_2898dc2827e226e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You're a tough ol' bird, I'll give ya that. Now go get some payback.
hash_2e4dec3fcd1d58f: ^1Godfrey: ^7People were never meant to move that fast. The human heart explodes at one hundred miles per hour.
hash_2e4dfc3fcd1d742: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Wonder if one of these leads out of this nightmare.
hash_2e4e0c3fcd1d8f5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Thought I was dead there for a second! Ghostly tunnel...otherworldly light... But this sure as shit isn't Heaven.
hash_2ebdc4374618df0: ^1Bruno: ^7A good defense can be key to victory.
hash_2ebdd4374618fa3: ^1Diego: ^7I think this came together quite beautifully.
hash_2ebdf4374619309: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay... Let's take some of the heat of my back.
hash_2ebe24374619822: ^1Shaw: ^7Another multi-purposeful invention from Scarlett. She is very good at this kind of thing.
hash_2efda1b16039820: ^1Shaw: ^7It's making me nervous just watching you Bruno - You look absolutely fucked.
hash_2efdf1b1603a09f: ^1Scarlett: ^7You can handle them, Bruno. You're a big boy now, aren't you?
hash_2efe11b1603a405: ^1Diego: ^7I could help the Frenchman... but where would I find entertainment?
hash_2f1a16c785c1bfb: ^1Shaw: ^7Have I told them about the side effects? I'm sure I did.     Definitely.     I distinctly remember saying - 'YOU DO KNOW THERE ARE SIDE EFFECTS?'
hash_2f1a46c785c2114: ^1Scarlett: ^7I really wish my Father had been a bit more specific in his letter... Especially the stuff about what 'I did'.
hash_2f1a66c785c247a: ^1Diego: ^7In the brief time I knew her, I can honestly say that Lady McKendrick was the most... 'Scottish'... women I have ever known.
hash_2f1a76c785c262d: ^1Bruno: ^7Time moves faster as you get older - It feels only weeks since Alistair saved my life...
hash_2fe4e9f2598cbc8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Life and death. Healing and killing. All in one tidy package.
hash_2fe4f9f2598cd7b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Let's see what I can do with this here red-hot poker.
hash_2fe509f2598cf2e: ^1Godfrey: ^7If no one objects, I'll just be spraying fire to and fro...
hash_3143214a6396fee: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey! You're scratchin' up my buckskins!
hash_31cadd683b794bb: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm guessing you creeps aren't looking to talk this through?
hash_31caed683b7966e: ^1Bruno: ^7I may be outnumbered, but I am not outgunned.
hash_31cafd683b79821: ^1Diego: ^7Do not worry, bestias - There is more than enough Diego to go around.
hash_31cb0d683b799d4: ^1Shaw: ^7Trying to get rid of you is like trying to get rid of a bad smell.     It takes time. And bleach.
hash_328cc2375a1b4fc: ^1Shaw: ^7You're a human mincer, Diego!    That sounded better in my head.
hash_3330633f96bbec9: ^1Shaw: ^7This one's racked with lightning. I'm sensing an elemental theme emerging...
hash_3330733f96bc07c: ^1Diego: ^7An electric chupacarne? I would say I am shocked...but I leave the bad jokes to Shaw.
hash_3330833f96bc22f: ^1Bruno: ^7This electric one looks like I felt with my first hangover.     Absinthe is a hell of a drink.
hash_3330933f96bc3e2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, so they're electric now?! Someone's stacking the deck against us.
hash_33718b30fbea646: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Facing a bit a of a headwind, aren't you?
hash_341f7e02ed2d6a8: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I've heard old soldiers never die. Now I see how come.
hash_34675428c723fd3: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7They all want a piece of me. You'd think I'd be used to it by now.
hash_349b5ebbffdb5bc: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Feeling pretty good about this one. Or less confused, in any case.
hash_3643b235569acbb: ^1Shaw: ^7He's almost pocket sized! Not that I'd want him anywhere near my... bits and pieces.
hash_36440235569b53a: ^1Diego: ^7It has so much anger. Like the Frenchman, but tiny.
hash_36441235569b6ed: ^1Bruno: ^7I think there is 'a curse' involved here somewhere...
hash_368a2dae5c19ce6: ^1Shaw: ^7You've got to be aware of your surroundings Scarlett! I kept bumping into my desk until I finally remembered where it was.
hash_368a4dae5c1a04c: ^1Bruno: ^7Are ALL members of the Rhodes Family destined to find such trouble?
hash_368a5dae5c1a1ff: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett is surrounded. I should probably save her. It could make for an entertaining story.
hash_36e14a0f65d7cc1: ^1Scarlett: ^7We need to stay level-headed. If we just keep calm we'll get through this.
hash_3731cb5aaafb1eb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Ta, sir. Let's not have to do that again, yes?
hash_3731db5aaafb39e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Okay, Brigadier - how about we keep score? Who saves who the most?
hash_376c55dd632b5fe: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in chance. This trinket was meant for me to find.
hash_376c65dd632b7b1: ^1Diego: ^7Perhaps this will prove useful. Perhaps it will ruin my pants.
hash_376c75dd632b964: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, yes! Of course! I need this. For later. I think.
hash_38683662e2d652c: |ųž)ņeĖa°ŃHsrāŅĻĄn Oeciate it, old man, but let's not make this a habit.
hash_38686662e2d6a45: ^1Godfrey: ^7You're not the old stuffed shirt I thought you were. I know that now.
hash_392b23b2561e2af: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, it's not exactly Saville Row, but it will have to do.
hash_392b33b2561e462: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well, this sure beats standin' with my back to the wall.
hash_392b43b2561e615: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Old Ironbutt, they called me. Never more true than now.
hash_39423ac6dc8cea8: ^1Diego: ^7All things considered, Shaw's doing pretty good.     Especially if you ignore some of his weaknesses.
hash_39424ac6dc8d05b: ^1Bruno: ^7Shaw! Are you sure you don't need to take a moment to get your breath back?
hash_39425ac6dc8d20e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw really seems to be enjoying himself!     It'll be the rush of endorphins triggered by his fear of imminent death.
hash_39a482afe83b055: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Come on, we've got work to do.
hash_39e36319f6ad5e1: ^1Shaw: ^7Slow down a little Bruno - We Don't want to flood the decks with blood, do we?
hash_39e37319f6ad794: ^1Diego: ^7You can stop hitting them now, Bruno... I'm pretty sure they are dead.
hash_39e39319f6adafa: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey Bruno? Did you do this kind of thing when you hung out with my father?!
hash_3a818a7addb5ea8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I see a Butler with a mean streak.
hash_3a819a7addb605b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well done, Godfrey. Don't stop now.

hash_3f244f932fc7398: “ć;āę®^ ^7I wear my heart on my sleeve - can you see it beating with excitement and joy?
hash_3f245f932fc754b: ^1Bruno: ^7Never did I think I would live to see such lightweight alternative to the Gatling gun.
hash_3f24bf932fc7f7d: ^1Shaw: ^7Last time I held a gun like this, I accidentally shot a Prussian Musketeer right in the goolies.     His wife was very upset.
hash_3f5f789406431f9: ^1Diego: ^7You'll need more fire than that to take down Diego Necalli.
hash_3f5f889406433ac: ^1Shaw: ^7I say, is that an intentional chemical reaction? Or just zombie heartburn?
hash_3fcd13b11675a02: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Dab your eyes, Godfrey!  Keep moving man!
hash_4048596e701330b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Don't mind me - just blowing off steam...
hash_40e48632ede0904: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Normally, that would be cute. But not tonight.
hash_414ade3a2bd546e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Not exactly ladylike, but then neither am I.
hash_43a0acd8db167e3: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Be a shame to leave this lying around.
hash_45c6d6568492c64: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7A girl can't have enough of these.

hash_4d2e4c6931f7ccf: ^1Godfrey: ^7Don't know how on earth I'll go back to Butlering after all this.
hash_4d2e5c6931f7e82: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Anyone keepin' score? Cuz I'm pretty sure I'm winnin' by a wide margin.
hash_4d2e6c6931f8035: ^1The Brigadier: ^7If this is to be my last night, the at least I go out in a blaze of glory!
hash_4db16a56a927498: ^1Diego: ^7Reminds me of the firebombs we used in the revolution. We called them 'Necalli cocktails,' heh.

hash_4fc303a94d15a87: ^1Bruno: ^7I nearly always kill without mercy.     Nearly.

hash_4fe2d5a980c26b6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Appreciate that Bruno, but I'm not sure I'm a great believer in either of those things.      Let's just do what we need to in order to survive.

hash_5a4c34e55c4215c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I say, have you noticed the ones with blue eyes? They appear to have been empowered by the water-ghouls!
hash_5a4c54e55c424c2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I see now. The blue ones avoid the front lines... because they're the medics!
hash_5a4c64e55c42675: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well, butter my butt and call it a biscuit! Those sneaky blue goons make the others stronger!
hash_5afc81ff9d4296b: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't understand - Is everything on sale because the ship is sinking?
hash_5afcb1ff9d42e84: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm coming for you bone-basket - and I want at least three spins!
hash_5afcd1ff9d431ea: ^1Diego: ^7This offer had better not be a 'poisoned chalice' la fantasma!
hash_5afce1ff9d4339d: ^1Bruno: ^7Be wary - There is a reason the meat from the butcher costs more than meat from the man in the alley.
hash_5afdfd8798058a0: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's a SURE-FIRE WAY to PISS ME OFF!
hash_5afe1d879805c06: ^1Diego: ^7¬°Mis ojos! ¬°Mis orejas! My fourth and fifth favorite senses!
hash_5afe2d879805db9: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde! Feels like lightning shot in my eyes and out my ears...!
hash_5d62dd937d3c874: ^1Scarlett: ^7Remember when you tried to build me a tree house, 'Uncle Stan'? Now we're even.
hash_5d62fd937d3cbda: ^1Diego: ^7In Mexico, when you save someone, you become your responsibility.    I kid. I kid! Don't look so panicked, amigo.
hash_5d630d937d3cd8d: ^1Bruno: ^7So. I owe my life to a... a... how you say? 'Degenerate'...?
hash_5d67b7ffbd768d6: ^1Bruno: ^7As only a fool would dare provoke me, you must be such a fool.
hash_5d67c7ffbd76a89: ^1Diego: ^7You thought you could kill me? How foolish.
hash_5d67d7ffbd76c3c: ^1Shaw: ^7An eye for an eye! Let's not bother with the part about teeth.
hash_5e18202d671e4e6: ^1Shaw: ^7Strewth! How much gunpowder in packed in this thing?!
hash_5e18502d671e9ff: ^1Diego: ^7You know you are my favorite, Dragon.
hash_5f202d8a0286539: ^1Ghost: ^7The press weren't kind to you, Brigadier. Ran you out of the Army over those Boer boys. I also got savaged in the papers. Only instead of medals on my chest, I got a rope around the neck.
hash_5f7c32e3b22821c: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, dear. No bullets. And I doubt very much I can charm my way out of here...
hash_6067eee1b51229b: ^1Bruno: ^7France's national hero was known as 'the Hammer.'     This has nothing to do with the situation at hand.
hash_615eefab4aba699: ^1Shaw: ^7I want off this ship. Is this going to help me achieve that goal?    Maybe. Maybe not.
hash_615effab4aba84c: ^1Diego: ^7Even a blind man - or a clumsy man -  could not fail to hit something with this.
hash_615f0fab4aba9ff: ^1Bruno: ^7It is only a matter of time before these become commonplace on the black market.
hash_615f1fab4ababb2: ^1Scarlett: ^7I could take this apart to see how it works. Don't know if I could put it back together, though...
hash_62fd8ed4481c1b4: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Blowing heads off shouldn't give me a thrill, but when you do it...
hash_67eb1a82b2f1aa8: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7Nobody deserves anything, Godfrey. You take what I give you, or you die.
hash_67f7ac7e2695a19: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Perfect for an intimate dinner with fifty of your closest friends.
hash_6ab13782d9ca1d9: ^1Shaw: ^7When did you leave all this lying around, Scarlett?
hash_6ab14782d9ca38c: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett seems very proud of this thing - I'll reserve judgment until I see it in action.
hash_6ab15782d9ca53f: ^1Bruno: ^7A piece of Mademoiselle's gear. Hopefully it lives up to the stories.
hash_6ab16782d9ca6f2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I was looking for. This could literally save my ass.
hash_6ad05c41f05526e: ^1Godfrey: ^7This is it, isn't it? This is how I die.
hash_6b826fdc7ed0b09: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well if it isn't Satan's footlocker. Better be more than pitchforks and underwear inside.
hash_6c9916c4ce53016: ^1Diego: ^7I dedicate that shot to my one truly love.
hash_6c9926c4ce531c9: ^1Bruno: ^7I could have tormented you further, monstre. But I chose not to.
hash_6c9946c4ce5352f: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm surprised my hands are that steady today. Normally, I can barely even hold a beaker without spilling something.

hash_6e82ec4037bcaf1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I feel...a bit..."different"...weird. Do I look different?
hash_6f243f514a63565: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oi! Get back in the fireplace, you.
hash_6f60a7945f86731: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Damn, Gideon. Save some for the rest of us.
hash_6ff66cde0746a88: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've heard the French lifestyle moves at a slower place, but would you hurry up and kill them already?!
hash_710caa8fa2f59a2: ^1Godfrey: ^7No, Madame. I confess I've never fired a shot in anger before tonight. Of course, if you care to teach me that cummerbund trick...
hash_71b3854220c8490: ^1Bruno: ^7I've known many arrogant men.    Ultimately, it was their undoing.
hash_71b3b54220c89a9: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the fuck happened to 'The Great Diego Necalli never makes mistakes'?
hash_71b3e54220c8ec2: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful, Diego - I think they're salivating even more than usual.
hash_73e6fa2620e3996: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't want to jinx it, but I think I'm getting good at the whole fighting for survival thing.
hash_73e71a2620e3cfc: ^1Bruno: ^7Of all the deaths caused by my hand - yours was most deserved!
hash_73e72a2620e3eaf: ^1Diego: ^7If you are surprised by this bloodshed, you have surely not
hash_73e74a2620e4215: ^1Scarlett: ^7You don't want to know how much worse I could hurt you.
hash_757570d83b6dde7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Just couldn't wait your turn, could you?
hash_75c982563114720: ^1Diego: ^7What sort payment do you need, inanimate object?
hash_75c9925631148d3: ^1Bruno: ^7No' is not a word that I respond to kindly.
hash_75c9a2563114a86: ^1Scarlett: ^7I know, I know, 'come back when you can cough up more cash.'     Assholes.
hash_75c9f2563115305: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't say I encountered this phenomenon in Cambodia. Though my pockets were just as empty then as they are now.

hash_76a5939d9150d3e: ^1Shaw: ^7HANG ON!??     Iceberg! - We just collided with a bloody great iceberg!
hash_76d65dfcb9d8c53: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Thanks for giving me a hand. You can take that hand off my ass now.
hash_776aaa3bfa95e56: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh. Nutty. I've only honestly forgotten some of the recipes.
hash_776aca3bfa961bc: ^1Bruno: ^7Mix that with a Merlot and you may have something more palatable.
hash_776ada3bfa9636f: ^1Diego: ^7Madero had a German Doctor who made concoctions like this. His tasted better.
hash_7891c293b2d6e2b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Nice one, Pops! Keep it up!
hash_792ceb5d5e39386: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I just had an out-of-body experience. Much better than an out -of-medication experience...
hash_792d1b5d5e3989f: ^1Diego: ^7I would hug you, senor Delacroix, but I have no wish to toy with your emotions.
hash_792d3b5d5e39c05: ^1Scarlett: ^7I let my guard down, big guy. I won't do it again.
hash_79743ea364ed3f8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I assume you already killed the ones who did this to you?
hash_79745ea364ed75e: ^1Diego: ^7I look forward to hearing about the giant who overpowered you.
hash_79748ea364edc77: ^1Shaw: ^7We all need a little helping hand now and again... I give myself one fairly regularly.
hash_7abd8f1c7645428: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7They're like a pack of hungry coyotes.
hash_7abd9f1c76455db: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Shoo! You're more persistent than the beggars of Bombay!
hash_7abdbf1c7645941: ^1Godfrey: ^7I might just be in over my head.
hash_7b0f621e22e376d: ^1Bruno: ^7So Monsieur Science. Do you have an explanation for the horrors unfolding around us?
hash_7cdb723dcc75e10: ^1Bruno: ^7I felt my body turn inside out...     Was everything outside put back in?!
hash_7cdb823dcc75fc3: ^1Diego: ^7Maldito sea! I just felt my organs outside my body.
hash_7cdba23dcc76329: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the hell happened? Am I still in one piece?
hash_7cdbd23dcc76842: ^1Shaw: ^7The artifact is capable of somehow inducing teleportation! Wonderful!
hash_7d2a1de05d214d8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Now I see how you got all them medals.
hash_7d2a4de05d219f1: ^1Godfrey: ^7If we all fight like him, maybe we stand a chance.
hash_7df82e8c326f0bc: ^1Godfrey: ^7"S.M.G." The shetland pony of assault weapons.
hash_7df84e8c326f422: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I'm feeling rather bricky with this in hand.
hash_7df85e8c326f5d5: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7It ain't the size of the gun in the fight, but the size of the fight in the gun.
hash_7e1cd3bfb166661: ^1Shaw: ^7It exploded! Shame, I was hoping to examine his remains.
hash_7e3f798489d4154: ^1Godfrey: ^7Much as it pains me to admit, Master Alistair would have very much wanted to see that.
hash_7e3f998489d44ba: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Electricity. It's all the rage these days.
hash_7e3fa98489d466d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hunh. Who says you can't catch lightnin' in a rotten bottle?
hash_7e627610fa998f4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Whatever the hell you are, you're gonna help clear out some ghouls, right?
hash_7e628610fa99aa7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Ugh. A face like a bulldog chewing a wasp.
hash_7e62a610fa99e0d: ^1Godfrey: ^7I think I've seen this thing in a dream before. A terrible, terrible dream...
hash_807678757f9bc10: ^1Scarlett: ^7A gun from a wall. That's...that's just...     Okay, Scarlett, don't over-think it, just take the damn gun.
hash_807698757f9bf76: ^1Diego: ^7This is bizarre. And I know bizarre  -- I have dated Americans.
hash_8076a8757f9c129: ^1Bruno: ^7This ship is cursed. And so am I.
hash_8076c8757f9c48f: ^1Shaw: ^7Either I've gone barmy, or this wall has. My money's on the wall.    Literally.
hash_80e157dab1e06e2: ^1Diego: ^7The range on this thing is awe-inspiring.
hash_80e167dab1e0895: ^1Bruno: ^7Express train to Hell! Let me punch your ticket!

hash_833be445dcf9d9e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, this is the dog's bollocks! My own little bubble of death!
hash_8395d1d23a20b10: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is no mere pistol. It's a bloody artillery piece!
hash_8395e1d23a20cc3: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7The Dragon has spoken. P.S.: You're dead.
hash_8395f1d23a20e76: ^1Godfrey: ^7Sorry -- you've been taken off the guest list.
hash_84d8f40ff2c84e3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw seems particularly giddy right now.     That is somewhat concerning.
hash_84d9040ff2c8696: ^1Bruno: ^7I was going to offer my help, Shaw - but I see you have the situation under control.
hash_84d9140ff2c8849: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw! Have you taken too much of something?
hash_84e5e2ea7e961ca: ^1Ghost: ^7Folks like us can't help what we are, Godfrey. I just hope you can fight the darkness in you better than I did. Now, drink from that stone. Drink it up, it'll do you good.
hash_84fa5a080f5d150: ^1Shaw: ^7Handle myself? Handle myself??! What are you insinuating?!!     I am more than capple-able.
hash_8629c0b89d5cae2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You trying to tell me something, mister hammer?
hash_86569f0cc144bfe: ^1Ghost: ^7Listen, Yank, I don't know how they do it in the colonies, but over here you don't keep a lady waiting.
hash_888d5fd1e90d685: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to install Fire Gate Energy Core
hash_88cd06cc28d9928: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened to your balls, Bruno? They seem to have vanished altogether.
hash_88cd26cc28d9c8e: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes! Lure them close, Bruno - That way you can really savor the pain on their faces.
hash_88cd56cc28da1a7: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on, lad! Put on a proper show! Start Swinging! Fuck the Marquess of Queensberry!
hash_891ea7fcd7523e2: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, Diego... Things aren't looking too promising for you.
hash_897263622b4bcc0: ^1Bruno: ^7Maybe Shaw can clean up whatever is left after boom...
hash_897273622b4be73: ^1Diego: ^7Very effective, but it does make something of a mess.
hash_897293622b4c1d9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aside from a few wet lumps, that's probably the last I'll see of them.
hash_8972c3622b4c6f2: ^1Shaw: ^7Could use a sprinkle more of Trinitroanisole, I think.
hash_8a27940f8577109: ^1Shaw: ^7Where are my organs? Why can I only feel one kidney?... Oh right, there's only one.
hash_8a33857ed57a200: ^1Godfrey: ^7Stop it! You're not real! Stop saying such things and let me die!
hash_8c344cb1e93b7ff: ^1Godfrey: ^7These weapons are quite...vulgar. But, then, it's a night for vulgarity.
hash_8c345cb1e93b9b2: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I'd ask how this is even possible, but you know what they say about a gift horse.
hash_8c346cb1e93bb65: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I always loved this house. And now it loves me back.
hash_8cb272be0b79d10: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Hang in there, buckaroo. I know a thing or two about how to dress a wound.
hash_8cb292be0b7a076: ^1Godfrey: ^7If you'll pardon my frankness, sir, get back up and fight.
hash_8db56457682a0b8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Damn your eyes, Godfrey -- keep moving, man!
hash_8db57457682a26b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Godfrey! Don't make me haul your fat out of the fire!

hash_8e23e2e36ec9f17: ^1Godfrey: ^7Is this what they mean by a left-handed compliment?
hash_8e23f2e36eca0ca: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Now you've got something to moan about.
hash_8e2402e36eca27d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7"A farewell to arms" always sounded more...pleasant than this.

hash_8e756c3d700526e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Come along, dear. My heroics mean nothing without you to witness them.

hash_970f7b2c2866039: ^1Diego: ^7Lo siento, but that is what you get when you do not exfoliate!
hash_9717622c503b116: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right - Don't worry about me!      I'll just save my own skin.
hash_9717b22c503b995: ^1Shaw: ^7Okay, enough time sitting on my arse. Better get back to the grind.
hash_97dcc80e7a0fca8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Is that beginner's luck, Madame, or are you simply that good?
hash_97dcd80e7a0fe5b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Annie Oakley ain't got nothin' on you! No, seriously, I know her.

hash_97e6dcd19dd6880: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, I'll take this. Keep it coming.
hash_97e6ecd19dd6a33: ^1Bruno: ^7A hole in the wall. Payment goes in, contraband come out. Seems familiar...    ...what the Americans would call a 'speakeasy.'
hash_97e6fcd19dd6be6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Thanks for the gun. I'll figure you out later, wall.
hash_97e74cd19dd7465: ^1Shaw: ^7If these walls could speak, they'd say, 'Don't shoot it all in one place, fellas!'
hash_984ef94860d51d3: ^1Shaw: ^7On second thought... no. This just isn't for me. Anybody want this?
hash_984f494860d5a52: ^1Diego: ^7Anyone want this? It clashes with my entire outfit.
hash_984f594860d5c05: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not want this.    Who wants this?
hash_99fe4d8467a9840: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You're gonna be fine, Godfrey. Heck, I think scars can be sexy on a man.
hash_9a038087793ab3c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Never seen nothin' like this back home.
hash_9a039087793acef: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This could be the last gun I'll ever need. More likely, the last I'll ever hold...
hash_9a03b087793b055: ^1Godfrey: ^7Heaven help anyone or anything I point this weapon at.
hash_9a05ec40f7ee18e: ^1Scarlett: ^7So...we have to kill ghouls to earn points to buy stuff to kill more ghouls.      I call bull.
hash_9a39002a54a358b: ^1Godfrey: ^7Right this way, honored guests. Nothing to fear...
hash_9a39102a54a373e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Looks like that chute cattle walk through at the slaughterhouse.
hash_9a39202a54a38f1: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That's right, come to me. Just ignore the power cables...
hash_9bf83d562d537d0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You picked the wrong cowpoke to...well, poke.
hash_9bf84d562d53983: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Vengeance is mine, you horrid sack of shite!
hash_9bf86d562d53ce9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Don't know what scares me worse: these things, or how good I am at killing them.
hash_9c3e2ee4bc0664f: ^1Ghost: ^7What is it, pet? Is it the baby? Sick again?
hash_9cdd9d5f15843b4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn, things were gettin' tight there...
hash_9cddad5f1584567: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Ha! Best time I've had since holding off the Zulu!
hash_9cddcd5f15848cd: ^1Godfrey: ^7I really don't know how much more of this I can take.
hash_9ce478cd43917e4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Get back! That is a direct order!

hash_a89ac61e89377b8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Whoa! Am I makin' my own weather now?
hash_a89ad61e893796b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Was this the hammer of Thor? Or am I just the god of the shit-storm?
hash_a89af61e8937cd1: ^1Godfrey: ^7Perhaps I should have worn my Wellingtons tonight.
hash_a8e836a78069ecf: ^1Godfrey: ^7Chakrams are ready for another go. In fact, more than ready...
hash_a8e846a7806a082: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Chakrams are buzzin' like they learned a new trick.
hash_a8e856a7806a235: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Oh! That tingle means the Chakrams are ready again.
hash_a935a04a440409c: ^1Shaw: ^7ZZZZZ! That's left my synapses twitching like mad!
hash_aa2cc55048b2779: ^1Bruno: ^7This electric one looks like I felt with my first hangover.     Absinthe makes for quite a night.
hash_ac90517186af509: ^1Shaw: ^7My two best friends when the it hits the fan.
hash_aed34579132d0c6: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hear me, o stinkers! Walk slow and keep your distance till I figure out how to use this thing...!
hash_aed57a705546ebb: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to the Forest [Cost: &&1]
hash_b1fb9b24dea51f8: ^1Bruno: ^7That was more mercy than you deserved.
hash_b1fbab24dea53ab: ^1Diego: ^7You insulted me. Never a good idea.
hash_b1fbcb24dea5711: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're lucky I made it quick. I was thinking of doing something really nasty
hash_b1fbfb24dea5c2a: ^1Shaw: ^7Thought I'd forgotten about you didn't you? Sometimes you just have to be patient.
hash_b3a18d618a14dfe: ^1Shaw: ^7The wall can spontaneously generate ammo *directly* into a confined, in-motion space *within* my weapon.    That's bonkers, frankly..
hash_b3a1ad618a15164: ^1Bruno: ^7I am in no mood to haggle.
hash_b3a1bd618a15317: ^1Diego: ^7Muchas gracias. The belly of my starving gun is full once more.
hash_b3a1dd618a1567d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I suppose if the walls can give me guns, it makes sense that they can also give me bullets...
hash_b428a941eb14f94: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7I am what's best in you, Godfrey. I am your strength. Live through this, and you will see.
hash_b47fc119cb66643: ^1Scarlett: ^7Is it supposed to strip the lining from my throat?!
hash_b47fd119cb667f6: ^1Bruno: ^7This vapor is a bit strong - even for me.
hash_b47fe119cb669a9: ^1Diego: ^7A moment of discomfort... followed by a renewed sense of wellbeing. Perfecto.
hash_b47ff119cb66b5c: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly - this is actually very soothing. This is the most relaxed I've been in ages.
hash_b4ff5d0c9eca569: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Okay. Honest question: Does this thing make my ass look big?
hash_b6a96137e8cc45b: ^1Bruno: ^7I only made it angrier. Stupid one-armed bastard.
hash_b6a9c137e8cce8d: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody hell - That one's gone armless.     Interesting strategy.
hash_b7727c767d91a63: ^1Shaw: ^7I appreciate the remuneration Clearly I deserve it. The others? Not so much.
hash_b772ac767d91f7c: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's about time I got something out of all this...
hash_b772cc767d922e2: ^1Diego: ^7It is only right - after all, have I not sated your cravings, fantasma?
hash_b772dc767d92495: ^1Bruno: ^7There was a time in my life when I would have been grateful for such scraps.     This is not that time.
hash_b90edc8bbc84c3b: ^1Narrator: ^7Don't forget to reload. You don't want to get caught short on bullets.
hash_b9985fd649a657f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Nurse! Don't take my leg! Don't--oh. Sorry. Thought I was back in the Boer War for a moment.

hash_bdb4a4063c5c965: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Brigadier General Jonathan Warwick, at your service!
hash_bdfeabad0dc19e0: ^1Diego: ^7On your feet, Scarlett. We are very much relying on you.
hash_bdfebbad0dc1b93: ^1Bruno: ^7Fortunately, your wounds were minor. I would hate it if I had to Euthanize you....
hash_bdff1bad0dc25c5: ^1Shaw: ^7Maybe we should try to look out for each other a little bit more.
hash_becdf6a10c9ab6b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Guess it's just me and my gloves now.
hash_bece16a10c9aed1: ^1Diego: ^7No ammo. I will find more, or make a gallant last stand.
hash_bece26a10c9b084: ^1Shaw: ^7I guess it's time to bite the bullet... If only I had one.
hash_c05184a550557e7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I saw men blown in half during the Boer War. They had the decency to stay put.
hash_c051a4a55055b4d: ^1Godfrey: ^7Get off the floor. For heaven's sake, show a little dignity!
hash_c1c7af49a445314: ^1Godfrey: ^7Goodness me, Dragon. You certainly don't hold back.
hash_c1c7cf49a44567a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Nothing downrange survives a blast like that!
hash_c1c7df49a44582d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You been dealt a Dead Man's Hand.
hash_c25f9dcfcd7086c: ^1Godfrey: ^7Madame Mirela, I would be honored if you stay a while longer.
hash_c25fbdcfcd70bd2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You can't die now. I have to show off for someone!
hash_c25fcdcfcd70d85: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Not a word about this, y'hear? I'm sure you'll return the favor.

hash_c4e8cd064545546: ^1Bruno: ^7Never look a gift horse in the mouth, never look a gift gun in the wall. Simple as that.

hash_cae47035759e87a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Get up, soldier. Permission to die not granted.
hash_cb35da0ff3b241b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7"Hell hath no fury," am I right? Yeah, I'm right.  Don't go around scorning people.

hash_ccd6f1cda328272: ^1Diego: ^7I would hope that such supplies become... commonplace.
hash_ccd701cda328425: ^1Bruno: ^7If only La Legion were as generous with their supplies.

hash_d0d73377b035653: ^1Bruno: ^7Yes, Hammer of the gods, I know you are ready.

hash_d20bfbe50d62c91: ^1Shaw: ^7Pardon me while I set this to 'broil.'
hash_d20c0be50d62e44: ^1Diego: ^7Is it just me, or did it just get hot in here?
hash_d2bd0c92993ebb0: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, yes. The oldest chemical equation in the book: Fool plus Money equals Soon Parted.      Well, we certainly have the fool...
hash_d2bd5c92993f42f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why does everything always come down to money? Does this mean I can bribe the ghouls to leave us alone?
hash_d2bd6c92993f5e2: ^1Bruno: ^7Bad enough we are forced to kill those already dead. Must we also go through their pockets?
hash_d2bd7c92993f795: ^1Diego: ^7I used to rob from the rich to give to the poor. Must I now rob from the dead to give to the...agh, my brain hurts!
hash_d326364b7bfafb0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7If you told me this morning I'd be pulling firearms from wallpaper...
hash_d326564b7bfb316: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm not buying a weapon, I'm buying time.
hash_d33adec8e829b4b: ^1Bruno: ^7This is ridiculous. Or maybe we are already in Hell.
hash_d33aeec8e829cfe: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can buy guns from walls? That's a totally normal thing that happens.
hash_d33b3ec8e82a57d: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah yes, the ole' 'wall sells you a gun' trick. A classic.
hash_d44d54784a0327c: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7How many things can this place throw at me?
hash_d529876986ff5d0: ^1Shaw: ^7What?? How did that go so very, very wrong??
hash_d529d76986ffe4f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not much we can do about that now.
hash_d529f76987001b5: ^1Diego: ^7Well, that was far from our ideal outcome.
hash_d68a4fe05c6524e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I was fine. Fine, I say! Just resting my eyes.
hash_d68a5fe05c65401: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7All right. Fine. I'll say it. "Cheers, mate."
hash_d8ae6ebf3c8167c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, I'll be a homunculus's uncle.
hash_d8ae7ebf3c8182f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7It's called a homunculus. Right. Sure. I give up.
hash_d8ae8ebf3c819e2: ^1Godfrey: ^7This...this means something. Why does it feel so familiar?
hash_d9956e026805933: ^1Scarlett: ^7You are one ugly son of a...
hash_daa650ef2157394: ķE%jĎpņĒťúÍÖ4^∂~E“*ä(Õ6ŠäSháÉ√∂ěēc≥∂3Ŕģ+∆-ˇfor someone who's dead.
hash_db3d1fae886ecdc: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Just let me live through this and I swear: no more phony seances.
hash_dd1a016c232c5cf: ^1Godfrey: ^7Madame, I believe we are already acquainted. Please tell me I won't be haunting these grounds for as long as you have.
hash_dd3dee05bde4e8e: ^1Bruno: ^7When I kill you, I feel nothing. If only it was always that way.
hash_dd3dfe05bde5041: ^1Diego: ^7This day will pass into legend - Another chapter in a life lived to glorious excess.
hash_dd3e0e05bde51f4: ^1Shaw: ^7I've actually seen the afterlife - and there wasn't anyone walking around all flaky and bony.
hash_e0b43a83c35a187: ^1Godfrey: ^7It's a heady feeling, raining death like this.
hash_e0b44a83c35a33a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7"The gun you can load on Sunday and shoot all week long."
hash_e0b45a83c35a4ed: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Finally! A weapon as bombastic as I am!
hash_e13f5b64750ef5b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wonder how fast it eats through rounds?
hash_e13f6b64750f10e: ^1Bruno: ^7Where do you find these weapons, boite?
hash_e13f7b64750f2c1: ^1Diego: ^7I proved in Portugal that more bullets do not guarantee victory. For once, I was the one with less.
hash_e13f8b64750f474: ^1Shaw: ^7This weapon looks rather smart. Maybe later models won't even require an operator.
hash_e2ffa545be83068: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, dear. Hello...? I...can't seem to hear anything...
hash_e2ffc545be833ce: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Feels like... I stared into the sun...
hash_e2ffd545be83581: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7My eyes--! Wh--? Can't hardly hear myself...
hash_e4961ac52aa3039: ^1Godfrey: ^7I've half a mind to blinker you.
hash_e58f17da8c15994: ^1Scarlett: ^7You swing a mean shovel, but, you know...it's just a shovel.
hash_e61e4547a110007: ^1Godfrey: ^7They move faster and they die faster. Fair enough.
hash_e61e5547a1101ba: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I'm surprised we ain't up to our ears in wolfshit and batshit.
hash_e61e6547a11036d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My first wife was an animal lover. Glad she's not here to see this. She was scarier than any of this.
hash_e70556d59aab86d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7There. You are free now. Free from your skull!
hash_e931d3d73bb51a7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7By order of the Dragon, you are hereby banished. Toodle-pip, cheerio, and do kindly not come back.
hash_e95fceb388dd54f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7The bonds of death cannot hold Madame Mirela.

hash_f83effd83ae5f61: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Blast. My gun will soon be as empty as a politician's promises.
hash_f8e3e0dcc61cea9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gimme a minute and we'll both paint our tonsils. Hell, Brigadier, I'm surprised you didn't ask sooner!
hash_f9e4cde9d4f5ded: ^1Godfrey: ^7Dear lady, you've taken to bloodshed like a duck to water.
hash_fb0492c987eca5d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Guess I gotta work on my aim.
hash_fb4c7621204067b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Not the most sophisticated weapon, but I'm not trying to impress anyone -- just blow them to shreds.
hash_fb4c962120409e1: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, I've handled these often enough on quail hunts...
hash_fb889a30d89fa68: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Sorry. Had to put you outta my misery.
hash_fbf4cb5e1420e7f: ^1Ghost: ^7I'll take care of you, all right. That's what nurse Katie does.

hash_ff6544d651fa50f: ^1Diego: ^7As usual, I am the eye of the storm.
hash_1004c56ea422557d: ^1Bruno: ^7You are a generous man, Diego. Giving away such an object. One capable of destroying all that it touches.    I will watch my own back.
hash_100e744b8e9da0c6: ^1Ghost: ^7I've seen your type before, dearie, stickin your nose where it don't belong. Reminds me of that chambermaid -- Olivia. Don't end up like Olivia.
hash_101174c27aa141cb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Sorry to disturb your slumber, but your services are needed.
hash_101175c27aa1437e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Okay, big feller, let's get crackin'.
hash_101176c27aa14531: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Present arms, soldier! You've just been press-ganged.
hash_102401a80ff07a96: ^1Bruno: ^7Must I shoot you to pieces and then shoot the pieces?
hash_102402a80ff07c49: ^1Diego: ^7Now you are just making a mess.
hash_102403a80ff07dfc: ^1Shaw: ^7That's poor play! Why aren't you dead? Is the missing arm not enough of a hint?
hash_10259310a9a2558b: ^1Diego: ^7Ah. Rescued by a woman. How thoroughly modern of both of us.But especially me.
hash_10259810a9a25e0a: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you see which one got me? All I saw was the floor rising up to smack my head.
hash_102ad95f08411783: ^1Ghost: ^7Well, Brigadier?! Don't hang fire -- show a lady the way!
hash_1061eb2ef0170798: ^1Shaw: ^7Have I mentioned Prima Materia? I'm sure I have.     It's everything. Or nothing. Or both.
hash_1061f02ef0171017: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't know how we're going to survive this, but if we do - I'm going to hunt down every one of these lunatics, and find my father.
hash_1061f12ef01711ca: ^1Bruno: ^7All of this must have purpose. I know this. I feel it. Deep within.
hash_1061f22ef017137d: ^1Diego: ^7My Medallion - a family heirloom - somehow unleashed this chaos...     Should I be concerned about a curse?
hash_1068321d851d0818: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you had any sense, you'd beat it before you lose something.
hash_1068341d851d0b7e: ^1Diego: ^7You will have to try harder than that. A lot harder.
hash_1068351d851d0d31: ^1Bruno: ^7I ensure you do not live long enough to do that again.
hash_1068371d851d1097: ^1Shaw: ^7That would have hurt a lot more if I wasn't on the right medication.
hash_106c4e9207ddd036: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, I suppose even a broke rock is clock twice a day.
hash_106c509207ddd39c: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in luck. We make our own fortune.
hash_106c539207ddd8b5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Something good happened. Let's crack open the champagne.      ON SOME DEAD-BRAIN SKULLS!
hash_107c9948a186baaf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I know, little Chakrams, I know. You can come out to play soon enough.
hash_108084f0b6fe1700: ^1Diego: ^7Your ship... has sailed - on to the ragged rocks.
hash_108085f0b6fe18b3: ^1Bruno: ^7I can never allow my full rage to be unleashed.
hash_108086f0b6fe1a66: ^1Scarlett: ^7This whole damn day's gotten crazy.   I'm just rising to the fucking occasion.
hash_10808bf0b6fe22e5: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't know if this is what they call a natural high, but I am absolutely buzzing right now!

hash_108dc51e5d3756a8: ^1Bruno: ^7It kills them so quickly...    I think I love this too much.
hash_108dcb1e5d3760da: ^1Shaw: ^7Vengeance is a tricky thing. How do you know when to stop?
hash_1090bb43eec87798: ^1Bruno: ^7Though I do not feel much changing  in my body, my muscles are beginning to throb.
hash_1090bc43eec8794b: ^1Diego: ^7Hmmmm! Now that, is deeply pleasing to my palate, or should I say - my olfactory organs.
hash_1090be43eec87cb1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I feel weirdly stronger... Think I could probably carry Bruno if I needed to.
hash_1090c143eec881ca: ^1Shaw: ^7A hitherto untapped power has awoken in my pants!     I'm talking about my legs, specifically.
hash_1097195994bf11cb: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I cannot abide them slithering like that.

hash_10c09dc6a270bb33: ^1Bruno: ^7As a soldier, I learned to make use of whatever I found on the battlefield.
hash_10c09ec6a270bce6: ^1Scarlett: ^7This rifle seems built for exactly what I need right now.
hash_10c0a3c6a270c565: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah! Wonderful!    I don't actually know what it is, I'm just trying to stay optimistic.
hash_10c2b795244e4aa2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hmm. Feisty. Petite. Just like me.
hash_10e43b9cba500953: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My hands are shaking...heart's fit to burst from my chest... For the first time in years, I feel like a proper soldier!
hash_10e4c17574a86fb8: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7If this is all just a scheme to sell ammo...
hash_10e7222bae8f554b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't box me in, you pushy sons of... somethin'!
hash_10f1ae192c2d37ed: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde...    Any more good news Monsieur Optimism?
hash_10fb70c110f24666: ^1Bruno: ^7I have seen death take many forms. Yours was... worthless.
hash_10fb71c110f24819: ^1Diego: ^7You should have known - An encounter with the Hijo de Mexico ends only one way...
hash_10fb72c110f249cc: ^1Shaw: ^7Sever the head, leave it dead.    The kids used to like my nursery rhymes.
hash_10fde60b9a3ffc48: ^1Godfrey: ^7Move, Brigadier - lest this be your Waterloo!
hash_10fde90b9a400161: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You'd best haul your mutton-chops out of there, pronto!
hash_1106d499307103d8: ^1Scarlett: ^7That thing's got a mind of its own.
hash_110efd074bd3db84: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7I am pleased with your progress, Godfrey. I chose you well.
hash_1117b08a4dcda238: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That's what you get for laying hands on a gentleman.
hash_1117b18a4dcda3eb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Where I come from, we don't turn the other cheek.
hash_1117b28a4dcda59e: ^1Godfrey: ^7That's for striking me, and for eating all the shrimp!
hash_112676916e074e1c: ^1Scarlett: ^7That sneaky little creep is healing the others!
hash_1133cad9173b6ff0: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Looks a little funny, but I know a rifle when I see one.
hash_113a4ab1a08d7a4c: ^1Godfrey: ^7No. You'll make me hurt them. I know it. And they deserve better.
hash_114e46c0689fc4a1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Think I'm getting a little fan club here.
hash_115e2543c965bdd6: ^1Diego: ^7I hope Shaw picks up some tips from you, Bruno.
hash_115e2843c965c2ef: ^1Shaw: ^7Nice headshot Bruno. Not to brag, but I'm sure I've bagged more than one myself today.
hash_1173ba95e672d426: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7There's plenty more where that came from. Yeah. Plenty.
hash_1173bb95e672d5d9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You lot could learn a thing or two from me.
hash_117686946d67f0dc: ^1Godfrey: ^7I had hoped the day would never come, but I fear it may be time to compose my letter of resignation.
hash_117ace2f6f201c19: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett's starting to look like the second most deadly woman I have ever met.
hash_117acf2f6f201dcc: ^1Diego: ^7You fight much better than your father, Scarlett! He is much older to be fair.
hash_117ad02f6f201f7f: ^1Bruno: ^7I am truly surprised, Mademoiselle. You are not the woman I thought you were.

hash_1276189c289f69d6: ^1Bruno: ^7Somehow - Alistair's daughter surprises me more and more...

hash_12761a9c289f6d3c: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't remember Alistair being so good at making things... I mean he did some 'odd jobs', but that's not the same.

hash_12ce32f74ce73e76: ^1Shaw: ^7Barely a scratch... Oh no, I hope it doesn't get infected. It looks a bit infected.
hash_12ceca48a34d81e7: ^1Godfrey: ^7No, sir, I did not. Serving high tea to the Ladies' Garden Club is as close as I've ever been to open warfare. Those women are vicious.

hash_1603323bcdd0bea4: ^1Ghost: ^7I'm here for my own reasons, dearie. Unfinished business, you might say. Now come with me.
hash_160f289dbf790e90: ^1Bruno: ^7I am confused - On whose side does this creature fight?
hash_160f299dbf791043: ^1Diego: ^7If the creature was actually human sized, I think we would all be in trouble.
hash_160f2b9dbf7913a9: ^1Scarlett: ^7At least that thing is on our side. I think.
hash_160f2e9dbf7918c2: ^1Shaw: ^7He's quite the little barbarian, isn't he?
hash_161a30c276ac667e: ^1Bruno: ^7I ask about your eye only because it makes you look very much like one of them.     I have come perilously close to shooting you at least three times.

hash_16790edb96a86842: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Is that what I think it is?
hash_16bfc6f2a0759301: ^1Shaw: ^7I didn't get a good look at what happened - Were they armed with weapons?
hash_16bfc7f2a07594b4: ^1Diego: ^7I am sure you are eager to return to the fray and seek vengeance.
hash_16bfc8f2a0759667: ^1Bruno: ^7I would ask how you came to be in this unfortunate situation, but I am guessing you do not want to talk about it.
hash_16c8bcefc75999ad: ^1Scarlett: ^7Seems like you've changed a few times already. Gangster who ran away to join the Foreign Legion?      Yeah - Alistair told me a lot of things.
hash_16e927a77867a248: ^1Ghost: ^7I served this house well, Mr. Jones. I rid Master Cornelius of his...encumberances. Would've ended his pain forever, if that blasted maid hadn't found my colchicum.
hash_16f72e4a0120684c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I keep hearing a voice, sir. Not the one shouting, "insta-kill," but one inside my head. Does that ever happen to you?

hash_16f789e5924c8016: ^1Diego: ^7I fear for the future if weapons such as these become commonplace.
hash_16f78ae5924c81c9: ^1Bruno: ^7I fear tomorrow's wars will be fought with weapons much like this.
hash_16f78ce5924c852f: ^1Shaw: ^7So apparently this is called a Submachine gun. Good. I may need it to work underwater.
hash_17008aff139965f0: ^1Diego: ^7I am not too proud to get my hands dirty. So long as I can wash them soon after.
hash_17008bff139967a3: ^1Bruno: ^7Though the wood will splinter and break, we must make every effort to slow their advance.
hash_17008cff13996956: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sometimes, you just to do the best you can with whatever you have  available.
hash_170091ff139971d5: ^1Shaw: ^7This was such a beautiful ship... I feel bad hammering it full of nails.
hash_170f318e21495ed8: ^1Shaw: ^7My speciality is Chemistry - with a alchemical bent. I cannot explain these events any more rationally than you.     Actually, that's not true, but I'm just not in the mood.
hash_172ed9c80b45b9e4: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7Damn it, Godfrey, are you even trying? Don't disappoint me. Not tonight.
hash_1734f24de057adca: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Good day to you, Miss. I fear we got off on the wrong foot. Brigadier General Johnathan Warwick, retired...er, deceased.
hash_17631a3b4185ac0c: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I'm in your head now, sucker.
hash_17773e97ec3e2e3d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7What's the matter, pet? Can't stand the light of day?

hash_177df40876f04fef: ^1Diego: ^7Lo siento, but that is what you get when you wear your scrotum on your back.

hash_20533f9dbf718f95: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Don't stop me now! Not that you ever could!

hash_20809256425ce64a: ^1Diego: ^7I have seem many strange and twisted things today... This is one of the few I have liked.

hash_2129693a56599666: ^1Bruno: ^7Used properly, this weapon is deadly. Used poorly? A little less deadly.
hash_21296a3a56599819: ^1Diego: ^7You are very compact. I like how all your best features are positioned so close together.
hash_21296b3a565999cc: ^1Shaw: ^7Between my shaky hands and this firearm's considerable kick... It might be a good idea to stand well clear.

hash_24c1831a8094e9cd: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Now, see here! Who do I speak to about a refund?
hash_24c278f51817e8f6: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've heard the French lifestyle moves at a slower place, but would you hurry the fuck up and kill them already?!
hash_24c27df51817f175: ^1Shaw: ^7This is your chance to give them a proper hiding - Go in for the kill!
hash_24d4004d6255a7a2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not that I'm keeping count, Bruno - but that was a LOT of butt kicking in a very short time!
hash_24d864d6203795ba: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Geez, Godfrey! Popped him right in the noggin!
hash_24eb99d86882138c: ^1Godfrey: ^7And now back to blood and fire. Heaven help me...
hash_24eb9bd8688216f2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I can already tell this was well worth the wait.
hash_24eb9cd8688218a5: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Coulda used one of these back home.
hash_24ebe3a1adec2efa: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well...it ain't the worst view around here, that's for sure.
hash_2504e1e513b6362e: ^1Shaw: ^7Do not worry, Diego. I am more than capable of saving you. I could even do the kiss of life if I had to!
hash_2504e3e513b63994: ^1Bruno: ^7I could just leave you here to die. But that would be much bigger lesson than you need learn.
hash_250fdf7d2325af89: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, I'm still in this, still in one piece. Emily Post might not approve, but wouldn't last ten seconds here.
hash_251c6c40d968c510: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Tell me this comes with a matching cannon...
hash_252f3baa9ff1efc0: ^1Diego: ^7Where do you think you are going, babosa?
hash_252f3caa9ff1f173: ^1Bruno: ^7Crawling on your knees, begging for forgiveness. I know the feeling.    It did not work for me either.
hash_252f3daa9ff1f326: ^1Scarlett: ^7You'd think 'no legs' would slow them down...
hash_252f42aa9ff1fba5: ^1Shaw: ^7You're not looking for your shoes down there, are you?    Pretty sure they're history... chum.
hash_254163bb574ad765: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, This gun is absolutely superb!
hash_25437a29ec44ee4e: ^1Diego: ^7Do you not have another custom made contraption that could help you right now?
hash_25437b29ec44f001: ^1Bruno: ^7I would advise moving to a more advantageous position.
hash_25437d29ec44f367: ^1Shaw: ^7Any minute now, you're going to do some cool combat manoeuver and kill them all - right Scarlett?     Scarlett?

hash_25887849ed264de0: ^1Shaw: ^7Thank you. I am - after all - working up a sweat over here...     Wait, is that sweat? What the hell am I secreting?
hash_25887d49ed26565f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't worry, I don't plan on letting this burn a hole in my pocket.
hash_25887e49ed265812: ^1Bruno: ^7I will become wise to your tricks and deceptions, fantome.
hash_25887f49ed2659c5: ^1Diego: ^7I know why you show me favor.    It is my devilish looks, isn't it?
hash_259ca5d9f3f899a0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damned if I don't feel like an animal with this bad boy in hand!
hash_259ca8d9f3f89eb9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Terribly sorry, but it simply had to be done.
hash_259f79c71d347a90: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Y'all might want to give me a wide berth.
hash_259f7ac71d347c43: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This had better not be a muzzle-loader.
hash_259f7cc71d347fa9: ^1Godfrey: ^7I feel a bit overdressed with this thing...but I'll get over it.
hash_25aa1c6652c79739: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Thanks, Godfrey. I owe ya. How 'bout a free palm reading when this is over?

hash_25b54e4928fb523c: ^1Diego: ^7Yet you brought it straight to its companion piece aboard this ship?    I knew I was right to give the medallion away.     I think it is probably cursed.
hash_25db91a5adbd2d24: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope you and I did not have the same thing for dinner...
hash_25db92a5adbd2ed7: ^1Diego: ^7The ocean air is not for everyone, mi amigo.
hash_25db94a5adbd323d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Now you know what it's like to look at your pug-ugly freak-face all night!
hash_26192827437506a8: ^1Godfrey: ^7A lifetime of proper etiquette, and this is what I'm reduced to.
hash_26192a2743750a0e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This knife was a retirement gift. It's good to be back.
hash_26192b2743750bc1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Shouldn't've brought your claws to a knife fight.
hash_26207d01bf3c39df: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Not even close, Godfrey. But who'd pay to watch us get drunk, fuck whores, and cry ourselves to sleep? Okay, maybe that would sell some tickets...
hash_26400c9ce85f99af: ^1Godfrey: ^7I believe this is supposed to distract enemies. It's certainly got my head turned.
hash_26400d9ce85f9b62: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I ain't afraid of anything. 'Cept maybe this little monster.
hash_26400e9ce85f9d15: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is meant to be a bomb? Where do I pull the pin? Don't answer that.
hash_265b0b5396be15e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just help me up and skip the life lesson, Shaw.
hash_265b0d5396be1946: ^1Diego: ^7That better not have been your 'special medicine,' Chemist.
hash_265b0e5396be1af9: ^1Bruno: ^7Tell me that needle was clean, Chemist.
hash_265d30ecc60c53c4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Looks more like a pneumatic drill than a proper firearm.
hash_265d31ecc60c5577: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This thing looks big enough to ride.
hash_265d32ecc60c572a: ^1Godfrey: ^7Not the most subtle choice, but tonight is not a night for subtlety.
hash_266792e368c0e32c: ^1Godfrey: ^7The carving station is open. Prepare to be served.
hash_266794e368c0e692: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I give you fair warning, ghouls: you are not long for this Earth.
hash_2675422dc1a47ff2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Got a special on smoked meat here...
hash_26834d61b63e2bc9: ^1Shaw: ^7Another bloke with a shovel. I hope everyone likes fireballs.
hash_26834f61b63e2f2f: ^1Bruno: ^7Not again! How many of these stokers must I destroy?!
hash_26835061b63e30e2: ^1Scarlett: ^7I get it, Smokey. You're pissed. You think we wanted all this?
hash_26e84ee585b42f36: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Nice, Godfrey! You're better at this than I expected!
hash_26f0dde2cbf42dd8: ^1Shaw: ^7...just got to be careful not to hit my thumb... OWWWW!
hash_26fe95364d568e0b: ^1Narrator: ^7Oh, wait - there is some bad news...  You're definitely going to die at some point. That's how every Zombies game ends. Just make those flesh-eaters work for it.
hash_27062ece6375aadc: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7You are only alive because of me, Godfrey. Never forget it.
hash_2738cf9fb8756a79: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7We must've shot enough ghouls to fill the London Necropolis, but we don't seem any closer to finding a way out of here.
hash_273aca17e1d338bd: ^1Godfrey: ^7Any moment now, I'll wake up from this nightmare holding a broom, right? Right...?
hash_273bb3c71f5b144f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Amputation is always a shock. Even to such as you.
hash_273bb5c71f5b17b5: ^1Godfrey: ^7May I take your coat? After all, I've taken your arm...
hash_275bf6af489271e9: ^1Shaw: ^7That cheeky blue bastard is giving his a friends a leg up!
hash_275bf7af4892739c: ^1Diego: ^7Is that cuco de agua rejuvenating his friends?
hash_275bf8af4892754f: ^1Bruno: ^7Their eyes! That little blue rat is making them stronger!
hash_275bf9af48927702: ^1Scarlett: ^7...son-of-a-bitch. That sneaky little shit is healing the others!
hash_276a6eaf9168a0a3: ^1Narrator: ^7Welcome! Time to learn what's new for Zombies Mode in Black Ops 4.
hash_276bed61279c11e0: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to the Forest
hash_279789ba08d5681a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well done. It's what I would want. You know, were I a ghoul.
hash_27978aba08d569cd: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You're gettin' good at this, Godfrey!
hash_27ae15a285070da0: ^1Narrator: ^7All right, now it's time to activate the Sentinel Artifact.
hash_27f292bf00647eb4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Say, could I just wear this armor? Seems a waste just havin' it stand there.
hash_27f293bf00648067: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair prized this armor, though he never told me why.
hash_27f295bf006483cd: ^1Godfrey: ^7A shame the old warrior who once wore this can't be here to help.
hash_27f665afa210c8e4: ^1Diego: ^7So, are you a shotgun or a pistol? Either is fine, just curiou
hash_27f666afa210ca97: ^1Bruno: ^7At last, a pistol that fits my hand.
hash_281dd18be51b2a21: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Just another Friday night, pulling weapons from a wall.
hash_282de740ba6f0b4d: ^1Bruno: ^7We should not be down here, The Eye may gain the advantage from higher ground!
hash_28309a80ff79f6f8: ^1Narrator: ^7Now let's learn how to upgrade your weapon. The Pack A Punch Altar is highlighted just ahead of you.

hash_2840895c5c26a4a4: ^1Diego: ^7Usually, it is me who gets hammered, but this is good, too.
hash_28408b5c5c26a80a: ^1Scarlett: ^7There's not a problem a hammer can't solve!
hash_28613405b6422bd4: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, that seemed to do the trick.
hash_286b16d1c227be3c: ^1Godfrey: ^7That's how I handled the chaps at boarding school.
hash_286b19d1c227c355: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That's what you get for tryin' to bushwack me.
hash_286dd94d1abd44a2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Thanks. Sorry I called you a 'blowhard' before.
hash_28af9dbbf0c50338: ^1Godfrey: ^7Can't believe I'm still alive after all of this.
hash_28d66792ecec2fd7: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7On your feet, sir. No time for lollygaggin'.
hash_28d66892ecec318a: ^1Godfrey: ^7Let's get you off that filthy floor, shall we?
hash_28e324db2fee2eb0: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can hold my own - This is just gravy.
hash_28e326db2fee3216: ^1Diego: ^7This almost takes away from the thrill of the hunt - am I right?
hash_28e327db2fee33c9: ^1Bruno: ^7Much as I try to avoid violence, it will not let me go.
hash_28e329db2fee372f: ^1Shaw: ^7The Great Beyond - I'm calling it that by the way - provides us with a great, and terrible powers.
hash_28f037825e445a1c: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»Ā^≠`őłÖ*†ŃÉę#C0Ŕt[`łó"ōĽŽ\a?{h'know, on the train from London, I kept doing readings, and every last one of 'em predicted impending doom. But did I listen...?
hash_2902bbc649eddbd0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Now this is a proper rifle!
hash_2902bdc649eddf36: ^1Godfrey: ^7I do believe my prospects just improved.
hash_291e20b461c8bc08: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'd best look like I know what I'm doing with this thing...
hash_291e22b461c8bf6e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Not too big, not too small. It's the Goldilocks rifle!
hash_29201a85c075cfcc: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I was at Rorke's Drift when the Zulu tried to overrun us. Tonight feels rather like Deja Vu. Or is it Deja Voodoo...?
hash_293b6ad83f7b6337: ^1Bruno: ^7This is... Magique. Dark Magique.    Our situation is... dire.
hash_295ab161f2ec0d16: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey, Godfrey, you learn that at Butler school?
hash_295ab261f2ec0ec9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Mind you don't splash blood on your shoes!
hash_295fb47289354390: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Is it getting hot in here, or is it just me?
hash_29610be510a77d57: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Next one touches me is gonna be left with just a stump!
hash_29610ce510a77f0a: ^1Godfrey: ^7I swear, if you ruined my one good suit...!
hash_29756b205c2de0d1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Your looks just improved. That whole face thing wasn't working for you.
hash_29798ac8eb2dcfb7: ^1Ghost: ^7You ever kill anyone before tonight? Killing's the easy part. Covering your tracks is the problem. I managed it...until they exhumed those seven bodies.
hash_2983c63f07582ac0: ^1Narrator: ^7Uh-oh. Looks like this zombie's torn its way through your defenses. You'd better kill it.
hash_29913b54483e0b30: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7But you are afraid. I feel it in the pit of your stomach. It's why I chose you.
hash_29942b066bec9a98: ^1Bruno: ^7This 'creature' possesses a rage beyond anything I have ever witnessed.
hash_29942c066bec9c4b: ^1Diego: ^7Do you think your unparalleled ugliness has held you back in life?
hash_29942e066bec9fb1: ^1Scarlett: ^7This little freak's angrier than bag of wasps!
hash_299431066beca4ca: ^1Shaw: ^7I get the feeling you could be very dangerous if you were in a 'normal' sized body.
hash_299be1219baa34ec: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just like settin' a rabbit snare. 'Cept the snare's on fire and the rabbit eats brains...
hash_299be4219baa3a05: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, this has "fire hazard" written all over it.
hash_299e5ea6e5931adb: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, shit, girl. Now you've done it. Gonna die unmarried, no kids, just like Aunt Mabel always said I would. Well, if this is it, there's only one thing left to say...  Fuck you, Aunt Mabel! You were always miserable, exhausted and pregnant! At least I kept my figure...
hash_29ae7986f566f191: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7You can ask for forgiveness later, Godfrey.
hash_29fc78c7af283d96: ^1Diego: ^7Looks like we are in for another tongue-lashing.
hash_29fc79c7af283f49: ^1Bruno: ^7If I had that face, I would be angry, too.
hash_29fc7bc7af2842af: ^1Shaw: ^7How many of those bloody giants are there??
hash_2a0082c01f2ad96d: ^1Scarlett: ^7A blast like that could burn the whole flippin ship down!
hash_2a05555927030e52: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Lordy, I've worked up a powerful thirst. Nothin' a bottle of bourbon or rye couldn't fix, though. Where's the ol' man's liquor cabinet?
hash_2a05565927031005: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair, my friend, I know not if you're safe, or if you've become one of these poor, wretched flesh-devils...but I do know you still throw one hell of a party!
hash_2a0c42be6e2bc6e7: ^1Godfrey: ^7For those special moments that call for complete annihilation...
hash_2a0f47f67b07e1b4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That's what I call Texas thunder.
hash_2a0f48f67b07e367: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Munitions have come a long way since I was a young officer.
hash_2a226c702c96cc02: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Splat! Wish they'd all go down that easy.
hash_2a2992f097f3b138: ^1Bruno: ^7If needs be, I will punch my way to more ammunition.
hash_2a2993f097f3b2eb: ^1Diego: ^7Earlier, I may have... overestimated just how many bullets I had left.
hash_2a2995f097f3b651: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't like the sound of that click at all.
hash_2a2998f097f3bb6a: ^1Shaw: ^7Based on past experiences... fighting these creatures without ammunition is--    Unwise.
hash_2a3b8aa4ff819a1c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Chakrams of Vengeance feel ready for... er, vengeance.
hash_2a3b8ba4ff819bcf: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Feels like my Chakrams are good to go.
hash_2a3b8ca4ff819d82: ^1Godfrey: ^7Strange, but I sense the Chakrams of Vengeance are ready to be unleashed.
hash_2a3e178ecddff4ac: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Odds bodkins, woman! Don't just bloody stand there!
hash_2a3e188ecddff65f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Looks like everyone wants their palm read tonight.
hash_2a3e198ecddff812: ^1Godfrey: ^7The lady seems to have drawn quite the crowd.
hash_2a44835b7c5765d8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7What's the exchange rate these days?
hash_2a44865b7c576af1: ^1Godfrey: ^7It would seem I am still one of the have-nots.
hash_2a4be3728785b10b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Don't die yet, Gideon! You never even gave me your calling card!
hash_2a4c59b4ed50b5ed: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7We had a deal, Box! I paid and everything!
hash_2a4ec1b8b406d009: ^1Shaw: ^7Why does this rifle look like it should come with a really thick manual I will never bother reading.
hash_2a4ec2b8b406d1bc: ^1Diego: ^7A rifle that requires skill, and patience. Fortunately, I am blessed with an abundance of these traits.
hash_2a4ec4b8b406d522: ^1Scarlett: ^7I should really create a stabilizer for this. Reduce the sway.
hash_2a572b946c347511: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4FŠ◊?YÝz£eÔÉ»Řł•5ĀĒů©”R∂óŪąHÍľĹ/ūć;āę®ˇNecalli could not bring the stars themselves dow to earth.
hash_2a722fdc9315e4d4: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7My pyew-pyew-pyew is about to go click-click-click.
hash_2a72a70985e9c0d8: ^1Diego: ^7We all need to work together if we are to get off this ship alive.
hash_2a72a80985e9c28b: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope this was not a cry for help, Shaw?
hash_2a72a90985e9c43e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Show me who hurt you, Shaw - I'll make sure they don't do it again.
hash_2a7339c74ec6d55b: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not even sure what happened there - One minute there were loads of them - the next, they're all gone!
hash_2a733cc74ec6da74: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see you, Deigo. You're very good at fighting. Well done.
hash_2a733fc74ec6df8d: ^1Bruno: ^7Don't be reckless, Mexicain - It is a very dangerous habit to get into.
hash_2a81aef1f6cbab5c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Drains the death right out of them.
hash_2a81b0f1f6cbaec2: ^1Diego: ^7Saint Diego Necalli gives you his blessing.
hash_2a81b1f1f6cbb075: ^1Bruno: ^7Better to light a candle than curse the darkness, right?
hash_2a8accf74dd1bf74: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You look better that way. Less scratchy.
hash_2aaf16c14ba25bd4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Honestly? I didn't know things would get this bad, but I knew I'd probably need some muscle. Hence... You know... You.
hash_2ab02cb4e7fa45ad: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I do love a man in uniform. Even a much older man, overly fond of his pudding.
hash_2b2f3b515102b9c7: ^1Godfrey: ^7Your mother would be proud if she could see you right now. And thank heavens she can't.
hash_2b2f3c515102bb7a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Are you a sight for sore eyes.
hash_2b2f3d515102bd2d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I have half a mind to stay right here, looking up at you. But, worry not, I'll fight.
hash_2b30c3a72d209283: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Think I just struck it rich.
hash_2b33789c0ef2f382: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I feel a presence...a DARK presence... Oh, dear. My belly don't feel right.
hash_2b4081e576ed86b3: ^1Godfrey: ^7Do you have any further questions regarding my qualifications, Brigadier?
hash_2b5f7bf95ecbe331: ^1Shaw: ^7My services usually come at a premium. Today, I'll make an exception.
hash_2b5f7cf95ecbe4e4: ^1Diego: ^7Bribes are for those too weak willed to show the courage of their convictions.
hash_2b5f7df95ecbe697: ^1Bruno: ^7I am deeply suspicious of unexpected gifts from unknown parties.
hash_2b65d9d13361bb98: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I am Zeus hurling lightning! I am the destroyer of worlds!
hash_2b65dad13361bd4b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I think me and this here six-gun are gettin' hitched. Sorry, ladies!
hash_2b65dbd13361befe: ^1Godfrey: ^7I really shouldn't enjoy this as much as I am.
hash_2b6e8e2f0e7cb248: ^1The Brigadier: ^7In goes a peashooter, out comes an elephant gun. I do love this contraption.
hash_2b6e8f2f0e7cb3fb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I swear this thing's a-hummin'. Can't wait to try it out.
hash_2b6e902f0e7cb5ae: ^1Godfrey: ^7Did I pack enough punch? Time to find out.
hash_2bb64fcf8d221bd7: ^1Ghost: ^7These filthy creatures remind me of the mob at my trial. Namely, Mr. Justice Byles, Mr. Clark and Mr. Beasely -- my prosecutors. I only hope they're among these mindless wretches.
hash_2bc1f0690d248b98: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to get Nosferatu Chaos Material
hash_2bc79006be0699e1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7*Whew* Dang, I need a drink...
hash_2bd154763d0f9588: ^1Diego: ^7I am familiar with snuff...    But this has a bit more punch.
hash_2bd155763d0f973b: ^1Bruno: ^7Smell is much like Butchers' Quarter by the docks. So many different kinds of meat...
hash_2bd156763d0f98ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn that's rough...      In all honesty, I'd rather lick piss off a nettle.
hash_2bd15b763d0fa16d: ^1Shaw: ^7A huff and a puff, and I'll blow their house down.
hash_2bddbe2650c4061e: ^1Shaw: ^7Maybe the fireman will be nicer this time...
hash_2bddc02650c40984: ^1Bruno: ^7Angry shovel man is back -- like some piece of horseshit you cannot scrape off your shoe.
hash_2bddc12650c40b37: ^1Diego: ^7Mi amigo con bolas de fuego! So good to see you again!
hash_2bfa6e4392e1c0b8: ^1Diego: ^7Forgive me poor, lost soul. I could not bear to gaze further upon your unappealing face.
hash_2bfa754392e1cc9d: ^1Shaw: ^7That was a mercy killing. A mercy for me - I couldn't stand another minute of your incessant squawking.
hash_2bfea8f115f9a143: ^1Diego: ^7Yay. Collecting random objects is far more thrilling than fighting monsters for survival.
hash_2bfeadf115f9a9c2: ^1Shaw: ^7I hope this does not spontaneously  combust.     That happens WAY more often than you'd like to think.
hash_2c05df6410c40ab4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is the finest blade I've ever seen. Including the one Queen Victoria used to knight me.

hash_2e8543fb98da6149: ^1Ghost: ^7I'm not here for fun, sir. As my mate Mrs Atkinson liked to say, "work first, fun later."

hash_2ee972150b394c38: ^1Shaw: ^7Knowing my luck, that's either something good... or we're going to die. So you're welcome! And sorry!

hash_2f0379a45e8b290e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I sense disaster approaching. Disaster! Of the run-out-of-bullets and get-torn-to-pieces variety...
hash_2f0830f10e340d38: ^1Scarlett: ^7Disembodied voices announcing free ammo? What the fuck is really going on here?
hash_2f0832f10e34109e: ^1Diego: ^7When you've seen as much of life as I have, a strange benefactor providing ammo is not so out of the ordinary.
hash_2f0833f10e341251: ^1Bruno: ^7Now is not the time the motivations of le fantome. That will come later.
hash_2f0835f10e3415b7: ^1Shaw: ^7I suppose I should be thanking you!     Erm, thank you?    Whoever the fuck you are.
hash_2f1bcfa9e1035833: ^1Godfrey: ^7Can you teach me to do that?
hash_2f3e4e622d993fb8: ^1Shaw: ^7That's what you get! For doing what you did.
hash_2f3e53622d994837: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll get to every damn one of you Scab-heads before I'm through...
hash_2f3e55622d994b9d: ^1Diego: ^7You insulted me, and I simply could not let that go.
hash_2f481035290debf0: ^1Bruno: ^7I accept this blood money, only because of our dire situation.
hash_2f481135290deda3: ^1Diego: ^7Here we are facing certain death and this - fantasma! - is talking about points!
hash_2f481335290df109: ^1Scarlett: ^7Sure - I'll take the help... But don't for a minute think, I'm gonna give you anything back!
hash_2f481635290df622: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes... double points... for all the.. Uh... all the..    Murdering.
hash_2f59674e1da58a6b: ^1Godfrey: ^7Do I sense a hint of accusation in your tone? Perhaps you think I... how would you put it? "Bushwhacked" him...? No, Mr. Jones. No bushes were whacked for tonight's festivities.
hash_2f65859bc453dd91: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I got somethin' you can fetch...
hash_2f794e25ea57aa9e: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7You die, and you are mine forever.
hash_2f9802e4d851af74: ^1Scarlett: ^7Slow down a bit, Shaw! You don't want to overdo it and give yourself a Hernia!
hash_2f9804e4d851b2da: ^1Diego: ^7Nicely done, Shaw! Later on I'll reward you with a little medal.
hash_2f9805e4d851b48d: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey Shaw! I hope you can prescribe yourself something to calm... yourself down!
hash_2fae9c090997f499: ^1Narrator: ^7Use the Hammer of Valhalla to lay waste to these zombies.
hash_2fbb6e93eb4bb484: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7And here I thought guns were hard to find in this country.
hash_2fbb6f93eb4bb637: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair, is it you I should thank for this gift?
hash_2fbf132ba45c5800: ^1Shaw: ^7Prima Materia. The foundation of all creation. The building blocks of life itself.
hash_2fbffa6974e0dcbc: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7Yes you do, Godfrey. You can fool everyone else with your innocent act, but you can't fool me.
hash_2fc2fee6447ffb56: ^1Shaw: ^7Someone else want to take this? It's certainly not what I ordered.
hash_2fc300e6447ffebc: ^1Bruno: ^7Would anyone like this? I don't need it.
hash_2fc301e64480006f: ^1Diego: ^7Who wants a weapon from the Generous Diego Necalli?
hash_2fc303e6448003d5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Who wants this? It's not what I'm looking for.
hash_2fc5db0a84487644: ^1The Brigadier: ^7No need to thank me. Just tell your friends the Brigadier was there in your hour of need.
hash_2fc5dc0a844877f7: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7On your feet, girl. I can't do this without you.
hash_2fc5dd0a844879aa: ^1Godfrey: ^7Come, Miss. We still have work to do.
hash_2fc66cac010f819e: ^1Scarlett: ^7It died like it lived: ugly as sin.
hash_2fdd77f673af64af: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7The spirits are with me tonight!
hash_2fdf1f954f5d3259: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Now you see 'em, now you don't!
hash_2fdf68be9e315a9b: ^1Scarlett: ^7You looking to get hurt? Because that's what's going to happen.
hash_2fdf69be9e315c4e: ^1Bruno: ^7Those who wrong me are usually found at bottom of The Seine. They did not drown.
hash_2fdf6abe9e315e01: ^1Diego: ^7If it is violence you seek, then it is violence you will find.
hash_2fdf6bbe9e315fb4: ^1Shaw: ^7That'll leave a bruise. I hate bruises. They make my tattoos all wonky.
hash_2ff8768cf6d9a1c8: ^1Scarlett: ^7I take it you came straigh from Hell - Am I right little guy?
hash_2ff8788cf6d9a52e: ^1Diego: ^7I think I want you as far away from me as is physically possible.
hash_2ff8798cf6d9a6e1: ^1Bruno: ^7May you unleash your blood-lust upon those who deserve it most.
hash_3011a3740993eee8: ^1Bruno: ^7You may lack legs, but you do not lack will.
hash_3011a4740993f09b: ^1Diego: ^7You just don't know when to quit, do you?
hash_3011a6740993f401: ^1Scarlett: ^7Y'know, persistence is usually a virtue, but these floor-jockeys are working my last nerve.
hash_3011a9740993f91a: ^1Shaw: ^7Are your legs... off doing... their 'own' thing?

hash_30400db6c5eab8d4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is turning into quite the battle. Tell me, Godfrey, did you ever serve in uniform?
hash_30573a6f400e21ec: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Looks like I rolled snakes eyes.

hash_30573d6f400e2705: ^1Godfrey: ^7Do not run out on me, Box. Not now.

hash_374c73443901ea0a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You swing a mean shovel, but, you know...it's a fucking shovel.

hash_3783d5cc7c5f41bf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Eye of the storm, luv. That's me!
hash_378e150f3f9a0124: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Wolves. Bats. Someone read too many penny dreadfuls.
hash_379a28acac9f79c2: ^1Ghost: ^7*Ahem* Brigadier? We have places to be.
hash_379a4bde0d58c12d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Critters got claws like mountain lions!
hash_379b4bb53ea0659b: ^1Scarlett: ^7This had better be worth the taste, Shaw.
hash_379b4cb53ea0674e: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not feel effect... Wait... Wait... Okay. Now I feel effect.
hash_37a28ebb5650f832: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is just the icing on the cake! Well done Dad! If messing up my life at least three times already wasn't enough, you just went and did it again!
hash_37a809e49958ff3b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You got one that matches my earrings?
hash_37c061326fe9230e: ^1Bruno: ^7Like almost everything else on this ship, this 'eye' wishes us dead.
hash_37d622095e24682e: ^1Shaw: ^7This invention better work, Scarlett. I could really do with the help.
hash_37d624095e246b94: ^1Bruno: ^7Hmm. Parts of Mademoiselle Rhodes' contraption. Why did she leave this here?
hash_37d625095e246d47: ^1Diego: ^7Did Scarlett say she crafted this? I honestly can't remember.
hash_37d627095e2470ad: ^1Scarlett: ^7This section of my shield doesn't look too bad - apart from the blood and sputum...

hash_3a1a8d3061b57e58: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7No! It can't end like this. Too many things I never got around to. Never rode a barrel down Niagara Falls, never got that pet weasel, never made love in a zeppelin. No, wait. I done that zeppelin one last year in Mexico...
hash_3a61c9378ee2d03b: ^1Shaw: ^7A short, sharp shock, and all is done.     Sod it, let's make it a long one!
hash_3a61ce378ee2d8ba: ^1Diego: ^7Hammer, you're coming back to Mexico with me.
hash_3a749042fb751ec6: ^1Shaw: ^7This is JUST what I was looking for - That time I was lost.
hash_3a749242fb75222c: ^1Bruno: ^7Bonjour, little piece - yet to find its whole.
hash_3a749342fb7523df: ^1Diego: ^7My heart says 'this is important.' My brain says 'stop picking up random objects, you kleptomaniac.'
hash_3a9e5e2ad65d850c: ^1Godfrey: ^7The family plot. My advice is tread softly. Too many angry souls roaming the grounds as it is.
hash_3a9e602ad65d8872: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You know, I have relatives buried out here. I pray we don't run into them now...
hash_3a9e612ad65d8a25: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Huh. Boot Hill, Merry Ol' England style.
hash_3a9eb4dd036e3c54: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Boy, am I in the wrong place.
