hash_3ade3335ac5c86f6: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»ĀFēņiõ(6BēCxųŕrįčąH+ļű-XĹŅŘ›sż^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ee-yugh. Somebody misplace a voodoo doll?
hash_3ae1993402fa7375: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ee-yugh. Somebody misplace a voodoo doll?
hash_3af9af2553334700: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Aw, Box. Always letting me down. Like every man I ever met.
hash_3afdd4004084135f: ^1Godfrey: ^7Run, Madame Mirela! Those fiends are not your fans!
hash_3afdd50040841512: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Get the Hell away from her, you scum.
hash_3afdd600408416c5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Break free, you silly church-bell! The dead are about to claim you!
hash_3b1af589342df709: ^1Shaw: ^7Amazing. I just thought of it and it happened! Let me try again!     No. Didn't work.
hash_3b1af689342df8bc: ^1Diego: ^7Is this your way of helping, fantasma?
hash_3b1af789342dfa6f: ^1Bruno: ^7Litle more than a symbolic gesture - Given that the craftsmanship is so poor.
hash_3b1af889342dfc22: ^1Scarlett: ^7We'll take all the help we can get - Even if it is a half-ass job.
hash_3b2c38fff158cade: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Awake, ancient warrior...! The dead walk the Earth, so...make them not walk the Earth...!
hash_3b50b02fc5b99220: ^1Diego: ^7Success. I will always achieve it - By any means necessary.
hash_3b50b12fc5b993d3: ^1Bruno: ^7Any victory - however small - is still a victory.
hash_3b50b72fc5b99e05: ^1Shaw: ^7I've good news! We just did the thing we were trying to do
hash_3b71aad765e4c0b1: ^1Shaw: ^7Chemists really shouldn't get their hands dirty - especially not with splatters of blood.
hash_3b71abd765e4c264: ^1Diego: ^7A shotgun. I am not insulted, just... insulted.
hash_3b71acd765e4c417: ^1Bruno: ^7I know this weapon well. Very damaging to kneecaps.     And groin.
hash_3b71add765e4c5ca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Alistair only ever shot Clay Pigeons. Wish I could say the same.
hash_3b731547d974108e: ^1Godfrey: ^7A cheeky fortune teller and a middle-aged manservant versus the hordes of Hell. What could possibly go wrong?
hash_3b74faa704df35a7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Appreciate the help. You really are a true gentleman.
hash_3b7654bd6a4116fd: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Don't worry, pops, I've got just the thing for what ails ya.
hash_3b776b3afece3054: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Brain-dead tossers won't have the good sense to stop.
hash_3b776c3afece3207: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Its barbecue time and you're all invited!
hash_3b776d3afece33ba: ^1Godfrey: ^7I always try to give our guests a warm reception.
hash_3b9d324eb15b0d7a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7No offense, Godfrey, but I've noticed you seem less "butlery" since we started fighting for our lives.
hash_3ba7d1ab2fe3d937: ^1Godfrey: ^7I begged Master Alistair to install a proper exit, but even out here we're still trapped.
hash_3ba7d2ab2fe3daea: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7So this is the garden, huh? Good a place as any to end up pushin' daisies.
hash_3ba7d3ab2fe3dc9d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair's garden. I'm amazed its not withered, as much traveling as he did.
hash_3bac2acea5974fea: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Watch your back,' they always say. Now I don't have to.
hash_3bb76fd4f92dcfae: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7These are the Chakrams of Vengeance. And they don't like walking corpses one bit.
hash_3bbcb2e4b285056b: ^1Ghost: ^7Remember those Boer prisoners you slaughtered? Couldn't risk meeting them again on the battlefield. Well, this house was my battlefield
hash_3bc831b0241c6b7b: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I get cornered, I've always got the Hammer.
hash_3bc832b0241c6d2e: ^1Bruno: ^7Let the monsters come. I shall unleash the Hammer.
hash_3bc833b0241c6ee1: ^1Diego: ^7They say a hammer can build many things. A table...a house...a mountain of corpses...
hash_3bc834b0241c7094: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, hammer, I feel you. I'll be calling down the lightning soon enough.
hash_3bc9fc2d82a2ec13: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Unclean beasts, get thee behind me! Actually, stay where I can see you.
hash_3bc9fe2d82a2ef79: ^1Godfrey: ^7One at a time, please. I can't serve you all at once.
hash_3bdbb36c1d046393: ^1Shaw: ^7I've felt a pervading sense of dread all day. Now I know why.
hash_3bdbb66c1d0468ac: ^1Scarlett: ^7Brain-deads' skin is pretty leathery - I doubt this will even leave a mark.
hash_3bdbb86c1d046c12: ^1Diego: ^7Do you realize how sad you make me? Look at my face, it should be obvious.
hash_3bdbb96c1d046dc5: ^1Bruno: ^7Oui, les monstres will fear Bruno and his miniature shooter of pebbles.
hash_3be68b2d2b769fe3: ^1Godfrey: ^7Please...grant me the firepower to survive this night.
hash_3bee48ba6fcbcc60: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You never answered my question, did ya, Godfrey? Why did Alistair no-show his own party?
hash_3c0eee52cf531908: ^1Godfrey: ^7Very good, Madame. Do keep it up.
hash_3c0ef052cf531c6e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Bang on, Madame. Right betwixt the eyes!
hash_3c0ef152cf531e21: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I was gonna give you some pointers, Miss, but you're a natural.
hash_3c10c5acf47783e0: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7You can't quit me, Godfrey. I own you now.
hash_3c172297e64ca140: ^1Shaw: ^7The Beacon of Light! A noble guard! Protector of our backsides!
hash_3c172797e64ca9bf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Mind the bubble, freaks. It's my personal space.
hash_3c2866bcd84910b8: ^1Diego: ^7I saw pictures of such weapons in a magazine. I did not look too closely - I was the cover story.
hash_3c2867bcd849126b: ^1Bruno: ^7Just before I left the Legion, my brothers were starting to receive such arms.
hash_3c2868bcd849141e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Guns like this are going to change things. Forever.
hash_3c286dbcd8491c9d: ^1Shaw: ^7First time I held a gun like this I kind of... fired in all directions.     And nobody was hurt. Not a single person. Everyone lived. Not one injury.
hash_3c2953db7a80d0c0: ^1Godfrey: ^7Something about this Aroma does remind me of another of Alistair's old cohorts... What was his name?
hash_3c2955db7a80d426: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Let me wait a minute to feel the effects... Oh, boy! That really is quite something.
hash_3c2956db7a80d5d9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Are these things made from venom or anti-venom? Truthfully, I ain't sure which would be better.
hash_3c2df5f161209670: ^1Bruno: ^7What just...happened? Head feels full of...broken glass...
hash_3c2df6f161209823: ^1Diego: ^7Arh! Keep firing! The blindness will pass!
hash_3c2dfbf16120a0a2: ^1Shaw: ^7Agh...like pissing on...the third rail.     Trust Me, I've done it...
hash_3c3860d4647710e4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Saw your timber, you wretched thing.
hash_3c3861d464771297: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7They smell even worse once you open 'em up.
hash_3c3862d46477144a: ^1Godfrey: ^7It seems I'm working the carving station tonight.
hash_3c4096ab6421b78f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, it's not exactly haute couture, but I'll take it.
hash_3c476d31c423ce00: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora, Deigo - You went through them like grass through a goose!
hash_3c4bc911f00d4c83: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened? Am I still in one piece?
hash_3c5416639de3d578: ^1Shaw: ^7Fascinating: the creature seems composed of fire and coal.    Well, terrifying, really, but fascinating, too.
hash_3c541b639de3ddf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Couldn't just stay in the boiler room, could you?
hash_3c541c639de3dfaa: ^1Bruno: ^7Bonjour, shovel man! We have to stop meeting like this, non?
hash_3c541d639de3e15d: ^1Diego: ^7Never bring a shovel to a gun fight.
hash_3c652d20303596d5: ^1Godfrey: ^7Quite. In fact, a few other invited guests had the same idea. They were definitely the lucky ones.
hash_3c8b8d46fccc6d6e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Much obliged, Godfrey. You can ride in my posse anytime.
hash_3c8b8e46fccc6f21: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Good man, Godfrey. Now let me get up on my own so the others don't notice.
hash_3cda43b9b03afc03: ^1Shaw: ^7Ow. I didn't even see that one! They're so touchy-feely sometimes!
hash_3cda46b9b03b011c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Thanks, Frenchy. Don't know how I slipped up back there.
hash_3cda48b9b03b0482: ^1Diego: ^7My injury was just a clever ruse, Bruno. But thank you for playing along.
hash_3ce4a100e020c18b: ^1Godfrey: ^7He is the very model of decapitating gentlemen.
hash_3ce4a200e020c33e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't you love how they pop like balloons?

hash_3e2594fcf2bee0e7: ^1Narrator: ^7Teamwork is everything.  Sometimes you have to rely on your companions to progress.
hash_3e2938dbe5259d4b: ^1Shaw: ^7I shouldn't re-use these blades. Gotta be worse than dirty needles.
hash_3e293bdbe525a264: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just like moths to the flame. ZAP!
hash_3e293ddbe525a5ca: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, Viper, you do not fail to impress!
hash_3e293edbe525a77d: ^1Bruno: ^7The Viper, she has more teeth than a shark.
hash_3e2972717dc1c742: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Got my Viper, got my Dragon. Decisions, decisions...
hash_3e2973717dc1c8f5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I feel like a dandy highwayman. And I adore it!
hash_3e576f86969cf81e: ^1Diego: ^7I find myself wondering if Lady McKendrick met with the same fate as these other poor souls.     It would be such a shame - she was so beautiful.
hash_3e6e393b11d9ede2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7No, no, no. Don't run out on me now, Box.
hash_3e7a029ba1945a71: ^1Shaw: ^7I suppose I should be thanking you!     Erm, thank you?     Whoever you are.
hash_3e7ca3e634c208fe: ^1Narrator: ^7See that weird box of bones? It isn't quite as dangerous as it looks.
hash_3ea4f40d046e7827: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Shoulda kept your mitts off me.
hash_3eb1042f8600dcb0: ^1Godfrey: ^7Let's call this an investment in my future.
hash_3eb1072f8600e1c9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't know what's weirder: these newfangled guns, or buying 'em straight from the wall.
hash_3eb510aaaeedbdb0: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not even gonna lie - I am in a bad mood!
hash_3eb512aaaeedc116: ^1Diego: ^7By blade is so swift, you probably did not even feel it pierce your fetid flesh.
hash_3eb515aaaeedc62f: ^1Shaw: ^7That's far closer than I'm comfortable with.
hash_3ebfbcff2b12e49b: ^1Godfrey: ^7Brigadier, you must retreat! There is no shame in preserving your posterior.
hash_3ebfbdff2b12e64e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey, Brigs, you sure picked a shitty spot to make a stand.
hash_3ec0da318c3c2b98: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Always wondered what Alistair kept in his wine cellar.
hash_3ec0db318c3c2d4b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Any more of that and my tongue's gonna quit.
hash_3ec0dc318c3c2efe: ^1Godfrey: ^7Eh. I've had worse from master Alistair's wine cellar.
hash_3ed24b8ddd4bc623: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keeping score?!      You bet your ass I'm keeping score.
hash_3ed24c8ddd4bc7d6: ^1Bruno: ^7To be rewarded for such brutality... Is something I thought I had left behind.
hash_3ed24d8ddd4bc989: ^1Diego: ^7It seems someone - or something - seeks to reward our efforts.
hash_3ed24e8ddd4bcb3c: ^1Shaw: ^7Wait? What? How on earth are we playing for points??

hash_3f17a70a033d55e1: ^1Shaw: ^7Come on, lad! Put on a proper show! Start Swinging!
hash_3f2ffea4cee3808e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Back off, people! And by people, I mean the dead people...
hash_3f33e8d005417874: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair was always an odd duck, but never a murderer. I fear his enemies must be behind this.
hash_3f3e1300bd947d38: ^1Scarlett: ^7Gross. Like rotten cabbage and week-old fish--!
hash_3f4d936bf529d26c: ^1Godfrey: ^7Don't worry, Miss, brains clean up easily.
hash_3f6673fa06eb2970: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Oh, y'all are in for a jolt.
hash_3f6674fa06eb2b23: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Strategy is all about luring the enemy right where you want them.
hash_3f6eea2b67b2085c: ^1Godfrey: ^7If only I could keep this burning throughout the long, dark night...
hash_3f6eed2b67b20d75: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Stick close, partners. I'll take ya'll under my wing.
hash_3f71a675975eb760: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7At least you will be spared what is to come, Alistair. As will the chosen few...
hash_3fa6cf49aee7af8c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Fortune favors the bold.  Especially with this muderous weapon in hand.
hash_3fa7bfaf6b015e70: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I didn't like his face, either, Gideon.
hash_3fce290e5ff94f20: ^1Scarlett: ^7I could have made that a lot more painful - believe me.
hash_3fce2c0e5ff95439: ^1Bruno: ^7I could not allow your insult to go unanswered...
hash_3fce2e0e5ff9579f: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been really annoyed ever since you attacked me.
hash_3fd1f332bd4d750b: ^1Godfrey: ^7At last. Safe haven - if only for a moment.
hash_3fd1f432bd4d76be: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Got a nice patch of sunshine for ya. Come and get it.
hash_3fd1f532bd4d7871: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well if you can't stand the heat, stay out of...the, er... Oh, just die already!
hash_3febb319b0388ae0: ^1Diego: ^7Your odor reminds me of the night I spent in a stable.    For once, I was grateful that Marianne wore such strong perfume.
hash_3febb419b0388c93: ^1Bruno: ^7I am ready and prepared for whatever your next move may be.
hash_3febba19b03896c5: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm curious - do you ever turn on each other? Or is it only *normal* people you like?

hash_406667f9dc743e28: ^1Bruno: ^7As always, I am surrounded by death.
hash_406668f9dc743fdb: ^1Diego: ^7It's raining blades and blood -- watch out!
hash_40666df9dc74485a: ^1Shaw: ^7Establishing a PERIMETER!' That's a thing people say, yes?

hash_40706e56aa62b897: ^1Shaw: ^7Perhaps one of the others will acquire you, weapon. But not I.
hash_40712810015d80a0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Hardly sporting, but it had to be done.

hash_409a8f8477133cc9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Oh, you gotta be fuckin' kiddin' me.
hash_40ac4e815e53168b: ^1Ghost: ^7Retired, eh? I once worked for a retired sea captain, name of Mawer. The dear man even wrote me into his will. I had that effect, you know, on more than a few people.
hash_40adc0c6f9f2f502: ^1Shaw: ^7Never mind turning lead into gold.  I'm turning gold into lead.
hash_40b30600ec7276e2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I really gotta think this through.
hash_40c044c9c8ae03e8: ^1Bruno: ^7You do not want me to see angry, monstres. I can be quite sadistic.
hash_40c045c9c8ae059b: ^1Diego: ^7You tear my coat - I tear your flesh!
hash_40c047c9c8ae0901: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't try that shit with me! I will cut you bad.
hash_40c04ac9c8ae0e1a: ^1Shaw: ^7Eeh... I've got gunk all over me. I can't even begin to identify what it is.

hash_40cbeb08998ba48f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7See, this is the kind of thing that makes you never wanna have kids.
hash_40df7c74afadf3d7: ^1Shaw: ^7Slice and dice, my blades. Slice and dice.
hash_4108e4b545c74c7b: ^1Bruno: ^7The vomit is   disgusting...    But that smell...

hash_415224c92ef3300e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Wait, what? This is not what I paid for.

hash_41cb83fa960afbaf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Come on, cowboy, don't let this be your last stand!

hash_420760ad92dc2a6a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I'd best pour some whisky on that wound before it goes septic.
hash_420761ad92dc2c1d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You keep that snapping sauce-box far from me!
hash_42172b9879a4e50c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I cannot say, sir. I can tell you that he likes his whiskey neat, his tobacco Turkish, and that he dresses to the left. But nothing regarding his current absence.
hash_4232c488a3321d54: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Stay put, Box. That is an order!
hash_4232c588a3321f07: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey! I just paid good money!

hash_43069b77b949f3e3: ^1Bruno: ^7An ignoble end. But, then, none of us get what we want. Only what we deserve.
hash_4306a177b949fe15: ^1Shaw: ^7Another ankle-biter subtracted from the life's cosmic equation.
hash_4313af648e451f24: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Did I throw that too hard? Sorry!
hash_431a1a61d4ddabbe: ^1Shaw: ^7Ph, that blue wanker--! He's making the worm-brains stronger!!

hash_4362921a043ab046: ^1The Brigadier: ^7British silver -- finest in the world!

hash_439015d567de2f6d: ^1Shaw: ^7What a naughty little runt you are.

hash_43ac5f5193430144: ^1Godfrey: ^7Do the spirits guide your aim, Madame? Or is that all you?
hash_43ac6151934304aa: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Bravo, miss! Don't stop on my account.
hash_43ac62519343065d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Tip of the hat to Madame Mirela.
hash_43c61a164dadf33d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Man alive! Our Knight friend nailed another one!

hash_43fbf4cbb96ff184: ^1Godfrey: ^7This feels like a mistake, but how will I know if I never try?
hash_43fbf6cbb96ff4ea: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Perhaps I can convince them to kindly line up whilst I shoot them all at once.

hash_441ff938b42b78e8: ^1Bruno: ^7Kill and move on. Kill and move on. That's what you have to
hash_441ffa38b42b7a9b: ^1Diego: ^7Whatever it is you've taken, Shaw - make sure there's no side effects before you share it with the rest of us.
hash_441ffc38b42b7e01: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not bad, Shaw. Not bad at all. Very good actually.
hash_44383a3d23a70b04: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Nice shootin', Godfrey! Remind me not to get on your bad side.
hash_44616eef27252966: ^1Shaw: ^7Right! The blade! And the pistol! How could I forget?
hash_446170ef27252ccc: ^1Bruno: ^7Viper and Dragon awake from their slumber.
hash_446171ef27252e7f: ^1Diego: ^7I mustn't forget to let the Viper and Dragon get in on the action.
hash_446173ef272531e5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Viper and Dragon. Which one's gonna win me over?
hash_44901f4164670824: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7You should be ashamed at your own flippancy, Godfrey.
hash_449cedf57331f1c6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Dang, things were gettin' tight there...
hash_44a8d1e784df11d8: ^1Shaw: ^7They're just big, bloody rings. How dangerous could they be?
hash_44a8d7e784df1c0a: ^1Bruno: ^7Come here, monstres! Bruno has something for you!
hash_44a8d8e784df1dbd: ^1Diego: ^7Multiple magic murder blades? It feels like my birthday.
hash_44be16be2f2ac101: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well whatever Alistair's reasons - not showing up for his own party sure looks like it was a smart move...
hash_44cdde34104f2157: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Scepter's hummin'. Better give it another whirl.
hash_44cddf34104f230a: ^1Godfrey: ^7The Scepter buzzes and throbs, as though willing itself into life.
hash_44e016afd6c30574: ^1Shaw: ^7It chains its kills! Is it self-aware?
hash_44e3e76f0eca2500: ^1Godfrey: ^7Very good, Madame Mirela. Very good indeed.
hash_44f4f5a200e2f340: ^1Diego: ^7That blue one seems unconcerned with us.    This makes me nervous, my friends.
hash_44f4f6a200e2f4f3: ^1Bruno: ^7That blue one looks slippery, like a rat.     You know what I do to rats?
hash_44f4f7a200e2f6a6: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hold on. Is that sneaky one over there made out of water?
hash_44f4fca200e2ff25: ^1Shaw: ^7Is that...a water ghoul? I'd love to get a sample...
hash_45033a8e97e40e20: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to craft the Stake Knife
hash_45056e9310f52353: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well... my little voice says things like, "Stop staring at her bum!" Just ignore it. I always do.
hash_45143167a97be4ff: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Live like a bat, die like a rat.
hash_4529d2da11cb584c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Fangs a lot, fellas. Now, who's next?
hash_4529d4da11cb5bb2: ^1Diego: ^7You know you are my favorite, Viper.
hash_45335f59934c9dab: ^1Shaw: ^7Are you tired Shaw? Maybe I could prescribe you a little pick-me-up!
hash_45336259934ca2c4: ^1Scarlett: ^7This was a tactical move, right Deigo? Surely you weren't bested in combat?
hash_45336559934ca7dd: ^1Bruno: ^7Were you over confident Diego? It certainly looks like you were over confident.
hash_45562e21b7d90cd8: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh my... It feels like my lungs have just doubled in size!
hash_45563321b7d91557: ^1Scarlett: ^7That... sure makes your eyes focus. And water.
hash_45563421b7d9170a: ^1Bruno: ^7A soldier must remain focussed at all times. I am soldier. I am focussed.
hash_45563521b7d918bd: ^1Diego: ^7This brings good health?    Surely my toned physique is some indication of just how healthy I already am?
hash_455d5aa678573eb9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Lord, I hate 'em crawlin' around like that.
hash_45709be4bfeacf11: ^1Shaw: ^7I'd keel over too if I looked like you.
hash_45709ce4bfead0c4: ^1Diego: ^7You may be bigger, uglier, and tongue-ier than your brothers...but you die just like the rest.
hash_45709ee4bfead42a: ^1Scarlett: ^7So, what's a girl got to do never see one of those monsters again?
hash_45956cfadebfae8e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I've got a magic wand, boys. And I'm not afraid to use it.
hash_459d96c9ef18b05d: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, we're clearly no longer amongst polite company. Rest assured, I'm as eager as anyone to get back to proper...butling.
hash_45a760914d7a7d69: ^1Scarlett: ^7My father - Alistair Rhodes - didn't give me up.      He tore our family apart.
hash_45ab6d8b2468de1b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, I can feel you, Viper and Dragon. You can show me what you can do soon enough.
hash_45ba31b64d11ce5b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Next we'll be buying grenades from the bloody commode.
hash_45bceb753e9ec9c8: ^1Godfrey: ^7I really must work on my aim.
hash_45bced753e9ecd2e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Blast! I was aiming for the heart!
hash_45bcee753e9ecee1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gotta shoot to kill, or they just don't stop.
hash_45c1739b3ea32068: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Thank you kindly, Gideon. And call me Christina. "Madame Mirela" is just my stage name.
hash_45c511663b7bb18c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Ooooh...I'm feelin' eager. Maybe even a little over-eager.
hash_45c512663b7bb33f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I though nothing smelled worse than the dead burning on a battlefield. I was wrong.
hash_45cb92ef47ee3ccb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Want something done right, do it yourself.
hash_45cb93ef47ee3e7e: ^1Bruno: ^7This is how it goes - I am a servant to fate itself.
hash_45cb94ef47ee4031: ^1Diego: ^7I did not need - nor want - anyone's help anyway.
hash_45cb95ef47ee41e4: ^1Shaw: ^7Barely a scratch... Oh shit, I hope it doesn't get infected. It looks a bit infected.
hash_45e3f5b534de1341: ķE%jĎpņĒťúÍÖ4^≥~ÔAÍéĮ; ēÚŻPbĚŔú\v! é-a°Ľ∆Ŗn\v do -- somebody fetch me a broom.
hash_46098c6851e4f14e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Y'all got some seriously messed up critters over here.
hash_461205a6d16d588d: ^1Diego: ^7Fear not, Shaw - It is your honor for me to save you.
hash_46123136492c2004: ^1The Brigadier: ^7"Chakram." Such a beautiful word. Such a vicious weapon.
hash_46123236492c21b7: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just like tossin' horseshoes. 'Cept the target explodes...
hash_46123336492c236a: ^1Godfrey: ^7I am not a violent man by nature...but the Chakrams really don't care.
hash_46138030de49f3d5: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Can't I just stay in there till all the ghouls are gone?
hash_4619acf9d0298f2e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7They're trying to cut you off, pops!
hash_461a97b6676a4152: ^1Godfrey: ^7It's clearly been a long time since you saw Ms. Rhodes. She's a grown woman now...and sadly somewhat estranged from her father.
hash_462028dcaa428f7b: ^1Shaw: ^7What a naughty little shit you are.
hash_46202bdcaa429494: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shoot that sneaky blue freak before he supercharges the rest of 'em!
hash_46202ddcaa4297fa: ^1Diego: ^7Kill the blue ones on sight, amigos. They make our job ten times harder.
hash_46202edcaa4299ad: ^1Bruno: ^7The monstres bleus must die. Or we surely will.
hash_462d5a707ebb8343: ^1Shaw: ^7Ooh. Feels nice in here. Y'know, if you're not already dead.
hash_462d5f707ebb8bc2: ^1Diego: ^7I claim this land in the name of the Queen!     Not you, Scarlett.
hash_462d60707ebb8d75: ^1Bruno: ^7A moment to breathe. Use it wisely.
hash_462f4e1061a081cb: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7My shield broke?! I want my money back!
hash_46402d78de39b840: ^1Diego: ^7The Chakram's first responsibility is death. Its second is to make it  look as beautiful as possible.
hash_46403478de39c425: ^1Shaw: ^7Feels like the Chakrams are readier than ever.
hash_466244b376b83018: ^1Shaw: ^7Time. Is. Relative.     My relative won't even talk to me anymore.
hash_46624ab376b83a4a: ^1Bruno: ^7This makes me dizzy. It is not good dizzy.
hash_46662865e77a439e: ^1Diego: ^7Congratulations, Scarlett you are now the second member of the Rhodes Family whose life I have saved.
hash_46662965e77a4551: ^1Bruno: ^7As you know, I owe your father my life. The least I can do is save yours.
hash_46662b65e77a48b7: ^1Shaw: ^7Are you angry, Scarlett? I would be if I were down there just sat on my bum.
hash_466c05f525844fcb: ^1Godfrey: ^7This weapon may be above my station, but...who cares?
hash_466c06f52584517e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hot damn! I feel like the fuckin' Angel of Death!
hash_466c07f525845331: ^1The Brigadier: ^7"Rumble thy bellyful! Spit, fire!" Ha-HA!
hash_466ce5da513deb58: ^1The Brigadier: ^7They say lightning never strikes twice. I beg to differ.
hash_466ce6da513ded0b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Right this way, screamers! First come, first served!
hash_466ce7da513deebe: ^1Godfrey: ^7They say electricity is the way of the future. I am inclined to agree.
hash_466fa8f6da8ac6cb: ^1Scarlett: ^7From now on - Every one of you that jumps overboard is getting off easy.
hash_467a298945d11afb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Ghouls get stronger, guns get stronger...where does it all end?
hash_467a2a8945d11cae: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Let's see what you can do now.
hash_467a2b8945d11e61: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Put that in your pipe and smoke it.
hash_4681e3af5fa7b560: ^1Godfrey: ^7Is it petty to hit back ten times harder? Then call me petty.
hash_4681e5af5fa7b8c6: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That hurt you more than it hurt me.
hash_4681e6af5fa7ba79: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I fought indians meaner and smarter than you. You will all end up the same.
hash_468fc960c38bc25c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Oh, I'm gonna have some fun with this.
hash_468fca60c38bc40f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Something tells me I'll be using my share of cartridges tonight, and then some...
hash_468fcc60c38bc775: ^1Godfrey: ^7Such a coarse, uncouth weapon. In other words, perfect.
hash_4690226d0abf4bdb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Our resident Rough Rider knows where to shoot.
hash_4690246d0abf4f41: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Are you trying to outshine me, Mr. Jones?
hash_469dc38e7bb9dd4c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I'm poked up to admit it, but I'm stone out of ammo.
hash_469dc48e7bb9deff: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Me with no ammo -- 'bout as useful as tits on a tree.
hash_46a4cc746fe31821: ^1Shaw: ^7It's better to get it over quick, isn't it Diego?
hash_46a4ce746fe31b87: ^1Bruno: ^7If you stopped talking, you could probably do that again.
hash_46a4cf746fe31d3a: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see what you're doing, Diego. Keep doing it.
hash_46ae71cb1d2803f9: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I once heard a Celtic vampire story about a bloodsucking dwarf. Any relation?
hash_46cb768320c95bc8: @/‹Q~”ŽcÝdĹ8õ“řYĚý∂xŕí@Ģ§ÄcŌMqÁéwjĢ<Ä ŻŔs?<=4s :=06s*<&s2=7s?:''?6sS02rlett were this close with one another?
hash_46d2c87cade41a0a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I knew an escapologist who loved stuff like this. Did for him in the end... He just forgot to escape.
hash_46e95edb863bb5c9: ^1Narrator: ^7The undead come in many varieties, each with their own unique behaviors.   This one's a catalyst zombie.
hash_46fa0a51bf9d6b7e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You think you scare me, ya moanin' sacks of shit?! You keep comin', I'll keep gunnin'! POW! POW! POW!
hash_46fa0b51bf9d6d31: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Yes! A small moment in which I may catch my breath. The good news is that the enemy are not terribly bright. The bad news: they appear to be dead already...
hash_47022d98537dd9ee: ^1Bruno: ^7I bet she is not beautiful now. I bet she looks like tenderized beef...    That went rotten...    And was chewed by a stray dog.
hash_4714f87cb68749ac: ^1Godfrey: ^7Fall back, Brigadier! Those ghouls are not here to salute you.
hash_4714fb7cb6874ec5: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't let 'em pen you in, sir!
hash_471ca59153482530: ^1Diego: ^7Okay, I suppose I should do my share to 'carry the load'.
hash_471ca691534826e3: ^1Bruno: ^7All things in life find their  purpose. This one will be no different.
hash_471cac9153483115: ^1Shaw: ^7What is this? Is it rare? Is it valuable? Can I sell it?
hash_471da16d5cb1956c: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to the Forest
hash_4722d31b7e5b0240: ^1Shaw: ^7I hadn't heard that much screaming and moaning and slobbering since I rented that flat above a brothel.
hash_4722d81b7e5b0abf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Out of your misery. That makes one of us.
hash_4722d91b7e5b0c72: ^1Bruno: ^7No more will you claw and scratch at Bruno's precious 'Delacroixs.'
hash_47342387763f9ae6: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I could do that all day long.
hash_4736bd8d4813fcb8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I once shot a man just for snorin'. Keep up that moanin' crap and see what ya get!
hash_4736c08d481401d1: ^1Godfrey: ^7Once again, I am the unsung hero. No one sees what I do.
hash_4740fb8ebd623f7e: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, man--! My eyes are watering so bad I cannot see...!
hash_4740fe8ebd624497: ^1Shaw: ^7Woo-eee. That's left me a bit light headed. Well, more than usual.
hash_47605a6212623d48: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett should have made it more clear that *some assembly* would be required.
hash_47605f62126245c7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Have I got all three pieces yet? I can't remember...?
hash_476060621262477a: ^1Bruno: ^7If Mademoiselle Rhodes' passion is anything like Alistair's, this is a fine invention.
hash_476061621262492d: ^1Diego: ^7The Senorita should take better care of her equipment. Anyone could grab this from here.
hash_4762da8e5c48b2a1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I'm going through bullets like Taft goes through pork chops.
hash_47761c91127e17d9: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Am I supposed to have a license for this thing?

hash_477d872c90c8ff87: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Reckon I could bring down a twister with this.
hash_478cc1c031e2d665: ^1Shaw: ^7If you want to do the rest for me, I won't stop you.
hash_478d46f192bd87eb: ^1Bruno: ^7I am impressed, Scarlett. Few women possess such skill.
hash_478d4cf192bd921d: ^1Shaw: ^7I think your Dad would almost - probably - be proud!
hash_479945e0de647308: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Evelyn! I do know how to deal with the neighbors!
hash_47994be0de647d3a: ^1Bruno: ^7I gain nothing by allowing you to get closer to me - Monstre!
hash_47994ce0de647eed: ^1Diego: ^7I give you - One last kiss.    And they say romance is dead.
hash_47aecf9438c67cb0: ^1Shaw: ^7Look - You got blood on me!     You'd better not be carrying the pox.
hash_47aed69438c68895: ^1Diego: ^7I don't know if you wished to be buried at sea... But that is how it is.
hash_47c0b9dea93d28a0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Go on and keep lookin' down your nose at me. You earned it.
hash_47c0badea93d2a53: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Let me know if you ever need a letter of recommendation.
hash_47d0ce7f98134731: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Red-hot musket balls! That's what's on the menu tonight.

hash_482b58d9709d6e37: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Get lit, ya bunch of wankers!
hash_482d0d4c7ce8999e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You know, Christina, I had you pegged as a bit of a dirty puzzle. Just another dollymop with a proud set of Cupid's kettledrums. But now? I'd proudly call you my chuckaboo.
hash_483d09016f8df307: ^1Diego: ^7For now, this will certainly save my skin. But later?     Who knows.
hash_4875d2623276a1c8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Feels like the walls are closing in.
hash_4875d4623276a52e: ^1Godfrey: ^7As per usual, it seems I'm surrounded by idiots.
hash_487c27c0691d0ee8: ^1Bruno: ^7That elixir does not sit well on my stomach.
hash_487c28c0691d109b: ^1Diego: ^7Gracias for the power boost, Chemist. No gracias for the flavor.
hash_4881bfeecd1d0bd9: ^1Shaw: ^7That sounded a lot 'wetter' than an explosion really should.
hash_4881c0eecd1d0d8c: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, come on! I got some of it in my mouth. Serves me right for cheering.
hash_48a2dd2fe2cd4229: ^1Scarlett: ^7Give a minute - got to let my head clear.      What the hell was in that??
hash_48a921f4205f5ade: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Cross my palm with silver, I cross ghouls off my list.
hash_48adb631bfad990d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hmm. *smacks lips* Suitable for stripping paint, I'd say.

hash_48b3770094ef0b8c: gįH”≤íŗßę'ĖXhose eyes. Those awful, beady eyes...
hash_48b3790094ef0ef2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Stay back, parasite! Brigadier blood is too good for the likes of you.
hash_48b37a0094ef10a5: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Bat-ghouls. I'll never get used to 'em.
hash_48ce1705a1ad94d3: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been legless myself on more than one occasion - but never literally.
hash_48ce1a05a1ad99ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've seen this sort of groveling before. Wasn't attractive then, and it sure as shit ain't now.
hash_48ce1c05a1ad9d52: ^1Diego: ^7Still hungry down there? Ask nicely, and Diego will serve you a Boot-Heel Surprise.
hash_48ce1d05a1ad9f05: ^1Bruno: ^7Reminds me of the Foreign Legion hospital in Tangier - The 'stump factory,' we called it.
hash_48e6f0ff72fad5b3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn right I just punched your freaking ticket!
hash_48e70ddc3d1ffa96: ^1Shaw: ^7The thing was dead before, but its definitely more dead now. Deadier.
hash_48e70fdc3d1ffdfc: ^1Bruno: ^7I'm saying nothing, Diego - Your ego is inflated enough.
hash_48e712dc3d200315: ^1Scarlett: ^7That one looked surprised! I was  too.
hash_491f1ee967f86918: ^1Bruno: ^7For the dead, the Ray of Life brings only peace.
hash_491f1fe967f86acb: ^1Diego: ^7This weapon cleanses evil, cucos, so I have some bad news...
hash_491f24e967f8734a: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't you see? We are healing you! Healing you to death, sure, but still...
hash_493e3559bc6ed5d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair told me about you Bruno, but I'm a little surprised he never once used the term 'Brute'.
hash_493e3859bc6edaec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Keep it up, Bruno! These sons of bitches deserve every vicious thing you could possibly deal out.
hash_493e3a59bc6ede52: ^1Diego: ^7Does your merciless brutality come naturally Bruno, or was it something you learned?
hash_4943926cb11f9598: ^1Godfrey: ^7Mm. Looks about right for a middle-aged manservant with fallen arches.
hash_4943946cb11f98fe: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This looks deadly enough, but, zounds, what an ugly weapon.
hash_4943956cb11f9ab1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Little gun like this, might be perfect on horseback.

hash_49637b0700fcdc5c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I like you, Mirela, no matter what everyone else says about you.
hash_49637d0700fcdfc2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well done, young lady. Sorry I ever doubted you.
hash_49637e0700fce175: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You sure know how to look after a fella.
hash_49667e9ae20c6000: ^1Scarlett: ^7If that's what's in your stomach, I don't wanna know what's in the rest of ya.
hash_4966809ae20c6366: ^1Diego: ^7You should really chew your food more...
hash_4966819ae20c6519: ^1Bruno: ^7Oh... that is disgusting. Have you no class?
hash_4966839ae20c687f: ^1Shaw: ^7That right there is why moderation is important.
hash_497411c95ddd0009: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Tinned, dark and handsome to the rescue!
hash_497e2dc04c7073fb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Come on, Hammer, let's nail some freaks.
hash_497e2ec04c7075ae: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not believe in Valhalla...but I can be convinced.
hash_497e30c04c707914: ^1Shaw: ^7They couldn't make this bastard just little lighter...?
hash_4987c30f399af21c: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Right between the eyes! You settling old scores, Godfrey?
hash_498f16f1ee96fb41: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, yes -- I think I've got it now. You require...sacrifices.    Okay! Be right back!
hash_498f17f1ee96fcf4: ^1Diego: ^7You need payment? I have no money.     But perhaps we could work something out...
hash_498f18f1ee96fea7: ^1Bruno: ^7You want money? Porquoi? What need do you have for money?
hash_498f19f1ee97005a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Son of a bitch! If I die because I didn't have enough nickels for Satan's vending machine...
hash_49a7ac81527b546b: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not understand this... La Magie.     Though perhaps trying to understand is a mistake.
hash_49a7ad81527b561e: ^1Scarlett: ^7ABOUT TIME! Here's our chance to nab some decent firepower!
hash_49a7b281527b5e9d: ^1Shaw: ^7Weapons are on sale! Dirt cheap too!    Can anyone spare me a few shillings?
hash_49ae7cd381b54a35: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's right I just punched your freaking ticket!
hash_49b9aefc827350b6: ^1Shaw: ^7I know you'd do the same for me, Bruno. In fact, I think you have already.
hash_49b9b1fc827355cf: ^1Diego: ^7You will walk once more, Frenchman -  knowing I have saved you.
hash_49b9b3fc82735935: ^1Scarlett: ^7I take it you ran in to a BIG one, right Bruno?
hash_49c05a35dbf5adc3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Diego looks to be in trouble. I Bet he's just thrilled.
hash_49c05b35dbf5af76: ^1Bruno: ^7Diego does not need to fight harder. He needs to fight smarter.     Right now he looks stupid.
hash_49c05d35dbf5b2dc: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm just going to watch how Diego deals with this. Maybe I'll pick up a few tips.
hash_49dbe69595573443: ^1Diego: ^7The Scepter of Ra has reached a new power level.
hash_49dbe895955737a9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Whoa. The Scepter's buzzing like it learned a new trick.
hash_49dbeb9595573cc2: ^1Shaw: ^7Whoa. I could swear the Scepter's built up an even more power charge.
hash_49e95c41957b243c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My blade is pure, my aim is true!
hash_49e95d41957b25ef: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7It ain't the knife, but the man who wields it. Okay, this time it's the knife.
hash_49e95e41957b27a2: ^1Godfrey: ^7Cut down by British silver. How apropos.
hash_49e9e15156adc374: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7The Chakrams demand Vengeance...! Can I have a volunteer from the audience...?
hash_49ee97c5ef394023: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hey, that tickles my nose! Great. Now I can't smell anything...
hash_49f348163c230d04: ^1Godfrey: ^7If this buys me another minute of life it's worth it.
hash_49f34b163c23121d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Now all I need's a whiskey chaser.
hash_49f68d080b1f72a0: ^1Shaw: ^7Well, this is cathartic, if nothing else!
hash_49f692080b1f7b1f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Odin's pinch hitter has got a mean swing!
hash_49f694080b1f7e85: ^1Diego: ^7Oh, I could get used to this!
hash_4a17ad3fe8114218: ^1The Brigadier: ^7These mindless wretches can't get enough of my Viper.
hash_4a17ae3fe81143cb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Once you get bit, you stay bit!
hash_4a17af3fe811457e: ^1Godfrey: ^7A whip-sword that spits razors. Truly, this night knows no end of wonders.
hash_4a27a90b85ec3256: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Dammit, I was just getting the hang of this! And what is up with this gun?! This peashooter is literally adding insult to injury. You screamin' sacks of shit better hope nobody gets me back on my feet! Hint, hint, fellas: I'm not gonna last down here forever...
hash_4a4a8ab42079136d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7It's official: this party is ending with fireworks.
hash_4a593d832c89d29b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Don't worry, I won't tell nobody how I saved your skinny butt.
hash_4a64da5221b8a1d0: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Alistair's bedroom. Something tells me this place has seen less action than a church on a Tuesday morning.
hash_4a72d90596b08743: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like I was just turned inside out.
hash_4a72da0596b088f6: ^1Bruno: ^7I have only felt that sensation once before... a moment from death.
hash_4a72db0596b08aa9: ^1Diego: ^7...there are bad hangovers, then there's whatever that was.
hash_4a76b98cb5035694: ^1The Brigadier: ^7If nothing else, I've seen the future of warfare tonight.
hash_4a76ba8cb5035847: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Come on, Li'l Sure-shot. Let's put on a show.
hash_4a76bb8cb50359fa: ^1Godfrey: ^7Perfect for small garden parties and house-to-house combat.

hash_4acb8f517fd20401: ^1Shaw: ^7Why are you all so drawn to me? Do you think I have something for you?!
hash_4acb90517fd205b4: ^1Diego: ^7Ha ha. It is amusing that you think your numbers pose any kind of threat to me.
hash_4acb91517fd20767: ^1Bruno: ^7Your numbers only give me more opportunity to work out my aggression.
hash_4acb92517fd2091a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're lucky I don't throw your rotten asses overboard.
hash_4adb4ee2a021cc5f: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to get Bat Chaos Material
hash_4ade643f6fd12eb7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair once said he'd run afoul of a "secret society." I thought he was referring to the ladies of the night, but I guess he meant it literally.
hash_4ae26a56618d6f1a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hammer's buzzin' like crazy. What's it gonna do now?
hash_4ae26b56618d70cd: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Yes, Hammer, I haven't forgotten you.
hash_4ae859981530a09e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Oh, lovely-jubbly. I'm feeling much better now.
hash_4aed57daaf1f29fc: ^1Diego: ^7My shield is gone! Just when we were starting to get to know each other.
hash_4aed58daaf1f2baf: ^1Bruno: ^7Many things are broken. My shield was just the latest in a long line...
hash_4aed59daaf1f2d62: ^1Scarlett: ^7That shield probably saved my ass more times than I realize.
hash_4af81d41adb12cf9: ^1Bruno: ^7Hey Mexicain! Be careful you do not slip upon the blood of your enemies!
hash_4af81f41adb1305f: ^1Shaw: ^7Why can't I be all brave and macho like that? I should have a serious word with myself.
hash_4b0db9db8c82d9bc: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just don't say,"Cheers, mate." I'm sick to death of hearin' that one.
hash_4b0dbcdb8c82ded5: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm not much of a medic, but then again I shan't try to saw off your leg.
hash_4b0e3c6ede1a9cc3: ^1Godfrey: ^7Remarkable. I can actually feel the energy of the Viper and Dragon.
hash_4b0e3d6ede1a9e76: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hunh. I could swear the Dragon an' Viper got somethin' new up their sleeve.
hash_4b0e3e6ede1aa029: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Ooh -- I'll have to give the Viper and Dragon another go.
hash_4b175abbf4adfb9d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This thing's as big as I am.
hash_4b17cde4875e00e4: ^1Narrator: ^7Oh dear. Bruno's in a bit of trouble. Grab that 'Nuke' power-up. It'll buy you some time to get him up on his feet.
hash_4b193b8ff863c420: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I feel like the Angel of Death!
hash_4b1aaf9818dfd8b6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Aw, no. Tell me that gal can't see me down here on my ass, with this broke-dick excuse for a pistol. Hell, it's what I deserve -- all those years prancin' around on stage, pretendin' to be Wild Bill Hickock's long-lost bastard son... Well, I got the bastard part down, anyhow.
hash_4b1ab09818dfda69: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Thunderation! I suppose it was only a matter of time before this tired old back and these creaky joints betrayed me. But, by Jove, it's been one hell of a night! Spitting in the eye of pure evil, brave and truehearted friends at my side... Well, if this be the end, it's infinitely preferable to the living death I've wallowed in since I retired.
hash_4b204b56188941b0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Good man, Godfrey. No one better at taking out the trash.
hash_4b204c5618894363: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Remind me never to piss off that Butler.
hash_4b28ca56d751f5c0: ^1Godfrey: ^7That's what we do to trespassers around here.
hash_4b28cc56d751f926: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Watch me batty-fang every last one of these blighters!
hash_4b28cd56d751fad9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I sure wish Buffalo Bill could see this. He'd be prouder than a dog with two peckers.
hash_4b38e33518593dbf: ^1Scarlett: ^7This wouldn't be here if it wasn't meant for me... is how I justify taking this.
hash_4b38e53518594125: ^1Diego: ^7This 'could' have value. If not, I will give it to the Frenchman.
hash_4b52539e7c1c576a: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not going to ask how this happened, Bruno - but I'm guessing you put up a good fight!
hash_4b6850dc54adbd00: ^1The Brigadier: ^7No, Godfrey, you're earning your keep tonight. By Jove, I'd swear you trained for combat.
hash_4b8bdd204cad3c7c: ^1Diego: ^7...He does know those things trying to kill him are real, right?
hash_4b8bde204cad3e2f: ^1Bruno: ^7Close your good eye Shaw - They might think you are one of them.
hash_4b90d27c34e14b21: ^1Ghost: ^7I'm going to do you one last favor, Christina Fowler. Don't waste it.
hash_4b985e2db03e273c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't go startin' somethin' you can't finish.
hash_4b985f2db03e28ef: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Keep your thrice-damned daddles off me!
hash_4b98612db03e2c55: ^1Godfrey: ^7You're all the same -- take, take, take, and nary a "thank you."
hash_4b9a3c9f65626129: ^1Ghost: ^7You're not what you claim to be, are you...Christina? Don't worry, we all do it. Why, Mr. Dixon and I said we were brother and sister, just so Mrs Soames would rent us a room.
hash_4bb8334a155e7409: ^1Diego: ^7Keep calm. Keep firing. Do not let them win...
hash_4bb8344a155e75bc: ^1Shaw: ^7Gah! My heart--! It...    ...feels better than it has in years!
hash_4beb10678533accf: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Gaze into the Stone
hash_4c02f36d1ba0834b: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh. You got him right in the Gigglemug, Scarlett!
hash_4c02f86d1ba08bca: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, very impressive, Scarlett.     But can you do it again... And again?... And Again?
hash_4c02f96d1ba08d7d: ^1Bruno: ^7My former recruits could have learned a few things from Mademoiselle Rhodes.

hash_4c5fdd11e5005a2b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You trying to outshine me, Yank?
hash_4c72ad86776e139f: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, if I've been press-ganged into battle, at least I've been properly armed.
hash_4c72ae86776e1552: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Got me some Manifest Destiny to dish out.
hash_4c72af86776e1705: ^1The Brigadier: ^7These guns may lack an artful flourish, but firepower has a beauty all its own.
hash_4c846f2a2ea3e7c4: ^1Godfrey: ^7Presenting Lord and Lady Viper and Dragon. You shall not enjoy meeting them.
hash_4c84712a2ea3eb2a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is my whip-sword, this is my gun. One is for killing, one is for, well... they're both for killing!
hash_4c84722a2ea3ecdd: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Dealer's choice, slackjaws. Got my wild cards right here.
hash_4c88d46c925a9f7d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Scepter of Ra, what have you got for me now?
hash_4c8a7bfd6edd9550: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7"Bludgeon." Such a funny word for "bash your brains out."
hash_4c9073b38af92fac: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I thought you'd look better dead, but.... Sorry, no.  Still ugly as sin.
hash_4c9075b38af93312: ^1Godfrey: ^7Do you know why you had to die?  Here's a hint:  the other ghouls wear trousers.
hash_4ca26a174da9031a: ^1Narrator: ^7Running out of ammo isn't something you want to happen in Zombies. Bad things tend to follow.
hash_4cabcfe3c0f4d763: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ya got a good head on your shoulders, Brigadier. That ghoul? Not so much.
hash_4cbe66619320bae4: ^1Narrator: ^7Now you know how to use your weapons, try to clear out the zombies in this room.
hash_4cc4146339e176f0: ^1Diego: ^7Thank you, Scarlett. Now you say, 'De nada.'    And I do mean nada.
hash_4cc4156339e178a3: ^1Bruno: ^7Not my first time being saved by a member of the Rhodes Family.    Merci.
hash_4cc41b6339e182d5: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I must've tripped on something. Terribly sorry to cause a fuss.
hash_4cc48c5b33f92eb2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Want to say something witty about me hitting like a girl? Didn't think so.
hash_4cca214c38c53f3a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7It's one damned thing after another. Literally.
hash_4cf723838b81d27b: ^1Diego: ^7Someone is running a scam. Were I not on the receiving end, I think I might actually admire it.
hash_4cfe183e7ae6f68e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Nice place for a picnic. Long as we're not what's for lunch.
hash_4d37a958bd1c00ce: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh that's Marvellous! Absolutely first class. Thank you so much.
hash_4d37ab58bd1c0434: ^1Bruno: ^7Soldiers deserve the best weaponry available. It is only right.
hash_4d37ac58bd1c05e7: ^1Diego: ^7A more powerful weapon? I can think of no one who deserves it more than I!
hash_4d37ae58bd1c094d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not sure I want to know what's going on the other side of this 'portal'...
hash_4d41e13b6cb951ba: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I keep wondering if Mr. Rhodes asked us here to turn us into wormfood, or if someone else forged our invitations.
hash_4d45ec3512dd8310: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Never been much of a gun person, but I'm changing my ways.
hash_4d74f20ff67f38dd: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Was this the hammer of Thor? Or am I just a big storm?
hash_4d85234926d4fa07: ^1Godfrey: ^7It's a wonder it didn't take off my hand.
hash_4d85244926d4fbba: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Look at that thing bounce around like a cue ball! Eight-ghoul, corner pocket!
hash_4d85254926d4fd6d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Astonishing! It seeks them out like a rat-catching hound!
hash_4dc83a2b1d274b90: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7It's true! Sunlight IS the best disinfectant!

hash_4e0bb437dc2fcce8: bS02!?6''isd\a;: s$<&?7s4<<d for breaking stuff down in the junk yard.
hash_4e0bb637dc2fd04e: ^1Diego: ^7It is rather unwieldy... And I speak as a great fan of wielding.
hash_4e0bb737dc2fd201: ^1Bruno: ^7I am familiar with overkill. This is not overkill.
hash_4e0bb937dc2fd567: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh boy, I'm about to give those beasts a proper thrashing!
hash_4e0d2fcad76f8083: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Gird you loins, man. The battle rages on.
hash_4e0ee97ffcbd2997: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you hear that?     I did! Sounds a tad ominous, doesn't it?    Yes! Very!
hash_4e0f1f83094dc37c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Who wants some of Gideon's medicine stick?
hash_4e0f2083094dc52f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Let's see if I can't shed some light on this situation...
hash_4e1403b275eac2b8: ^1Diego: ^7I will take no pleasure in this... Other than the parts I enjoy.
hash_4e1404b275eac46b: ^1Bruno: ^7In days gone by, I would have relished such power.
hash_4e140ab275eace9d: ^1Shaw: ^7With this power, I could erase ALL my enemies from the world!    I better get a move on - I've got a list as long as your arm.
hash_4e21678c5d28d028: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7Do you really believe that, Godfrey?
hash_4e22fa6fbdcb24c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7This day, this week, this whole month better not get any worse.
hash_4e30322d5f2a2a4c: ^1Narrator: ^7Craftable items like this are just waiting to be found all over a Zombies map.  You can keep track of what you've collected on the Inventory Screen.
hash_4e339ae31cbcd988: ^1Bruno: ^7At least when you attack as a horde, you will not suffer the indignity of dying alone.
hash_4e339be31cbcdb3b: ^1Diego: ^7Normally, I welcome attention and adoration - but you do not look like my usual admirers.
hash_4e339de31cbcdea1: ^1Scarlett: ^7In about 5 seconds, you're gonna lose something you care about.
hash_4e33a0e31cbce3ba: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not afraid. Not even when death is staring down at me like a big eyeball.
hash_4e45c295a14b62e4: ^1Diego: ^7Oh bueno, let me just walk around with a bomb on my shoulder. Perfectly safe.
hash_4e49e37fbbb95378: ^1Scarlett: ^7That went exactly as planned. Yep - I totally planned that way.
hash_4e49e57fbbb956de: ^1Diego: ^7Si... Now that is what I like to hear.
hash_4e49e87fbbb95bf7: ^1Shaw: ^7That actually worked? Is that good? It is?? are you sure?    YES! I knew it!
hash_4e595a7d720e162b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tell me you don't need help Bruno -  I'd be pretty damn disappointed if you did.
hash_4e595c7d720e1991: ^1Diego: ^7I must confess, I am eager to witness just how violent Bruno can become.
hash_4e595d7d720e1b44: ^1Shaw: ^7You know Bruno - It's probably best not to let yourself get surrounded. Didn't they teach you that at... soldier school?
hash_4e62cc417be9c6d5: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I almost feel sorry for the poor souls.
hash_4e7f88fa333fde04: ^1Scarlett: ^7I will kill each and everyone of you dead-brain creeps with my fingernails if I have to!

hash_4ea0b4675aa0c89f: ^1Godfrey: ^7It seems I can do something right.
hash_4ea0b5675aa0ca52: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just like my schoolmarm taught me.
hash_4ea6d78e64668116: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Beware the Dragon's breath! The Dragon does not floss, so... it won't be nice!
hash_4eb560e76706b594: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Feels like the Scepter a bit extra-ready this time.

hash_4f017fdcaa70c563: ^1Diego: ^7Why do I suddenly feel like I ate the gusano? Shaw... what was in that medicine?
hash_4f0181dcaa70c8c9: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ta, Stanton. Now how about we focus on finishing this?
hash_4f0e0b1edda04fad: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You're running out of elbow room, Godfrey!
hash_4f10e677a45b256e: ^1Bruno: ^7A team is only as strong as its weakest member...     We should help Shaw.
hash_4f10e777a45b2721: ^1Diego: ^7Do not feel ashamed. We all - well, most of us - make mistakes.
hash_4f10e877a45b28d4: ^1Shaw: ^7I'll have you back on your feet in two shakes of a lamb's tail.
hash_4f2d559ef524ce38: ^1Diego: ^7You seem so familiar...    Dios Mio. Lady McKendrick?? Is that you??
hash_4f2d569ef524cfeb: ^1Bruno: ^7I will pull that tongue from your throat, monstre!
hash_4f2d579ef524d19e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm getting real tired of this guy's pug-ugly mug.
hash_4f2d5c9ef524da1d: ^1Shaw: ^7I see my ex-wife has graced us with her presence again...
hash_4f2f1ff28207c069: ^1Shaw: ^7Time to balance the scales of life and death.
hash_4f324e5ba07d69c3: ^1Godfrey: ^7Yes! You killed me in a dream, I kill you right here, right now!
hash_4f324f5ba07d6b76: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I heard folks over here had funny teeth, but you make 'em look normal.
hash_4f32505ba07d6d29: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Brigadier General Jonathan Warwick: vampire hunter!
hash_4f366b573ae9aa48: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Romanians have a word for these bloodsuckers: "Nosferatu." I think it means...bloodsucker.
hash_4f366c573ae9abfb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn, those bat-people have some messed-up legs, and...is that a tail I see? Better be a tail.
hash_4f366d573ae9adae: ^1Godfrey: ^7Someone should teach these Nosferatu proper posture.
hash_4f439ea0bec38e80: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Yank's a bit of a show-off.
hash_4f43a0a0bec391e6: ^1Godfrey: ^7Mr. Jones is putting on quite the sharpshooting display.
hash_4f594cb49dea2ed7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Naw, that's just a story for the punters. I swear, they eat that stuff up with a silver spoon.
hash_4f836a6ff2e57048: ^1Scarlett: ^7Smells like burnt dogshit, but worth it!
hash_4f836c6ff2e573ae: ^1Diego: ^7I was told to only use this 'for good.'    Look at all the good I'm doing!

hash_4f95a9591d5b418c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I've taken quite a shine to our fortune teller. As the Yanks like to say, that girl has moxie.
hash_4f95aa591d5b433f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Stick it in, and you never know what you'll pull out. Reminds me of that cathouse in Yankton.
hash_4fa3a6f7c6d884e0: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, they did promise fireworks on this cruise...
hash_4fa3a7f7c6d88693: ^1Diego: ^7My eyebrows had better still be there! Have you no respect?
hash_4fa3acf7c6d88f12: ^1Shaw: ^7Come now, I'm already half burned. All you meatheads need to do is finish the job.
hash_4fc7605ebcc1370a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Woo! Quite a jolt from my Chakrams. You got something special this time around?
hash_4fcb2a39f4663196: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7That blood you're tasting? That's your own.
hash_4fe47a8118bfe554: ^1Diego: ^7You know what? I'm worried about you. I think you're loco Shaw.     Do you hear me? LOCO!    L.O.C.O.
hash_4feff8a86f2de82e: ^1Scarlett: ^7They keep coming... crawling out of every damn corner.   We need to figure out a plan before we're all shredded.
hash_4ff1330f29101e00: ^1Shaw: ^7Weapon's almost empty!     Just just not your day is it, Shaw?     No, it certainly is not.
hash_4ff13a0f291029e5: ^1Diego: ^7Running low on ammo is never a good thing. Unless you're selling it for a profit.
hash_4ff4f430e9f3ade1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You really need to file those nails.
hash_4ff8737e81c7e4dc: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Come on, Mirela. It ain't time to join your spirit pals yet.
hash_4ff8747e81c7e68f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7What sort of gentleman would I be if I just left you lying there?
hash_4ff8767e81c7e9f5: ^1Godfrey: ^7Allow me, Madame. To be honest, I fear I won't last long without you.
hash_5019831bd09eb786: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I declare, Miss Mirela, you sure know how to hold your own -- mowin' down screamers like pins in a shootin' gallery!
hash_501ce05f373bfce0: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw! Did you take something that's making you so angry?
hash_501ce25f373c0046: ^1Diego: ^7Has anyone noticed which eye Shaw uses when he takes aim?
hash_50205690f13cd194: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Sure was a funny lookin' peace pipe.
hash_50205790f13cd347: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Goodness me! I feel somehow energized!
hash_50205990f13cd6ad: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh dear, this is how it starts, isn't it? Next thing I know I'll crawling around Limehouse with the rest of addicts.
hash_502487b30e7c0720: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Pop! Rather like a party favor.
hash_502488b30e7c08d3: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Blew that stiff upper lip right off your shoulders.
hash_5047c79f49a5029e: ^1Shaw: ^7Bollocks! I think my shield just broke!
hash_5047c99f49a50604: ^1Bruno: ^7I did not need the shield anyway.
hash_5047ca9f49a507b7: ^1Diego: ^7Oh no. Once again, I am vulnerable to attacks from the rear.
hash_5047cc9f49a50b1d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I was hoping the shield would hold out for a little longer.

hash_50cdcf1d88f9abe8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just like city folk -- always pawin' at ya.
hash_50cdd01d88f9ad9b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I didn't survive the Boers and the Zulu to be brought down by you lot!
hash_50cdd21d88f9b101: ^1Godfrey: ^7Surely, there are more appetizing  things to eat than me.
hash_50e468fabc3917c0: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh! Feels like the Chakrams grew even stronger...
hash_50e46afabc391b26: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I feel you, my Chakrams. Do you have something new to show me?
hash_50e46bfabc391cd9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Chakrams are ready to saddle up.
hash_50e64ee4e7331884: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you worried, Shaw? You look worried. I would be if I were you.
hash_50e64fe4e7331a37: ^1Diego: ^7Maybe Shaw doesn't *want* help. Maybe he wants to die.
hash_50e651e4e7331d9d: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the fuck is he doing?     HEY SHAW! Those are REAL! You're NOT hallucinating!
hash_5108a6023143a39a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Godfrey! You are a man of hidden talents.
hash_5108a7023143a54d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7There you go, Godfrey! That's how we do it!
hash_511120a232c6fc5e: ^1Shaw: ^7I hope you find peace... Actually, that's not true. I hope you're suffering terribly.
hash_511122a232c6ffc4: ^1Bruno: ^7Were my mouth not so dry, I would spit on your corpse.
hash_511123a232c70177: ^1Diego: ^7Your first mistake was touching me. Your second - letting me find you.
hash_511125a232c704dd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't pick a fight you can't win - Case in point.
hash_51194085c1a281c8: ^1Diego: ^7AY! When I feel a spark, I have normally been given plenty of
hash_51194185c1a2837b: ^1Bruno: ^7It is a good thing that I inhale only for effect, not for aroma.
hash_51194785c1a28dad: ^1Shaw: ^7What was that? Give me minute...    Was there lithium in that?!

hash_5154f7ff3c5a37ba: ^1Scarlett: ^7So, Diego! You seem to see everything as a big dumb adventure. My Father's seemed to think you had a little more depth.   Why am I not seeing it right now?
hash_515555a56e0f7d2a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7It burns, right? Tell me it burns!
hash_5156cba6e1f0264e: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7Are you talking to me? Or to yourself?
hash_51639a68b146da0a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I've nothing but gullyfluff in my pockets.
hash_51639b68b146dbbd: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That's me: always a day late and a dollar short.
hash_516d2bf3593ae16a: ^1Godfrey: ^7I don't wish to pry, Madame, but are you really the daughter of a runaway princess?
hash_518d14eb34042613: ^1Godfrey: ^7I can feel it in my bones. We are almost free of this nightmare.
hash_5194fb0a9bd911fc: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't think too hard on it, Gideon. Just grab and shoot.
hash_5194fc0a9bd913af: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I always told Alistair this house was a money pit.
hash_5194fe0a9bd91715: ^1Godfrey: ^7How long can I keep this up?
hash_51b2ffea833b554c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I was looking for. This could literally save me.
hash_51b67213c236a86f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7No legs and it still won't shut up.
hash_51b67313c236aa22: ^1Godfrey: ^7Still coming? *sigh* A Butler's work is never enough.
hash_51cf4d35420e1df7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Thought I was dead there for a second! Ghostly tunnel...otherworldly light... But this sure isn't Heaven.
hash_51da409eb7cec7fd: ŲE-ÍĎeņ4FÕď+[j†a•ČõhģY ^1Narrator: ^7You really should grab that weapon. You won't last long with just a pistol.
hash_51e8d321ba291c72: ^1Narrator: ^7You really should grab that weapon. You won't last long with just a pistol.
hash_51ea1d5cccda8111: ^1Shaw: ^7It's okay to be angry, every now and again. But constantly? It's not good for anyone.
hash_51ea1e5cccda82c4: ^1Diego: ^7You don't really stop shouting, do you?    It's clear that you are not happy.
hash_51ea1f5cccda8477: ^1Bruno: ^7If I give you an order, will you follow it? Can you be a good soldier?
hash_51ea205cccda862a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just when I thought we'd seen the weirdest things this box has to offer... This pops out.

hash_51fa132c670332b8: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope Mademoiselle likes fire, because she is very close to the flame.
hash_51fa142c6703346b: ^1Diego: ^7Do you need some assistance, Scarlett? I am more than willing to step in.
hash_51fa192c67033cea: ^1Shaw: ^7Don't let them get too close, Scarlett! They may have the pox!
hash_52079e33cd464710: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's rough...      In all honesty, I'd rather lick pee off a nettle.
hash_521fbbfbb919d426: ^1Ghost: ^7Not the first time you've been dead, is it, Godfrey? That's why you've heard me before, going bump in the night. Dying left its mark on you. And that seldom ends well.
hash_5226bae8e5fcc616: ^1Shaw: ^7They attack in waves of ever increasing ferocity. Then there's a lull.     Like this one.     Then something worse happens.
hash_527f792b4531f65b: ^1Diego: ^7The walls in Mexico do not behave like this. We have normal walls there. Extra normal.
hash_527f7b2b4531f9c1: ^1Scarlett: ^7Who sets these prices? Who even makes these insane weapons?
hash_527f7e2b4531feda: ^1Shaw: ^7Right! I forgot that walls do this sometimes!
hash_52a1874289dc63c8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7What did I tell you? The sun never sets on me!
hash_52a1894289dc672e: ^1Godfrey: ^7If only I could burn them all at once.
hash_52a7fc95a373de48: ^1Bruno: ^7Feels like the Hammer is ready. The beatings shall now resume.
hash_52a7fd95a373dffb: ^1Diego: ^7The Hammer of Valhalla is ready to strike.
hash_52a7ff95a373e361: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like the Hammer of Valhalla is ready.
hash_52a80295a373e87a: ^1Shaw: ^7Hammer's all charged up, like a battery -- or lightning in a bottle.
hash_52af586bf5819970: ^1Shaw: ^7Ammunition mysteriously materializes. Inside my weapon. That's impossible. Unless... No.     That would require sulfur. And a lot of bananas...
hash_52af5e6bf581a3a2: ^1Bruno: ^7A resupply of munitions? Perhaps the turning of the tide is about to begin.
hash_52af5f6bf581a555: ^1Diego: ^7I would be a fool to look a gift horse in the mouth. I am no fool.
hash_52b482ff5a935e83: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like you had the fish for dinner!
hash_52b484ff5a9361e9: ^1Diego: ^7Ugh! What did you have for dinner, cuco?
hash_52b485ff5a93639c: ^1Shaw: ^7I control their gag reflex! I can induce vomit! I am a GOD!!
hash_52c58e7ba4279bda: ^1Diego: ^7The 'man' who took my medallion - the medallion that you had so carefully obscured by placing it so close to your bosom -
hash_52d8595e0e4d2c60: ^1Godfrey: ^7You there, dripping water everywhere! Could you at least try to avoid the Persian rugs?
hash_52d85b5e0e4d2fc6: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Can't say I like the look of that one -- skulking about like an East End cutpurse.
hash_52d85c5e0e4d3179: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That screamer just went all... "watery." Keep an eye on it.
hash_52f1cd77925ad37d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I'd lay a curse on ya, but what's the point?
hash_5302e9836cf3175f: ^1Ghost: ^7Come along, cowboy. Must I herd you like a sheep?
hash_530d3630554006ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7He did, yes. I thought he made that part up - his usual flim-flam.     So much of his work was delusional - Pointless.
hash_532dd1d8be5c3696: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Godfrey, if I didn't know you better I'd swear you're enjoying this!
hash_532dd2d8be5c3849: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn, Godfrey, you don't mess around!
hash_5336d097c1a1c991: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Damn, mutton-chops! What'd you have for breakfast?
hash_535885334c906845: ^1Narrator: ^7Not only does boarding up entrances slow them down, but you also earn a few more points. Now, let's move on.
hash_5359fd3c96e52ac8: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn! I was right to be scared of that thing.
hash_5359fe3c96e52c7b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That putrid pigmy eats ghouls for breakfast!
hash_535a003c96e52fe1: ^1Godfrey: ^7Very good, Master Homunculus. Please don't stop on my account.
hash_5366a3798b7803e8: ^1Godfrey: ^7Would this be a bad time to inquire about employment at your household?
hash_5366a6798b780901: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Get up, old man. You and me are goin' drinkin' after this.
hash_537cfb859868732d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Those "ghouls" have made an utter shambles of Alistair's fine house! I will not allow them do the same to us!

hash_5390729f21fd7b18: ^1Shaw: ^7So they wet ones strengthen the others. Makes sense -- from an alchemical standpoint.

hash_5390789f21fd854a: ^1Bruno: ^7Can you see how the icy ones empower the others? This has to stop!
hash_5390799f21fd86fd: ^1Diego: ^7The sneaky one strengthens its friends. See how it makes their eyes blue?
hash_5397396709971a2f: ^1Diego: ^7You may be looking in the wrong places, Scarlett. My flippancy and general lust for life are some of the qualities Senor Rhodes admired most about me.     I had hoped you would feel the same way.
hash_53a9b0e7b63be3e6: ^1Ghost: ^7Ever seen a child die? Sure you have, cowboy. You killed your share among the Cheyenne. Both of us have done things we're not proud of -- but it's that kind of world, isn't it?

hash_554f160db0c81743: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah, yes. More stuff for my big steaming  pile of stuff.
