hash_559db8899287c8ef: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Never gonna get used to that. Might grow to love it, but never used to it.
hash_55a3645cd7703f43: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Move it, Jeeves! Before they take a bite of your hors d'oeuvres!
hash_55a4f79f89428746: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ah...nectar of the gods. *coughs* Dogs. I meant nectar of the dogs.
hash_55a9ca709be87568: ^1Narrator: ^7You really should seal up that entrance.
hash_55ad6de76da2b006: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I do believe I've found my quartermaster.
hash_55ad6ee76da2b1b9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Round and round and round she goes...
hash_55add975c14d483b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Fuckers got claws like mountain lions!
hash_55adda75c14d49ee: ^1Godfrey: ^7I really have to watch my back. No one else will.
hash_55b69787329ca54a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Honestly? As in the no horse shit answer? I didn't know things would get this bad, but I knew I'd probably need some muscle. Hence... You know...     You.
hash_55bc4ac5e9c02fee: ^1Shaw: ^7Firesale?! Bloody firesale? What about the flood damage?!
hash_55bc4cc5e9c03354: ^1Bruno: ^7I once mad the mistake of purchasing rifles from a street vendor. They broke apart in my hands.     So did he.
hash_55bc4dc5e9c03507: ^1Diego: ^7When playing roulette, it is always more fun to play with someone else's chips.
hash_55bc4fc5e9c0386d: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is an opportunity. We should grab it with both hands!
hash_55c6724a102de30b: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, if I can bring down a creature like this, perhaps there is still hope.
hash_55c6734a102de4be: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Bite the ground, you dumb, ugly fuck!
hash_55c6744a102de671: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I may not always know what I'm doing, but, by Jove, I'll do it.
hash_55ca077df941589b: ^1Narrator: ^7Now let's get that doorway boarded back up.
hash_55cea1453a07e6ae: ^1Shaw: ^7Hey Bruno! That one just decided to have a lie down.
hash_55cea4453a07ebc7: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno! Are you trying to conserve ammunition? If so, it is good idea.
hash_55cea6453a07ef2d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm betting you trained your men very well in the Legion.
hash_55d1ce7f53a3aa4d: ^1Diego: ^7The Medallion belonged to Mia Madre. It was very precious to my family.    Anyway - once I realized that the order would kill for it, I gave it to Senor Rhodes.
hash_55e61507ab3d16d2: ^1Narrator: ^7Go on, use the Hammer. It can be very effective.
hash_56171e416b7f3cff: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, no. I swear I saw one of those ...bat-things in a nightmare...
hash_56171f416b7f3eb2: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7A half-pint vampire?! Now I've seen it all.
hash_561720416b7f4065: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A blood-sucking pigmy?! Is there no end to the beasts we must battle?
hash_562f30ec6f986c45: ^1Narrator: ^7Zombies progresses through ever more challenging rounds.   Kill all the zombies in one round, and a new one will begin.
hash_5635a029e88c2ac3: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»ĀSćņČ öĮ1†ćÝų”ĪĎ≠Ŗ¬ůPĖAŰ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm dying. It's over. And it's all your fault.
hash_563bae976088bd92: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm dying. It's over. And it's all your fault.
hash_56430a068a8ab688: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Seems my Viper and Dragon are givin' me the go-ahead.
hash_56430b068a8ab83b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Viper and Dragon feel primed for battle.
hash_56430d068a8abba1: ^1Godfrey: ^7The whip-sword and cannon appear to be ready for use.
hash_5647e01c5916cf54: ^1Ghost: ^7I'm as real as anything here, Brigadier. Olivia found that out the hard way.
hash_56659240bdd8a85c: ^1Diego: ^7Come out, my Chakrams, it is time to play.
hash_56659340bdd8aa0f: ^1Bruno: ^7This weapon comes from a faraway land, but revenge knows no borders.
hash_56659440bdd8abc2: ^1Scarlett: ^7I wonder if Father ever used these things.
hash_56741b61d9bb0383: ^1Scarlett: ^7Give a minute - got to let my head clear.      What was in that??
hash_567822ab2106a8ec: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I think my Hammer's ready to do some poundin'.
hash_567823ab2106aa9f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Hammer of Valhalla feels eager for battle.
hash_567825ab2106ae05: ^1Godfrey: ^7My hammer longs for battle. Don't ask me how I know this.
hash_568d65695d0a7f11: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ta, Sir Knight! Now smite a few more!
hash_56a48dd301f09c1c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I scare myself sometimes. I really do.
hash_56a48fd301f09f82: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A fine bit of nanty narking this is!
hash_56a490d301f0a135: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Like shootin' fish in a barrel. Rotten fish in a haunted barrel...
hash_56a98092726e91ad: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7They're everywhere. We gotta hunker down, circle the wagons, and try to find ourselves a way out.
hash_56c14d232c033102: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I've met some fellas who can fight on the run with one of these. I hate those guys.
hash_56c14e232c0332b5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is like bringing a bloody howitzer to a knife fight.
hash_56cd31b1191871a2: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7If I'm gonna die with my boots on, I'll do it standin', thank you.
hash_56cd32b119187355: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I have no fear of the Great Beyond, but I think I'll take a few more with me.
hash_56d4f8b54579b153: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7The Spirits have spoken! After eons, we finally have our answer -- there is life after death! And it smells like rotten eggs.
hash_56d9993bc07a0a5e: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly - I was going to do that!     I just hadn't gotten around to it yet.
hash_56d99b3bc07a0dc4: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter how much we try to fortify our defenses, this vessel is no fortress.
hash_56d99e3bc07a12dd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Any reason they can't always do that?
hash_56de0aef2ee28186: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Gideon's showing us how it's done.
hash_56df35fe5b240861: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Monsters everywhere, and yet here I am wondering if that cowboy has a girl back home.
hash_5704807400abae18: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7What do you get when you shoot a ghoul with the Dragon? You get ghoul all over the walls, and the floor, and your hair...
hash_5712ed7af0d2a1a9: ^1Shaw: ^7Little sniff to straighten the body... and the mind...    Wait - how did I get here??! Am I on a boat??! Is that the fucking ocean??!
hash_5712ee7af0d2a35c: ^1Diego: ^7Is it supposed to smell like that?!
hash_5712ef7af0d2a50f: ^1Bruno: ^7Ahhhhh yes. I enjoyed that. Very much.
hash_5712f07af0d2a6c2: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, that's got my engine throbbing.      I could run around the deck for hours.
hash_57199fcd31c6149a: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! Think I blew out an ear drum!
hash_57204523f048be7f: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm out! That is the proper verbiage, yes?
hash_57204623f048c032: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Show's over. 'Least till I scare up some fresh bullets.
hash_57204723f048c1e5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Anyone seen a cartridge box around here? No? Fuck me.
hash_5720c0eb7ca8b442: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like the Engine room's still operational... but what is powering it?
hash_5722ef2256998dbf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, I'm still in this, still in one piece. Emily Post might not approve, but that old skank wouldn't last ten seconds here.
hash_572e8de2803ccbd0: ^1Godfrey: ^7I do have some experience as a Milliner... I just need to take some head measurements.
hash_572e8fe2803ccf36: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The Hammer of Valhalla, eh? Well, at least I'll be in good company when this is all over.
hash_572e90e2803cd0e9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Y'all ever heard of a home run? Allow me to demonstrate.
hash_5733c88fb609c18a: ķu%™2≤rQÔőė[ę[™k•ÄąŘģ= bē”ŤųWďĶéżH„Ö-Z¨ĮB++e. There must be more to it.
hash_573e70ac9f5c5c7d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Cor! Somebody open a window! That is the worst thing I *gags* ever smelled--!
hash_576a2485c35fb128: ^1Ghost: ^7So did you serve with Lord Cornelius in the Raj? Come to check on his health, have you? Just mind you stay out of my way. Said he'd put me in the will, he did.
hash_578d8b618344c550: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Guess what, screamers? Judgment day is here.
hash_578d8c618344c703: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Beware my wrath, you mindless mutton-mongers!
hash_578d8e618344ca69: ^1Godfrey: ^7Should I be wearing rubber gloves for this?
hash_57911b5e3ea5c4c4: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7The spirits are pleased with you, Brigadier. And by spirits, I mostly mean me.
hash_5794ef0d37b9a49f: ^1Scarlett: ^7As a kid I believed my father's stories. As an adult I believed him full of it.     Now I don't know what to believe.
hash_57a92323d492a43c: ^1Narrator: ^7This is a zombie. You should kill it.
hash_57b0b27591529387: ^1Godfrey: ^7If I had any sense I'd crawl in that armor myself.
hash_57b0b3759152953a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Step lively, big man. There's killin' to be done.
hash_57b0b475915296ed: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Once you slay some ghouls...do you mind if I try that on?
hash_57b433bac43a63f7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Come on, mutton-chops, don't die on me. I got a nice aunt I wanna introduce you to.
hash_57c8469fa2acac1f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Where'd that little bloke come from? The one with the fangs.
hash_57cae03912ad328d: ^1Ghost: ^7Ever find a small bottle around here? Colchicum, the label says. You'll want to be careful with it. Sometimes it's a thin line between medicine and poison.
hash_57dc099e146e96b8: ^1Bruno: ^7I seek no payment for my actions.    I seek only my own survival.
hash_57dc0c9e146e9bd1: ^1Scarlett: ^7It may not be much, but it's something.
hash_57dc0f9e146ea0ea: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Evelyn?? I am a rich man! A rich man indeed!
hash_57e84fccf4c111cf: ^1Godfrey: ^7Perhaps you could head for higher ground, Mr. Jones?
hash_57e851ccf4c11535: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Careful boy, or they'll drag you down like bloody hyenas!
hash_57f351c647fff0e0: ^1Scarlett: ^7What, you think you look scarier with only one arm?   You're right.
hash_57f353c647fff446: ^1Diego: ^7If your arm offends thee, cut it off.' That is the quote, yes?     Well, it offended me, amigo.
hash_57f354c647fff5f9: ^1Bruno: ^7Quoi? I aimed for its head, not its arm!
hash_57f356c647fff95f: ^1Shaw: ^7What is the sound of one hand clapping?    No, seriously, now's our big chance to find out!
hash_57f863c02cc12c78: ^1Godfrey: ^7So I'm to die before the year is out? Well...I've died once before.
hash_57f865c02cc12fde: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Why does it say I die in nineteen twelve? I've got years left in me. Decades!
hash_57f866c02cc13191: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7So now I bite the dust this year, huh? Quit messin' with my mind.
hash_57fc3d3eeac8a9e0: ^1Bruno: ^7Just pretend this is a black market gunrunner.     *sighs* The blackest of markets.
hash_57fc403eeac8aef9: ^1Scarlett: ^7So I kill those creatures, earn points, give those points to a wall, the wall gives me a gun.      I'm in the wrong business.
hash_57fc433eeac8b412: ^1Shaw: ^7Physics, chemistry, surely they apply here...though I'll be jiggered if know how.
hash_57fe188a51b12589: ^1Godfrey: ^7I did post them, sir. My apologies, but they do seem very much like death warrants now.
hash_5810693ab7e0bcb0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Who the hell carved this thing? Sick bastard oughtta be shot.
hash_58106a3ab7e0be63: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This beastly box wasn't part of Alistair's collection.
hash_58106c3ab7e0c1c9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Appearances aside, I think this ghastly box might save my life.
hash_5814a2d381e768d0: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Why is it every time something nice happens, these stinkers have to come spoil the moment?
hash_5828d31f90ab5e98: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Should've stayed a bat, now, shouldn't ya?
hash_582f23cbb46e44cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're only making this harder on yourself, shorty.
hash_583393e27cedb609: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well...at least no one's lookin' down their nose at me no more -- like I'm a turd in their punchbowl. Hard to feel under-dressed when everyone else at the party's a screamin' bag of meat.
hash_583727f092d51df3: ^1Shaw: ^7They swarm. As one. Driven by a singular goal. Like a hive mind.     Like bees! Bzzzzz!
hash_58372af092d5230c: ^1Scarlett: ^7You know you guys stink something rotten when you all group together.
hash_58372cf092d52672: ^1Diego: ^7Look, amigos! Even more bestias too foolish to realize they face certain death!
hash_58372df092d52825: ^1Bruno: ^7By attacking in numbers, you only hasten your demise.
hash_5839b49eeb566c66: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Another arrow for my quiver, so to speak.
hash_5839b59eeb566e19: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This might give me a fightin' chance.
hash_5848b56628f324bb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Screamin' sons 'a' bitches are everywhere. We gotta hunker down, circle the wagons, and try to find ourselves a way out.
hash_584d948e0b72ff19: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps we would be wise to abandon ship - there are lifeboats after all... They should be used.
hash_58501d6d329027fe: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Shake a leg, Godfrey. They're all around you.
hash_587f3f9619a04c41: ^1Shaw: ^7The range on this thing is certainly a nice touch, ennit?     Oh. Too dead to answer.
hash_587f409619a04df4: ^1Diego: ^7So fluid, so graceful -- the Viper almost seems to dance.
hash_587f419619a04fa7: ^1Bruno: ^7Sometimes it pays to bring a snake to a knife fight.
hash_587f429619a0515a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Somebody's gotta whip you freaks into shape!
hash_588294f86d8f86e0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I know most of the guests, and they were gormless mingebags even before their transformation. I do hope you know how to use that gun, young man.
hash_588c350306f136dc: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Could've used a man like you against the bloomin' Zulu.
hash_5898e590f5a4fa09: öˇ-\aĪźŖ£<*F\aųĻ —§Ľ)ėií(	E¨Kúojõ\v£ŘĚ ős‚§gõ	)nľlH0ř\Ćł1«ň\v4¬ßľ>’Z%Ē™uŤc©ĶÕ:4T÷≥Äąež”Ďį#ś	E’ĘŘ3čo£“ś;Ä—a∂ęć–Á
hash_589f3d1fcf2f7d50: ^1Shaw: ^7Are you angry Bruno? It's really hard to tell.
hash_589f421fcf2f85cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Holy shit... Anyone else see the rampage Bruno's just unleashed?
hash_589f441fcf2f8935: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno is like a hammer... Cracking a tiny little walnut!
hash_58a95a421c36434b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Surprise! It's not just a walking stick!
hash_58a95c421c3646b1: ^1Diego: ^7That was for your own good. And my amusement.
hash_58a95d421c364864: ^1Shaw: ^7It heals our allies. It kills our enemies. Such a fine line to walk.
hash_58c921c945a88d0c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Better start callin' me the Chakram Kid.
hash_58c922c945a88ebf: ^1The Brigadier: ^7These Chakrams are brilliant! Where on Earth did Alistair find them?
hash_58c924c945a89225: ^1Godfrey: ^7Terribly sorry, ghouls, but you won't be missed.
hash_58cec10cf47d11cb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shake it off, Scar. Forget what he said on page 4. Forget everything the old man said.       Concentrate on the now.
hash_58cf05c82cd8feeb: ^1Scarlett: ^7So - I guess stuff just does whatever it wants on this ship...
hash_58d68276ed23e0e4: ^1Godfrey: ^7I almost feel sorry for that one.
hash_58d68476ed23e44a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That's one less hazard on the terrain.
hash_58d82ab276d2ac20: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, that? That's just fairy-dust. Nothing to worry your rotten little heads over.
hash_58e6295c90c5da01: ^1Shaw: ^7Certainly don't get storms like this in London.
hash_58e62b5c90c5dd67: ^1Bruno: ^7My life has always been a maelstrom. Come, taste my pain!
hash_58e6e210eddbebe3: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to travel to the Main Hall [Cost: &&1]
hash_5956a80c818cfe65: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Spirits of the North Wind! Aid me in my hour of need! Or at least blow away that rotten smell...!
hash_5971303ff3c06df7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Nice to get a whiff of fresh air for a change.
hash_5976db6b5de79700: ^1Scarlett: ^7I recognize that smell - Paint stripper?!     Isn't that shit corrosive?!
hash_5976dd6b5de79a66: ^1Diego: ^7My lungs feel as though they are being stabbed by a thousand tiny, knife wielding icicles.
hash_5976de6b5de79c19: ^1Bruno: ^7I feel cold. Empty.     Not for the first time. Not for the last.
hash_5976e06b5de79f7f: ^1Shaw: ^7"You've got a couple of bits of string hanging from your shirt... No hang on - THOSE ARE YOUR ARMS!"    My brother everyone.
hash_5978eb0a386ddcfe: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, that's a cracking good time!
hash_597cb85b60c7a9d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Bugger! I think you just popped one of my buttons.
hash_597cbb5b60c7aeec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't I warn you before? Too late now, fucker!
hash_597cbe5b60c7b405: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you a fool, monstre? You look like a fool.
hash_59818f4ee252a328: ^1Bruno: ^7Redemption is no longer an option - for you, or for me.
hash_5981904ee252a4db: ^1Diego: ^7Like my assignment in Monte Carlo... It was not blood that left me drenched.
hash_5981924ee252a841: ^1Scarlett: ^7From now on - Every bitch-bastard of you that jumps overboard is getting off easy.
hash_5981954ee252ad5a: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't even recognize some of these organs! What was that little round one?
hash_599ab0835edbfb4e: ^1Shaw: ^7I think we're pretty much at the mercy of whatever this *cabinet of abominations* deems to chuck at us.
hash_599ab2835edbfeb4: ^1Bruno: ^7Even a rifle such as this may not be enough against the legions of the damned who now walk this ship.
hash_599ab3835edc0067: ^1Diego: ^7Judging by the weight alone, this weapon should ensure my survival for at least a few minutes.
hash_599ab5835edc03cd: ^1Scarlett: ^7I see a barrel... a trigger... And a lot of rounds.
hash_59a78d3fe43d597a: ^1Narrator: ^7Try bringing up your shield. It can deflect attacks from the front. Plus, you can fire your pistol while the shield's equipped.
hash_59abdbce5a04ea90: ^1Shaw: ^7Wow. How far away was he?! At least 10 feet. Probably more!
hash_59abe1ce5a04f4c2: ^1Bruno: ^7When you do it ten times in a row, Diego - then you can brag.
hash_59c1a724cdc545a8: ^1Bruno: ^7I have seen many weapons in my time. None were like this.
hash_59c1a824cdc5475b: ^1Diego: ^7The hordes grow ever larger - so too should our arsenal.
hash_59c1aa24cdc54ac1: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a hell of a piece of engineering. Wish it came with a manual.
hash_59c1ad24cdc54fda: ^1Shaw: ^7One thing I know for sure - it's never a good idea to operate machinery while... While...    In my condition.
hash_59c706557e5ebfcb: ^1Godfrey: ^7It seems I have champagne taste on a beer budget.
hash_59c707557e5ec17e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7How can something be fizzy and oily at the same time?
hash_59c708557e5ec331: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That'll put hair on your chest!
hash_59d24ea0cd4ae7a8: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw, did you ever consider I was enjoying the floor?
hash_59d24fa0cd4ae95b: ^1Bruno: ^7Is there not a real doctor on this ship?
hash_59d3fbdb0a865a49: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey, General, who are these "enemies" of Mr. Rhodes that you mentioned before?
hash_59e34558ae5fb46e: ^1Diego: ^7Have you admired the floor lately? It looks lovely down there.
hash_59e34658ae5fb621: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps you should have left me there, for I deserve no better.
hash_59e34858ae5fb987: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, you're quite right. This is no time for a nap.
hash_59fa9ec9b58c5058: ^1Scarlett: ^7No one cares whether you fucking live or die. Do you hear me??      NO-ONE!!
hash_59faa1c9b58c5571: ^1Bruno: ^7Those who still oppose me should prepare for your graves.
hash_59faa3c9b58c58d7: ^1Shaw: ^7How many was that I offed? I counted at least three.
hash_59fdc036eaa26065: ^1Narrator: ^7Each craftable has its own assigned workbench somewhere in the map.   Now, let's build a shield.
hash_5a01eb28bfde609b: ^1Shaw: ^7I don't want to play favorites, but you've had this coming for a while.
hash_5a01ee28bfde65b4: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're pretty much bow wow mutton at this point.
hash_5a01f028bfde691a: ^1Diego: ^7I'm not a petty man by nature, but you were starting to push my buttons.
hash_5a01f128bfde6acd: ^1Bruno: ^7A life of violence almost always leads to a violent end.
hash_5a039ced70bd73d4: ^1Godfrey: ^7"Shotgun Godfrey." Will that be my nickname when this is over? Anything but "Godfrey the Ghoul."
hash_5a039eed70bd773a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Looks like I'll be 'riding shotgun.' Eh? EH? *laughs* Oh, I slay me...
hash_5a090529d4585fbb: ^1Shaw: ^7More ammunition!    I was Happy to pay for it. Not a word of a lie.
hash_5a090829d45864d4: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm just a normal gal, purchasing bullets from a wall. Totally normal.
hash_5a090a29d458683a: ^1Diego: ^7Now, where was I?... Ah yes, fighting for my life.
hash_5a090b29d45869ed: ^1Bruno: ^7I expect to do this again - and sooner than I would like.
hash_5a114b98431c18b6: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hats off to the Butler! ...and anything that hat was sitting on.
hash_5a27ab1680f0b8e5:
Press ^3[{+attack}]^7 to fire Alistair's Annihilator
Hold and release ^3[{+attack}]^7 to fire a charged shot
hash_5a28a2f70d2f9fee: ^1Shaw: ^7I think I could be about to win my first actual fight.
hash_5a28a4f70d2fa354: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps a quick death is an act of mercy for such monstres.
hash_5a28a5f70d2fa507: ^1Diego: ^7If I - and Madero himself - had held such power, it would have been a very short revolution indeed.
hash_5a28a7f70d2fa86d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not only am I ready, but I am EAGER to kick ass.
hash_5a3404e11325a1e9: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to get Alistair's Annihilator Component
hash_5a3ab89fa0fef63e: ^1Diego: ^7...do you not have anything a little more straightforward? Not *too* straightforward, though. I know, I am picky.
hash_5a3ab99fa0fef7f1: ^1Bruno: ^7Very advanced. At least it still fires bullets.
hash_5a3abb9fa0fefb57: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not even sure how this works. Presumably it's still point and pull the trigger?
hash_5a3c88bf58181140: ^1Scarlett: ^7That man's oversized ego is going to get him killed.
hash_5a3c8bbf58181659: ^1Bruno: ^7I suppose I could help Diego before he dies a terrible death. But then he would learn nothing.
hash_5a3c8dbf581819bf: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm going to time how long it takes you to kill them all Diego. Ready? GO!
hash_5a4f6f553d1943f4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I wasn't trapped in here with them. They were trapped in here with me.
hash_5a4f70553d1945a7: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7*Whew* Damn, I need a drink...
hash_5a4f71553d19475a: ^1Godfrey: ^7Alive. I can't believe I'm still alive!
hash_5a52b65583f3aaf3: ^1Bruno: ^7That may prove to be a costly misstep.
hash_5a52b75583f3aca6: ^1Scarlett: ^7This voyage is turning into one disaster after another.

hash_5a70a1e597caeb27: ^1Diego: ^7Scarlett! What did you get me into?!
hash_5a761a9e87a4f938: ^1Scarlett: ^7Now wait a damn minute. I paid my money. How come you're changing the rules?
hash_5a761c9e87a4fc9e: ^1Diego: ^7This is an act of disrespect I will not forget - nor forgive.

hash_5a97593761abb441: ^1Narrator: ^7Nice. Now pick up the shield off the bench.
hash_5a9cb2f99e6b390e: ^1Shaw: ^7The Viper and the Dragon. Rather poetic names, don't you think?     Come figure out which is which.
hash_5a9cb4f99e6b3c74: ^1Bruno: ^7I have two different flavors of oblivion for you. Now get in line.
hash_5a9cb5f99e6b3e27: ^1Diego: ^7In battle and in the bedroom, two is always better than one.
hash_5a9cb7f99e6b418d: ^1Scarlett: ^7No idle hands here, but I did bring along the Devil's tools.
hash_5ab37b47f0dff895: ^1Bruno: ^7Your father's work was never pointless - He believed in *something*.     So much so that he gave up the thing most precious to him in search of it.

hash_5ac5b2f50ccdb4f6: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You could at least buy me some dinner first!
hash_5ac609a51331293a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This can't last forever. There can only be so many monsters in this mansion, right?
hash_5ad307dbfbe66c92: ^1Narrator: ^7You've been given all of your elixirs, so let's try one out. Activate the 'Anywhere But Here' elixir.
hash_5ad904a460ca42fd: ^1Ghost: ^7Here's your chance to rejoin your friends. Just be sure they really are friends. Not like Mrs. Soames, who died owing me ten quid. Least, that's what I told her husband.
hash_5aecc7aab64ac5be: ^1Diego: ^7Can anyone tell me what on earth that thing is?
hash_5aef098f12d2ee26: ^1Diego: ^7Instant transportation from danger? I could have used that last July. There was no escaping Valentina's wrath.
hash_5aef0a8f12d2efd9: ^1Bruno: ^7Que se passe-t-il? Am I still in one piece?
hash_5aef0c8f12d2f33f: ^1Shaw: ^7Fucking hell! Where are my organs? Why can I only feel one kidney?... Oh right, there's only one.

hash_5b0463796271d753: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Fixed your skull problem. That'll be three hundred quid.
hash_5b0600295dd7aa3b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Those "ghouls" have made an utter shambles of Alistair's fine house! As the lord is my witness, I will not allow them do the same to us!

hash_5b233a7020850fdb: ^1Godfrey: ^7I would say you were struck down in your prime. But, you were clearly past your prime.
hash_5b233c7020851341: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Swift and cold-blooded. That's my Viper.
hash_5b342867a8dd649f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7What do you call a girl with no ammo? Dead meat.
hash_5b58f14022ab0ba4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Welcome to Tornado Alley, ya slackjawed blatherskites!
hash_5b58f24022ab0d57: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Come, ghouls. Just try to storm this castle.
hash_5b58f44022ab10bd: ^1Godfrey: ^7This is no whirlwind romance. This is its bally opposite.
hash_5b5afc9c9a2cd3a6: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I really shouldn't be enjoying this as much as I am.
hash_5b7ccafd06f7985c: ^1Diego: ^7What can I say? Sparks fly wherever I go.
hash_5b7ccbfd06f79a0f: ^1Bruno: ^7I swear I will cleanse this whole ship!
hash_5b84b32d66eafa5e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I will fight with renewed vigor! For King! And Country!
hash_5b84b42d66eafc11: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I reckon I'm about to show this horde a thing or two about the wild west.
hash_5bb8a41e1e26da12: ^1Scarlett: ^7Good news skin-scabs! I'll be going hand to hand pretty soon.
hash_5bcb84f601ad246e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Hmm. A Bowie knife.  Or is it Bow-ee knife?
hash_5bcc37d2ab9da32f: ^1Godfrey: ^7I am actually starting to believe Fate has a plan for me tonight.
hash_5bcc38d2ab9da4e2: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Nice of the armor-guys to pitch in at the end there.
hash_5bcc39d2ab9da695: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, if I'd known it was going to be this kind of party, I'd have brought a change of underwear.
hash_5bd3baef902bc313: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hey, old man! You sure you're not from Texas?
hash_5bd3bbef902bc4c6: ^1Godfrey: ^7The sun never sets on our Brigadier.
hash_5be2cc9c4ecf7608: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Like how I just mowed you down? Ha!

hash_5bebef28c4282d68: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I've always been lucky, but I say you make your own luck.
hash_5bebf028c4282f1b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I may not be book-smart, but I'm clever enough.
hash_5bebf128c42830ce: ^1Godfrey: ^7When I'm right, no one remembers. When I'm wrong, no one forgets.

hash_5c125dcda9f78b33: ^1Diego: ^7Do not fret, bestia, I think that 'no face' may be a better look for you.
hash_5c125fcda9f78e99: ^1Scarlett: ^7Run around all you want scab-heads, you still get a headshot.
hash_5c1262cda9f793b2: ^1Shaw: ^7That was almost as satisfying as threading a needle.     And I didn't even have to lick it first.
hash_5c2c2881787c0bcc: ^1Godfrey: ^7It is my duty as a servant to keep my mind clear, and focused on the job at all times.
hash_5c3498bab03c69c9: ^1Shaw: ^7Bravo, Senor Necalli!     Don't know why I'm congratulating him... I could do the same thing if I tried hard enough.
hash_5c349abab03c6d2f: ^1Bruno: ^7You are fortunate that you need not mourn those you have slain, Diego!
hash_5c349bbab03c6ee2: ^1Scarlett: ^7We all get it, Diego - you're slicker than an engine oil spill.
hash_5c40f4c951057a67: ^1Ghost: ^7Do they still do public hangings in America? Not in these parts. Not any more. I think mine was the last...for a woman anyway.
hash_5c783687a5358536: ^1Shaw: ^7What? Really? You think I carry that kind of coin?
hash_5c783887a535889c: ^1Bruno: ^7Wealth was never a problem for me. Lack of wealth on the other hand...
hash_5c783987a5358a4f: ^1Diego: ^7This...thing demands payment. I overthrew such naked greed in Mexico. I will do the same here.
hash_5c783b87a5358db5: ^1Scarlett: ^7I can't make this work without payment? Helluva racket they're running here...
hash_5c7ad1c3a643f703: ^1Scarlett: ^7What happened to 'The Great Diego Necalli never makes mistakes'?
hash_5c7f2052291c6fbe: ^1Shaw: ^7Did you see which one got me? Cheeky bugger's going to pay...
hash_5c7f2252291c7324: ^1Bruno: ^7Why do I feel you are helping me just to rub it in my face?
hash_5c7f2552291c783d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just for that, I'll stifle the next three insults that pop into my head.     Done. You're fair game again.
hash_5c859bb3cfc40eeb: ^1Scarlett: ^7Launch this at the right time and we'll catch a lucky break. Unless I sinks the ship.
hash_5c859cb3cfc4109e: ^1Bruno: ^7There is a danger this could cause further structural damage to the ship.
hash_5c859db3cfc41251: ^1Diego: ^7With weapons like this, I fear war will one day become more commonplace than love.
hash_5c859eb3cfc41404: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not sure what will kill me first. A clumsy misfire or a clumsy trip down the stairs.
hash_5c9cea9cfd4902ac: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay bone-basket, I won't shoot you for that one.
hash_5cad87731e0829c4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Bloodsucker. Lickspittle. Mumblecrust. There's no name foul enough for you.

hash_5cb9443c9895d82c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Chin up, young man. Stiff upper lip and all that.
hash_5cb9463c9895db92: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'll make you a deal, sir. You get back on your feet, and I'll refill your whiskey flask.
hash_5cc238ce6f9a98df: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Is this a stunted rifle, or an overgrown pistol?
hash_5cc23ace6f9a9c45: ^1Godfrey: ^7Ta, magic box. I'd say I got my money's worth.
hash_5cc31b55f95a6b9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Could everyone just shut their yaps and concentrate on securing the area?!      I was told I could trust you. Can you please show me that my father wasn't entirely full of it?
hash_5cd32b8ee79bd8d0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7It's loud, and crude, and it shouts down all comers. Just like me.
hash_5cd32c8ee79bda83: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Some rely on the Man Upstairs. I put my faith in double-ought buck.
hash_5cd32d8ee79bdc36: ^1Godfrey: ^7I see a lot of brain-splatter in my immediate future.
hash_5cd62955ef13019d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Tell me you don't need help Bruno -  I'd be pretty disappointed if you did.
hash_5cdc6fca4c4523ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe if you lay off the 'medicine' you could do that more often, Shaw!
hash_5cdc71ca4c452752: ^1Diego: ^7Shaw! Do you know what you just did? It was good! Feel free to do it again!
hash_5cdc72ca4c452905: ^1Bruno: ^7Imagine what you could achieve with a clear head... my brain addled friend.
hash_5cfbab1699cee1bf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Okay, I'm getting the hang of this.
hash_5d0932953a1ea130: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I'm pissing away a fortune here. I expect a return on my investment.
hash_5d0933953a1ea2e3: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7My guns are hungry tonight. Eat all ya want, my friends.
hash_5d0934953a1ea496: ^1Godfrey: ^7How did I go though my ammunition so fast? So much of today is just...a blank.
hash_5d1716633e2f4026: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7A girl could get used to this.
hash_5d17d29ed169a7de: ^1Godfrey: ^7I need to be smarter about this.
hash_5d27177118494374: ^1Diego: ^7I have crossed paths - and swords -  with our enemy before. They sought to take my medallion - and now we know why.
hash_5d31c709b7c04f54: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Think I left my stomach back there.
hash_5d31c809b7c05107: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Had to check to make sure I didn't leave my goolies behind.
hash_5d31ca09b7c0546d: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm not sure how to describe that passage, but "dignified" is certainly not it.
hash_5d503024fd9d4e5f: ^1Godfrey: ^7Is there a Hell for monster bats? I certainly hope so.
hash_5d503224fd9d51c5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That wide-eyed look of surprise. Priceless.
hash_5d63b4f9b99a90e7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Yes, Hammer. Feels like you're packing a little bit of extra Valhalla.
hash_5d7431fc9283ccb7: ^1Godfrey: ^7Strange, the Scepter feels almost impatient. How ominous.
hash_5d7432fc9283ce6a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gonna have to try out this here Scepter of Ra thingy.
hash_5d7433fc9283d01d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I really should use that Scepter of Ra more often.
hash_5d8b256a35dfdab2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You're not done yet, Brigadier. Not by a long shot.
hash_5d962ea2aa60c4e4: ^1Godfrey: ^7I hope I can return the favor soon, Mr. Jones.
hash_5dac668eecaa2028: ^1Diego: ^7I shall hold this blade aloft - so the glint from the night stars may blind my enemies.
hash_5dac678eecaa21db: ^1Bruno: ^7I have used such a knife before. Mostly for cooking meat beneath the blistering desert sun.
hash_5dac688eecaa238e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've slept with a knife under my pillow since I was 13.
hash_5dac6d8eecaa2c0d: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful!     I could have someone's eye out with this!
hash_5db59d42b6f19c51: ^1Shaw: ^7We must find fresh munitions! If only so I can avoid the indignity of dying.
hash_5db59e42b6f19e04: ^1Diego: ^7Maybe I should just use what's left of my ammo and go down in a blaze of glory.
hash_5db5a042b6f1a16a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Few more rounds - I should make them count.

hash_5df7047ff32d0ba1: ķE%jĎpņĒťúÍÖ4^=t]B*Ř§Ś>ĘďďÍųŔg0ŔŇZH¶ÄĹaö¨kB* s type, but, y'know, it don't feel half bad. Aside from the dyin', that is.
hash_5e08899c5cade06b: ^1Scarlett: ^7Is that rotten stiff supposed to be leaking gas?     You can smell it from here.
hash_5e088a9c5cade21e: ^1Bruno: ^7Stay back! That gassy shrieker is a walking contagion!
hash_5e088b9c5cade3d1: ^1Diego: ^7Just when you think the dead cannot smell any worse...
hash_5e088c9c5cade584: ^1Shaw: ^7There! You see! That's what I feel like when I eat a curry!
hash_5e23f753868652a9: ^1Ghost: ^7This house hasn't been the same since the baby's sudden illness. No laughter. No joy. No future. No wonder Lady Hathaway left her husband to my tender mercies.
hash_5e476e716ce7ccc8: ^1Diego: ^7I knew there was a reason I hated that little blue rat.
hash_5e476f716ce7ce7b: ^1Bruno: ^7That sneaking little runt. Keep it away from the others!
hash_5e4775716ce7d8ad: ^1Shaw: ^7That little blue rat's on my last nerve...
hash_5e567b8d38c3f66f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7So you're the ghost that haunts this place? You're not part of that undead horde, are you?
hash_5e6c6a3a45024b62: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Is this thing over-kill? Nah, it's just-right-kill. I hope.
hash_5e8bba355eae9de3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah, I know, I know, Shaw. I messed up.
hash_5e8bbb355eae9f96: ^1Bruno: ^7Merci, Shaw. You actually did something right.     Shh. Do not ruin the moment.
hash_5e8bbc355eaea149: ^1Diego: ^7Yes, yes, we are all having a laugh at Diego. Que chistoso...
hash_5e9747173e85a783: ^1Shaw: ^7Hello?! Anyone else here?     Just to be crystal clear - I don't want to hear from those of you who might identify as... *necrotic*.
hash_5e974a173e85ac9c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Okay. The artifacts are gone. What now? Why couldn't I have had a normal father?
hash_5e974c173e85b002: ^1Diego: ^7Bruno? Are you there my French friend? We should try to stay together - it would be better for all of us.     However many are left.
hash_5e974d173e85b1b5: ^1Bruno: ^7So not everyone is dead. Some are... somewhere... inbetween.     I will do something. I always do something.
hash_5e9f6d419484b90e: ^1Diego: ^7You fought well, burning man.     I kid, I kid. You made an ox look graceful.
hash_5e9f6e419484bac1: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not like these stokers. They remind me too much of the man I used to be.
hash_5e9f70419484be27: ^1Shaw: ^7It exploded! Damn it, I was hoping to examine his remains.
hash_5ebcf57a6246ae10: ^1Godfrey: ^7Isn't it both? Isn't that who you are -- the worst of me, trying to drive me mad?
hash_5ec954d5f1048043: ^1Godfrey: ^7I never imagined I would be witness -- and party -- to such unspeakable violence.
hash_5ec955d5f10481f6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn! This thing could bring down a buffalo!
hash_5ec956d5f10483a9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The dragon's breath spares no one!
hash_5ee5b8166e3d2fb8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I am Prometheus stealing fire from the gods! Ha-HA!
hash_5ee5b9166e3d316b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7A man ain't meant to wield this sort of power, but I reckon if anybody should - it should be me.
hash_5effd2a30197528a: ^1Scarlett: ^7A gun from a wall. That's...that's just...  (to self, stern)  Okay, Scarlett, don't over-think it, just take the gun.
hash_5f1fcd0c4e0df694: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Who else wants their brains splattered? Anyone?
hash_5f1fce0c4e0df847: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Even in my prime I was never this good.
hash_5f1fd00c4e0dfbad: ^1Godfrey: ^7And to think the army rejected me all because of my flat feet...
hash_5f31185b1673a29b: ^1Narrator: ^7If you decide what's on offer is a downgrade, you don't have to take it.   Just remember: you have a limited window of time to grab the weapon. Once it's back in the box, it's gone.
hash_5f49b1e9ec40090f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, what the?? Is that made from people??
hash_5f4f4e5177baf28b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I love puzzles. Especially when they can save my life.
hash_5f5b1ee4ae1a1243: ^1Godfrey: ^7This is no time for a rest, Mr. Jones. Allow me to provide a refreshment.
hash_5f5b20e4ae1a15a9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Stand to attention, Sonny Jim. The battle's not over yet.
hash_5f68584f6fa1f4ae: ^1Scarlett: ^7I don't know where this weird box is getting these guns... but I'm not complaining.
hash_5f852eccfe81537b: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm a bit poked up, if I'm being honest, Diego.
hash_5f8531ccfe815894: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm never gonna hear the end of this, am I?
hash_5f8534ccfe815dad: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not care what everyone says, Diego, you are good for something.
hash_5f87b97ad6eb6fe8: ^1Diego: ^7As I learned in Constantinople, it is sometimes better to stay far, far away from your enemy.     Next town if needs be.
hash_5f87ba7ad6eb719b: ^1Bruno: ^7A rifle that requires skill, and patience.    The Mexican could never use this.
hash_5f87bb7ad6eb734e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Don't really have time for target practice. It's the real deal today.
hash_5f87c07ad6eb7bcd: ^1Shaw: ^7Sharpshooting was never really a strong point of mine. Nor Bluntshooting... if such a thing exists.
hash_5f90df165c8402ea: ^1Ghost: ^7Want to rejoin your friends? Drink the water from that stone. Go on, pet. Make the most of your second chance.
hash_5fbcbf247d1b160e: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Another little bloodsucker. Cor, they give me the creeps.
hash_5fc033406eeede5c: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'd be an idiot to leave this behind.
hash_5fc035406eeee1c2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Possession is nine tenths of the law.
hash_5fc036406eeee375: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7One man's trash is another man's treasure.
hash_5fca63c24d916e9b: ^1Shaw: ^7Actually, if you're doing renovations, my lab could really do with a bit of work.
hash_5fca66c24d9173b4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Whoever's putting up these boards really needs to brush up their skills in the workshop.
hash_5fca68c24d91771a: ^1Diego: ^7I am grateful for such assistance - My own talents relate to an altogether different kind of 'Manual labor'.
hash_5fca69c24d9178cd: ^1Bruno: ^7I would recommend using materials stronger than mere driftwood.
hash_5ff28af17671eab9: ^1Shaw: ^7From a far away land to my achy, shaky hands. What could go wrong?
hash_5ff28bf17671ec6c: ^1Diego: ^7A Viper, a Dragon, and a Mexican walk into a bar. There were no survivors.
hash_5ff28cf17671ee1f: ^1Bruno: ^7A cannon and a sword. It's official: I am a pirate.
hash_5ff28df17671efd2: ^1Scarlett: ^7What's not to love? It's a hand cannon and a whip-sword.
hash_60092e8ef61bb0aa: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This is gonna give me nightmares.
hash_6019f955f147a09d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Here we go again. I hope these knights wake up and help.
hash_60233d47c48a4cbe: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This is how you live off the land.
hash_60233e47c48a4e71: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The right tool for the right job.
hash_603b226342d576e5: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Whoa! They smell worse up close!
hash_605284d87932ac9b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Sorry, sweetie, but the Dragon has a strict "no prisoners" policy.
hash_605af0ba2e5c1728: ^1Shaw: ^7This is not the end!! I do not drown in vomit!!
hash_605af7ba2e5c230d: ^1Diego: ^7I will kill you for this! Twice!!
hash_605df9a5cbc7e87b: ^1Diego: ^7Odin, if you are watching, save me a seat at your table. I'll bring the tequila.
hash_605dfea5cbc7f0fa: ^1Shaw: ^7Mortar and pestle time. Let's make some medicine...
hash_60696d7d04bf06d1: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»ĀF≠EŠŘłÖ5Āé\aŻ#’ĪĖ≠Hféż 9ŤĮć+.ˇare one of the help, yes? Well, what are you waiting for? Help me!
hash_608704ce34fc6a28: ^1Shaw: ^7They're letting me carry something sharp and something explosive?    Well, I can't be held responsible for the consequences...
hash_608709ce34fc72a7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Ever see a dragon and a snake fight? I'll show you what happens.
hash_60870ace34fc745a: ^1Bruno: ^7The Viper bites. The Dragon burns. Come, I will show you.
hash_60870bce34fc760d: ^1Diego: ^7Do I shred this meat or cook it? Porque no los dos?
hash_609466e3a3140f09: ^1Bruno: ^7I am sure you have your reasons for being on the floor. I will not speculate as to what they are.
hash_609468e3a314126f: ^1Shaw: ^7What are you doing there, Diego? Is it some kind of top secret mission?
hash_609ac5e401bcad84: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I once fought off an Apache war party for three whole days without so much as a wink of sleep. What I'm sayin' is: we can do this. Just don't lose your head.
hash_609f4dec811e7660: ^1Shaw: ^7If things go pear shaped, there's always the Viper and Dragon.
hash_609f52ec811e7edf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Viper and Dragon feel good to go.
hash_609f53ec811e8092: ^1Bruno: ^7I have a mystic sword and gun. Surprisingly easy to forget in the heat of battle.
hash_609f54ec811e8245: ^1Diego: ^7Viper and Dragon, I love you both equally.     No, really.
hash_60a7d71e879f5f27: ^1Godfrey: ^7What, did you think I'd just stand there and take it?
hash_60a7d91e879f628d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7There is a pecking order here, and I do the pecking!
hash_60b0082b70b6bcec: ķE%jĎpņĒťúÍÖ4^ĺwÔiČéĮ0bŃāť£Éb≤Ä◊ō‚¶ ó5ý¨:”ň)'t lettin' us go without a fight.
hash_60be1fdc96c4d1f8: ^1Shaw: ^7I honestly thought their flesh and bone would break before my shield did.
hash_60be24dc96c4da77: ^1Scarlett: ^7That shield was the toughest I could build, given the quality of the materials.
hash_60be25dc96c4dc2a: ^1Bruno: ^7I would be wise to secure another shield.
hash_60be26dc96c4dddd: ^1Diego: ^7I won't blame the build quality. It really did take quite the pounding.
hash_60de8024fe42f2f9: ^1Shaw: ^7Not only is my past drowned in blood - My future continues to bathe in it...
hash_60de8124fe42f4ac: ^1Diego: ^7How curious... I do not believe I  seen a model such as this before.
hash_60de8224fe42f65f: ^1Bruno: ^7This is unlike any cavalry rifle I have ever seen.
hash_60de8324fe42f812: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a mean looking long rifle.
hash_60deee0f7ce19fa4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This here's the Hammer of Vanhalla. And it's gonna make you van-holler!
hash_60deef0f7ce1a157: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is going to hurt you more than it hurts me. By some margin.
hash_60def10f7ce1a4bd: ^1Godfrey: ^7There is nothing subtle about a bloody great hammer. Thank heavens.
hash_610dea1f84f24958: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This oughtta have more kick than that lousy champagne.
hash_610fd2c6cb1ac51f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, at least the house is on our side. I think.
hash_612e3e92e38fe606: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7My back's feeling drafty all of a sudden...
hash_6132a66100f0b08d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7They move fast, but they die faster.
hash_6134ae09f560ec0c: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Behold! Madame Mirela summons the great and terrible honkuus...homungus...hobuncle... Screw it. It's a bomb.
hash_61389b520136b4d3: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, that's maybe just a tad too strong.
hash_61389e520136b9ec: ^1Scarlett: ^7Doesn't taste good, but it gets the job done.
hash_6138a0520136bd52: ^1Diego: ^7Are these elixirs supposed to be warm...    And chewy?
hash_6138a1520136bf05: ^1Bruno: ^7With all the magic fighting against us... I welcome any magic that helps us fight back.
hash_613aa922b7ed7d24: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I need - And just what those brain-dead creeps don't.
hash_613de36f469d4c5b: ^1Diego: ^7Ah si, this is just what I need! If I want to annoy them to death.
hash_614864f521bf25ba: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I'm out. Now does my gun turn back to a pumpkin?
hash_61544dfde0f3b8ec: ^1Godfrey: ^7You blow their heads off like an artist signs his work.
hash_61544ffde0f3bc52: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I feel a headshot contest coming on...
hash_615caa223452ecf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Well. Shaw's gonna die.   I'll mourn him later. If I remember.
hash_615cab223452eeaa: ^1Bruno: ^7We should help the old man. He is fragile. I think his entire body weighs less than my left arm.
hash_615cac223452f05d: ^1Diego: ^7Only an Englishman could make 'Life threatening danger' look so dull.
hash_6176d78409325d1b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Aw, they look kinda cute once you kill 'em.
hash_6177bc69a22f14b4: ^1Godfrey: ^7If you fine undead people would just excuse me one moment...
hash_6177be69a22f181a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My gun's as empty as a bird's nest in December.
hash_6177bf69a22f19cd: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7My gun's run dry. So's my flask. I hate tonight.

hash_618f097f4ac2441e: bS;2$i ^7Bloody hell, Deigo - You went through them like grass through a goose!
hash_618f0b7f4ac24784: ^1Bruno: ^7I could applaud, Diego. But it would only feed your ego.
hash_618f0e7f4ac24c9d: ^1Scarlett: ^7My Father made a lot of weird friends Diego. I think he collected you like stray animals.
hash_619b98f283f9fd9c: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh no... I'm getting flashbacks - horrible ones at that.    It's really starting to feel like that terrible Cambodia business all over again.
hash_61aff4c27dfe0f76: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, I really got in over my head today, didn't I?
hash_61c6d3708a1c0978: ^1Bruno: ^7Well...at least it is a kinder fate than remaining a coal-monster.
hash_61c6d4708a1c0b2b: ^1Diego: ^7Did you see that? I was all whish-bang-crack-thump!    That is definitely going in my next adventure novel.

hash_61c6d9708a1c13aa: ^1Shaw: ^7Like carrying coals to Newcastle.' That was you, mate.

hash_61f9de434224af10: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Godfrey, I can see you've still got the morbs. It's written all over your face. Chin up, old bean, you have my full confidence.

hash_620ab73a8fb72e51: ^1Shaw: ^7At this rate, I'll owe more to you than your father when this is over...
hash_620ab93a8fb731b7: ^1Bruno: ^7Careful, girl. If they can pull down a brute like moi, none of us are safe.

hash_62291099bd2792b6: ^1Shaw: ^7You ready, Hammer? Time for a good whacking.
hash_6238d18e215686ef: ^1Dark Godfrey: ^7When all this is over, Godfrey, you will belong to me.

hash_625a87a514aee98e: ^1Shaw: ^7Given your limited language skills, it is possible your attacks are an attempt to say hello!     I should probably say hello back!
hash_625a89a514aeecf4: ^1Bruno: ^7My body is strong, and I have no ego to bruise.     Unlike Diego.
hash_625a8ca514aef20d: ^1Scarlett: ^7You keep asking for it, bub! Now you get to see what happens. I'll give you a clue - It'll hurt.
hash_626e40f66800b382: ^1Bruno: ^7Did your father also tell you of what befell us beneath the Basilica Cistern?     How he... Resurrected me?
hash_626f4cf4387b00a0: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, I'm still above ground. Better than the alternative.
hash_626f4ef4387b0406: ^1The Brigadier: ^7*whew* I think I popped a stitch in my girdle. Forget I said that.
hash_626f4ff4387b05b9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Anyone mind if I absquatulate from this boneyard directly? That means "get the heck out."
hash_62763ae2f6bc5b9b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't get swarmed, old man. I'm just startin' to like you.
hash_62763be2f6bc5d4e: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, at least they know a hearty meal when they see one.
hash_628508d99235248a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7A rifle with a telescope? I'm not trying to shoot the moon.
hash_629a22b0c17e3e80: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, if that doesn't get your heart racing, you're already dead.
hash_629a23b0c17e4033: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That is never gonna get old. And I ain't never gonna get used to it.
hash_629a24b0c17e41e6: ^1Godfrey: ^7The shortest route between two point is complete insanity.
hash_62bcdf1e8d9cffc0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Even though I am blessed with an abundance of vigor and vitality, I'm not ashamed to enhance what's there by nature...
hash_62bce01e8d9d0173: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That sure hits the spot... Don't know which one precisely, but it sure got hit.
hash_62bce11e8d9d0326: ^1Godfrey: ^7I dearly hope the benefits of this concoction are worth the intense moments of discomfort.
hash_62c4dfcfd66e9583: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's not natural... It can't be. Even Shaw couldn't come up with something that noxious.
hash_62c4e0cfd66e9736: ^1Bruno: ^7I smell burning engines. Surely that cannot be good.
hash_62c4e1cfd66e98e9: ^1Diego: ^7This was the kick-start my heart needed to recover from the tragedy that befell Lady McKendrick.
hash_62c4e2cfd66e9a9c: ^1Shaw: ^7Oooh... It's like getting a bit snow up the nose.
hash_62c51391c696c658: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm always supposed to have all the answers. Well, apparently not now.
hash_62c51591c696c9be: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, I was bound to take a few wrong turns tonight.
hash_62c51691c696cb71: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This ain't workin' out so well.
hash_62c80fd5e3a51f66: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Piece of shit shield broke! I can't catch a break!
hash_62c810d5e3a52119: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The shield that covered my ass was not up to dick.
hash_62d5fb53aa7b4e4c: ^1Godfrey: ^7How did this happen? Why can't I even remember the guests arriving? Good heavens, am I losing my marbles?
hash_62dc1876ba62214e: ^1Shaw: ^7Maybe you've taken a bit too much medicine, Shaw. That wall just sold you a firearm.
hash_62dc1a76ba6224b4: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter where I go, it seems life wants me to solve all my problems with the pull of a trigger.
hash_62dc1b76ba622667: ^1Diego: ^7The Trial puts us under siege, but also aids us. Is someone watching this? For what? Entertainment?
hash_62dc1d76ba6229cd: ^1Scarlett: ^7As a kid I believed my father's stories. As an adult I believed him full of shit.     Now I don't know what to believe.
hash_62f18b4152d8ffb4: ^1Godfrey: ^7No sense in pinching pennies. "You can't take it with you," after all.
hash_62f18d4152d9031a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is more than a reload. It's a new lease on life.
hash_62f18e4152d904cd: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gotta look on the bright side: I haven't had a cartridge jam yet.
hash_62f963bb6edfcb21: ^1Shaw: ^7It's a bit brisk out tonight, should probably put a coat on. WAIT! WHAT ON EARTH IS GOING ON?!
hash_630e16f3c3bb1a04: ^1Godfrey: ^7I do hope Alistair's Chemist friend has forgiven me for that business with his eye.
hash_630e18f3c3bb1d6a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Is this some form of medicine? It's certainly disgusting enough.
hash_630e19f3c3bb1f1d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hope this don't mess up my aim the way too much cheap Rye sometimes does.
hash_630e5d5e4bea2a04: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Dearly departed...overstaying your welcome...come and get me. Single-file would be good...

hash_6320dab04485de6e: ^1Bruno: ^7Each time I am double-crossed, my patience wears ever more thin.
hash_6320dbb04485e021: ^1Diego: ^7I am humble in defeat. I still have much for which I'm grateful.
hash_6320dcb04485e1d4: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm watching this pile of bones and meat-matter carefully this time...     Bollocks!
hash_63276412036a9dcf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This thing even cuts the air!
hash_633520e3fc25afff: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been ripped across time and space!!     Oh no, I'm still on the ship. Super.
hash_63816dbc69cb0a7b: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, this is not going well. Not going well at all.
hash_63816fbc69cb0de1: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Alistair's taste in friends leaves much to be desired.

hash_63a2b2cc387d30ac: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not know how many more of those we can take.
hash_63a2b5cc387d35c5: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I never see your puke-spouting face again, that's a win in my book.
hash_63ac85b700b5aebf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well, I always knew it could come to this. Ten years of scammin' and griftin' and preyin' on people's grief and fear...s'gotta catch up to ya sooner or later. But just to be clear, I still vote for 'later.'
hash_63aff25d298119b0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7If you're downrange, you are shit out of luck!
hash_63aff35d29811b63: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, kiss my ruddy arse! This gun is fucking superb!
hash_63aff55d29811ec9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Dear me, this weapon spares nothing and no one.
hash_63c0d7d0201bc2b0: ^1Diego: ^7Wow-ee! You can definitely tell that was made somewhere south of the border...
hash_63c0d9d0201bc616: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the Hell did I just inhale?     Frosted glass?!
hash_63c0ded0201bce95: ^1Shaw: ^7Amazing how different you feel after a whiff of this.    I reckon I could DOMINATE at tiddly-winks right now.
hash_63e5ef81f4ea51b8: ^1Diego: ^7I am slightly surprised that you do not bleed more.
hash_63e5f681f4ea5d9d: ^1Shaw: ^7Look what you've done to my knife! I'm going to have to clean that!
hash_63e6ae6382e3b167: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Anyone seen a cartridge box around here? No? Dearie me.
hash_63e82411ab92e901: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, my Viper and Dragon feel eager for action - like puppies pulling on their leads.
hash_6416800a2cc36fe3: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7We've had quite enough argy-bargy from you, mister.
hash_64279b053bd0fbe3: ^1Narrator: ^7He's going to bleed out if you don't help him.
hash_642d6f3f16abfe69: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm trying to remember Scarlett as a child, and I can't. Same goes for my own family if I'm honest with myself.     Shame on me.
hash_642d703f16ac001c: ^1Diego: ^7Of all my adventures, this is the one that could not possibly be exaggerated.
hash_642d713f16ac01cf: ^1Bruno: ^7My comrades and I are very different people. But we are all bound by our association with Alistair Rhodes.
hash_642d723f16ac0382: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm trying to figure out the patterns - there's a twisted logic to all of this.
hash_645c4165d433de38: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This looks handy. Now if I can just find a blacksmith.
hash_645c4265d433dfeb: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I used to think shields cowardly...and then I fought the Zulu.
hash_645c4465d433e351: ^1Godfrey: ^7A shield would be lovely right about now. Any protection would.
hash_6489249c48146773: ^1Godfrey: ^7Mr. Jones, should I start making preparations for your funeral?
hash_6489269c48146ad9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Hey, cow-puncher. I suggest you start punching!
hash_6494589e59b8fbaf: ^1Ghost: ^7Did someone call for the nursemaid? You there. Butler. Come help me tend to the sickly.
hash_64d3a9ef6bda7c42: ^1Ghost: ^7You've rather enjoyed this evening, haven't you, sir? Well here's one last bit of fun.
hash_64d4b6e719c9ec1c: ^1Godfrey: ^7The hordes of Hell are upon us. Might I trouble you to destroy them?
hash_64d4b8e719c9ef82: ^1The Brigadier: ^7In the name of Saint George, go forth and smite the wicked!
hash_64d4b9e719c9f135: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Welcome back to the war, old timer.

hash_64eb152f19a60c87: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oooh...somebody fetch me a fainting couch.
hash_64f1d2f399f92c63: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Oh, you gotta be kiddin' me.
hash_6506415093f9dd20: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That big statue-feller -- "Atlas," ain't it? I always wondered who suckered him into holdin' up the whole world.
hash_6506425093f9ded3: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I always loved this room. Feels like a proper museum in here. Of course, Alistair had a...difficult history with museums...
hash_6506445093f9e239: ^1Godfrey: ^7I spent all day in here, setting up the party. Everything in its place, the floor sparkling... Eight hours of labor, gone in the blink of a dead man's eye.
hash_652df04a5d0140e7: ^1Godfrey: ^7I've come this far. I won't surrender now!
hash_652df14a5d01429a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Just when you think it can't get any worse...
hash_652df24a5d01444d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Do your worst, demons! I am indefatigable tonight!
hash_65351d1eed95a868: ^1Bruno: ^7We must try to learn from this.
hash_6535201eed95ad81: ^1Scarlett: ^7Luck doesn't even come into it. We should have been smarter.
hash_6535231eed95b29a: ^1Shaw: ^7This absolutely will not stand! I demand a do-over!
hash_6538ccff4cabe1f4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This could stop a bullet, not to mention a ghoul's teeth.
hash_6538cdff4cabe3a7: ^1The Brigadier: ^7"The ironclad Brigadier." I like the sound of that.
hash_653f98b25318a3cf: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7So, Godfrey, did they teach you to fight in butler school? "Ten ways to kill with a cummerbund"? That sorta thing?
hash_6546831e9dfe0508: ^1Shaw: ^7The market is collapsing! Sell! Sell! Sell!     Wait, no that's not right -BUY! From the box!
hash_6546881e9dfe0d87: ^1Scarlett: ^7You hear that? Time to load up and let loose!
hash_6546891e9dfe0f3a: ^1Bruno: ^7An opportunity to procure ourselves better weapon... Or a worse one.
hash_65468a1e9dfe10ed: ^1Diego: ^7With prices so low, one is almost guaranteed to make a killing.
hash_654e6338c2469220: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Mirela giveth...t he Chakram taketh away.
hash_6558d99dee45bbc8: ^1Shaw: ^7You're very good at this Bruno! I'm finding myself feeling a little bit insecure.
hash_6558de9dee45c447: ^1Scarlett: ^7Can't tell if you learned that as a gangster or a soldier, Bruno.
hash_65669d56a1224430: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Nora! I nearly had a tumble. Blood isn't normally that viscous!
hash_6571da6f9e62da8d: ^1Bruno: ^7I only made it angrier. Stupid one-armed monstre.
hash_6598aea3ee239b3d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Guess I should've worn an apron...
hash_659dab5e96d1ce3f: ^1Bruno: ^7When I first met your father, he did not impress me greatly, but he entered a time in my life when I needed... change.
hash_65be75ce68607aad: ^1Scarlett: ^7Talk to me Shaw! In the chaos, when everything started changing - you looked like you'd seen it all before.
hash_65cdf26062e32586: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gotta learn when to quit, son.
hash_65da1963c080a2e3: ^1Godfrey: ^7This grove was once sacred to the Druids. I always avoid it at night.
hash_65da1a63c080a496: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I thought it would feel safer outside. Reckon I was wrong.
hash_65da1b63c080a649: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Anyone else get the feeling we shouldn't have ventured out here?

hash_664286efa0f17c03: ^1Diego: ^7Are you okay, Shaw? You seem - I'm searching for the English word -     You seem...
hash_664d9566f1de30e8: ^1Shaw: ^7The weapon *seems* to travel through some sort of gateway.     I wonder if WE could also travel through it?!
hash_664d9a66f1de3967: ^1Scarlett: ^7Looks like my gun's got a little extra 'ooomph'.
hash_664d9b66f1de3b1a: ^1Bruno: ^7Perhaps there a hidden realm beyond the... 'mirage'.
hash_664d9c66f1de3ccd: ^1Diego: ^7I hope the rapid delivery did not compromise the quality of the workmanship...
hash_66696e570f61dd7b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This thing can't work fast enough.
hash_666acf321ec30f59: ^1Shaw: ^7I feel like the walls are closing in around me. Is this it? My final moments?!     Nah, I think I'm okay.
hash_666ad0321ec3110c: ^1Diego: ^7Should I pick them off one by one, or vanquish them all in a single explosion?
hash_666ad1321ec312bf: ^1Bruno: ^7No matter the opposition, I will stand my ground.
hash_666ad2321ec31472: ^1Scarlett: ^7Which of you is the strongest? I'll start there and work my way down.
hash_6676519bf2c40bb1: ^1Shaw: ^7A little tingle tells me the Dragon and Viper are ready...to do far worse than tingle...
hash_6676529bf2c40d64: ^1Diego: ^7Ahhhh, Viper and Dragon. My two favorite senoritas.
hash_6676539bf2c40f17: ^1Bruno: ^7I can feel the Viper and Dragon are ready for battle.
hash_6676549bf2c410ca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Feels like Viper and Dragon are champing at the bit.
hash_6677a4eb19ad34a0: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm still alive. I cannot believe I'm still alive.
hash_6677a6eb19ad3806: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Dead? Good. First decent thing you've done all night.
hash_6677a7eb19ad39b9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn, son. You took longer to die than a snail crossin' peanut butter.
hash_667ac6a82d429ca4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Get up, Shaw. We need all hands on deck - Even the shaky ones.
hash_667ac8a82d42a00a: ^1Diego: ^7Here you go, Shaw - I hope this is the right medicine for your particular 'ailment'.
hash_667ac9a82d42a1bd: ^1Bruno: ^7I will not abandon you, Shaw. The others? Probably. But me? No.
hash_667ba4278a0cce7e: ^1Shaw: ^7Who's up for a nice game of ring-toss?
hash_667ba7278a0cd397: ^1Diego: ^7Pardon me while I whip these out.
hash_66a7f79bce41216f: ^1Godfrey: ^7Purity is the one thing you beasts cannot stand.
hash_66a7f89bce412322: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Silver may as well be poison to y'all.
hash_66a7f99bce4124d5: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Snicker-snakt, you evil bag of bones!
hash_66b8322fd6769201: ^1Diego: ^7*spits* So bad...I can actually taste it...!
hash_66b8332fd67693b4: ^1Shaw: ^7Doesn't smell that bad. Try me after a week on the pipe. Now that-- whoa-HO-HO, that is something special.
hash_66ceba9ad4c2f986: ^1Shaw: ^7Low ammo.     I'm 99% sure that's not a good thing.
hash_66cebd9ad4c2fe9f: ^1Diego: ^7My weapon is almost empty... I am usually not so careless.
hash_66cebf9ad4c30205: ^1Scarlett: ^7Killing all these freaks sure burns through ammunition.
hash_66e08ecd47315fa7: ^1Godfrey: ^7Thank you, Brigadier General. I shall try to prove myself worthy of this second chance.
hash_66e08fcd4731615a: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I'm okay now, Brigs. And I'll return the favor if I can.
hash_66e8b7ef233421d6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gotta admit, my new friends are pulling their weight. You never know till you're put to the test.
hash_66e8b8ef23342389: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That Yank's not half the fool I thought he was. Hell, he reminds me of me.

hash_66ef0f7d27fbffb9: ķE%jĎpņĒťúÍÖ4^0yŇ …Ęe<ŃŹďŻ√””4úű\v¬°ö›3ūęŻ\aö{+en "dog soldiers." Y'think they had this asshole in mind?
hash_66f93fc52ba9f6c1: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Fellas...? I don't really do the damsel in distress thing, so I'm not gonna ask for help, but if you guys want me around to save your asses, you might wanna consider giving me a hand here? For your own good, not mine, okay?
hash_6705307cafe5cb3c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I feel ya, Scepter. You got somethin' new to show me?
hash_6705317cafe5ccef: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Yes, Scepter, I've not forgotten you. Any new tricks?
hash_67240f5443fc863a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7A gun from a wall. Sure, why not?
hash_67290061bd06c97e: ^1Shaw: ^7That "cleared the fog" a bit!?     Maybe too much.
hash_67290261bd06cce4: ^1Bruno: ^7It as though my lungs have been opened.    Possibly literally.
hash_67290361bd06ce97: ^1Diego: ^7A vapor to elevate my senses? Si, por favor. Wooooah!
hash_6737e21a41be7f3c: ^1Scarlett: ^7So does this make me a Valkyrie?
hash_673972e194437cf7: ^1Godfrey: ^7How on Earth will I explain this to the constables tomorrow?
hash_673973e194437eaa: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Ain't nothin' wrong with you I can't fix with my hands.
hash_673974e19443805d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Anyone else want to shake hands?
hash_6746d249a8e69558: ^1Scarlett: ^7Yeah - BURN! Keeps me from getting your nasty guts all over my hands!
hash_6768e4bfd7fcffa4: ^1The Brigadier: ^7At last, someone created a weapon worthy of my rank!
hash_6768e5bfd7fd0157: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I have never felt more dangerous. And that's sayin' something.
hash_6768e6bfd7fd030a: ^1Godfrey: ^7I've just become the world's deadliest major-domo.
hash_678ad49f67818f15: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Thanks for giving me a hand.  You can let go now.
hash_679bfb3437a42583: ^1Shaw: ^7GOOD LORD!!! Did everyone else see what just happened?     Wait. It may just be my so called senses deceiving me.     I'll be okay in a minute.
hash_67ac28821d6e07d3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shouldn't you know what you're doing, Shaw? Haven't you fought these things before?
hash_67ac29821d6e0986: ^1Bruno: ^7Are you scared, Shaw? Are you hoping to be ignored if you play dead?
hash_67ac2a821d6e0b39: ^1Diego: ^7You need to pay more attention, amigo. There are many things here that want to hurt you.
hash_67b05f9cecb59b39: ^1Shaw: ^7Oww! Don't you know the face is the second most fragile part of the body?!
hash_67c1475ac990f0f1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll get to every one of you Scab-heads before I'm through...
hash_67cc7b6e9c863be0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7My gun gets any lighter, it'll be a damn paperweight.
hash_67cc7c6e9c863d93: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Best find more bullets before my guns go silent.
hash_67cc7e6e9c8640f9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Down to my last few bullets. Best make them count.
hash_67d2534087d80439: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Quite. It's a rum business and no mistake. Alistair Rhodes not bothering to host his own party...?
hash_67ee387c1b877438: ^1Bruno: ^7This brings back memories, memories I wish not to recall.
hash_67ee397c1b8775eb: ^1Diego: ^7It would be so much easier if this contraption just let me choose the weapon I want.
hash_67ee3e7c1b877e6a: ^1Shaw: ^7Ah yes, the shotgun. England's preferred method for addressing a rodent problem.
hash_67f9262e68667c41: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Feels like I've grabbed hold of Zeus's lightning bolt.
hash_67fc60e09b45cf03: ^1Shaw: ^7Little sniff to straighten the body... and the mind...     Wait - how did I get here??! Am I on a boat??! Is that the ocean??!
hash_68028ae23a3a976b: ^1Shaw: ^7For a second, I thought I saw a little glint of light from the other side.
hash_68028fe23a3a9fea: ^1Diego: ^7It looks better now, si? Much less ugly  above the neck.
hash_68361f135023f680: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm down! I'm dying! The end! I see light! Getting closer! AHHH!
hash_683624135023feff: ^1Scarlett: ^7This day, this week, this damn month better not get any worse.
hash_68362513502400b2: ^1Bruno: ^7Once more, I am at death's door. This time, Alistair is not here to save me.
hash_6836261350240265: ^1Diego: ^7Hopefully no one saw that. Diego 'The Clumsy' Necalli is not a nickname I wish to acquire.
hash_683a1f700f0d9eb8: ^1Shaw: ^7Double the points, you say?     Well, 'When in Rome', I suppose!
hash_683a25700f0da8ea: ^1Bruno: ^7I have long given up the pursuit of wealth.
hash_683a26700f0daa9d: ^1Diego: ^7Good things come to those who wait.. And those impatient ones who just decide to take them.
hash_683b58d44a4d639c: ^1Godfrey: ^7Pardon my French, sir, but get your ruddy backside out of there!
hash_683f3cfb5e6c04c9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Me with no ammo - Ain't good for anyone.
hash_6863052091a128bc: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7And now for my rendition of an old seaside favorite... Punch and Judy!
hash_6884472e7f24b233: ^1Narrator: ^7That's a good one if you find yourself in a bind - or just fancy a change in scenery.
hash_68874448c7da6b19: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7All right, who needs a shave? Just kidding: you all do!
hash_6889e419fa426aca: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I haven't lost a step. You, on the other hand...
hash_6895f409b3b3dd81: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7No, Gideon Jones! The Spirit Realm cannot have you yet! There's lots more stuff to shoot here...!
hash_68c6d02d28d99293: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Okay, folks, the line starts to the left.
hash_68ddc02173885150: ^1Shaw: ^7That is quite enough from you, Slappy Daniels!
hash_68ddc521738859cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7I really hope you're not dumb enough to think that was a smart idea.
hash_68ddc72173885d35: ^1Diego: ^7You wish to fight, bestia? Mano y mano?
hash_68fc265c6ef1d75e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Feels like I stepped in it this time.
hash_68fc275c6ef1d911: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This doesn't seem to be working.
hash_691600d16018ba58: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I sense death and destruction coming. I'll be the one bringing it.
hash_69261045b5f31d9c: ^1Ghost: ^7They say, "You can't get water from a stone." Here's proof you can. Go on, take a swig. Give your friends a nice surprise.
hash_692fd13f4a8b347c: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, so you do not mind losing an arm? Let's see you be so cavalier about losing your face.
hash_692fd23f4a8b362f: ^1Bruno: ^7Why won't you unholy beasts just die??
hash_6939d79856f8be46: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Boom! Oh, how I've missed that sound!
hash_6939d89856f8bff9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Walked right into that, didn't ya?
hash_6988a40621dac345: ^1Narrator: ^7You can switch between the different weapons you have equipped.
hash_6991f7c8ec3d8b58: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ain't it cute when it rips out their throats?
hash_69a6dd6c6038db2b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Somebody's havin' a real good laugh at my expense right now.
hash_69a6de6c6038dcde: ^1Godfrey: ^7I get no respect around here. Not even from this box.
hash_69b8f064e6919d78: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I do believe I've found your sweet-spot. Now just hold still and it'll all be over soon.
hash_69b8f164e6919f2b: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I've bagged lions, elephants, cape buffalo... none were as satisfying as this!
hash_69b8f364e691a291: ^1Godfrey: ^7I don't know how much more of this I can take.
hash_69b9f722478062d0: ^1Godfrey: ^7A gentleman's weapon. Precise, but with plenty of punch.
hash_69b9f92247806636: ^1The Brigadier: ^7No chance I'll shoot into the brown with a rifle like this.
hash_69b9fa22478067e9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This would make a fine buffalo rifle, but I got a different kinda herd to thin out.
hash_69c100e57afe4d4b: ^1Scarlett: ^7This is a piece of engineering. Wish it came with a manual.
hash_69cf2855b020667e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Let that be a lesson to you scoundrels!
hash_69cf2955b0206831: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I wouldn't have hit back, but they'd say I'm goin' soft.
hash_69d1c05f4094e59d: ^1Narrator: ^7Sprinting will bring you back to your feet..
hash_69de2f9a5782cfce: ^1Shaw: ^7Bloody Hell! I nearly went arse over tit. Blood isn't normally that viscous!
hash_69de319a5782d334: ^1Bruno: ^7Death is your only way off this ship. It is better that we all accept this fact.
hash_69de329a5782d4e7: ^1Diego: ^7I feel as though this killing streak is building toward a grand crescendo!
hash_69eb0711818512f1: ^1Diego: ^7Now - I am no fool. You know *something* of what is unfolding on this vessel, Scarlett.     Which leads me to ask -     How much - exactly - did your father explain in his letter?
hash_69fe226d9d749a08: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Helluva kick, but I can't argue with the results.
hash_69fe236d9d749bbb: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Zounds! The Dragon is a bloodthirsty beast.
hash_69fe256d9d749f21: ^1Godfrey: ^7One less mouth to feed, so to speak.
hash_6a0b70a86ed2aaae: ^1Bruno: ^7It is best not to dwell on moment of happiness - it will be fleeting.
hash_6a0b71a86ed2ac61: ^1Diego: ^7Such success is my gift to you all. You can thank me later.
hash_6a0b72a86ed2ae14: ^1Shaw: ^7A win is a win is a win is a win.
hash_6a166a9bb51df48e: ^1Shaw: ^7Mmm. Tastes like bleach and glue.     I should probably try to improve on that.
hash_6a166c9bb51df7f4: ^1Bruno: ^7I wonder if Shaw is familiar with Absinthe? Who am I kidding, he probably has it with breakfast.
hash_6a166d9bb51df9a7: ^1Diego: ^7May this elixir imbue me with power...    And... nothing... else.
hash_6a166f9bb51dfd0d: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just a shot of liquid courage.   Mostly courage.
hash_6a1fe81859c918f9: ^1Shaw: ^7An inanimate object manifests a complex mechanism out of thin air, and...    Wait a tick, it also TOOK. MY. MONEY!
hash_6a1fe91859c91aac: ^1Diego: ^7I wonder what else the walls are selling tonight. Any tequila?
hash_6a1fea1859c91c5f: ^1Bruno: ^7If my journeys with Alistair taught me anything, it is not to question the unexplainable.
hash_6a1feb1859c91e12: ^1Scarlett: ^7I guess this is the new normal. Long as it keeps me alive...

hash_6a2dbf40496a4d33: ^1Shaw: ^7Well of course that worked out exactly as planned. How could it not?
hash_6a2dc240496a524c: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's a step in the right direction. One. Literally.
hash_6a2dc440496a55b2: ^1Diego: ^7Success was only to be expected. I am Diego Necalli, after all.
hash_6a2dc540496a5765: ^1Bruno: ^7A moment of success does not mean we have time to rejoice.
hash_6a4206b1723e12fb: ^1Godfrey: ^7Master Alistair spoke of a Celtic vampire named Abhartach. Are these meant to be his offspring?
hash_6a4207b1723e14ae: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Them bloodsuckers run like angry turkeys. You can't un-see it once you notice.
hash_6a4208b1723e1661: ^1The Brigadier: ^7And the vampires just keep coming...

hash_6a49b39a7c4edebb: b!&=<i ^7Flirting with death once again, Diego?
hash_6a49b49a7c4ee06e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Your big fat mouth get you in trouble again, Diego?
hash_6a49b99a7c4ee8ed: ^1Shaw: ^7Is this the climax of your story Diego? If you die at the end, I don't want to know.
hash_6a7f397dcaf15594: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I don't need a crystal ball to know this thing's gonna be great.
hash_6a815827f1f1ed6b: ^1Narrator: ^7Special weapons gain their charge from killing zombies - They'll get stronger the more you use them.
hash_6a8b74b1c95f88e8: ^1Diego: ^7No one wrongs Diego Necalli, and lives to tell the tale.
hash_6a8b75b1c95f8a9b: ^1Bruno: ^7Your death should be a warning for the others.
hash_6a8b76b1c95f8c4e: ^1Scarlett: ^7You may not remember why, but trust me - you deserved that.
hash_6a8d9d8c202007d3: ^1Godfrey: ^7I am...most grateful you were invited to the party.
hash_6a8d9f8c20200b39: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You would've made a fine medic back in the Transvaal.
hash_6a8fed7c5a8a2dbb: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Don't you dare die before I do. It's "age before beauty," don't you know?
hash_6a8fef7c5a8a3121: ^1Godfrey: ^7Mustn't lie down now, sir. The Wild West show must go on.
hash_6a93e800d6219d27: ^1Shaw: ^7Haven't smelled anything that foul since I soiled the bed.
hash_6aa7c0326197e303: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly?  I'm just pissing in the wind here...
hash_6aa7c3326197e81c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's see if these stay up longer than the last ones did.
hash_6aa7c5326197eb82: ^1Diego: ^7I feel this is akin to trying to dam a river with only twigs.
hash_6aa7c6326197ed35: ^1Bruno: ^7These boards will not hold them for long - just long enough for us to move to a stronger position.
hash_6acc2d3c40a78088: ^1Shaw: ^7How does that vomitous blighter even stay upright?
hash_6acc343c40a78c6d: ^1Diego: ^7I will snap those scrawny legs when I get the chance!
hash_6adbaec92fbef628: ^1Bruno: ^7There must be lifeboats nearby. I should get on lifeboat.     There is nothing here for me now.
hash_6adbafc92fbef7db: ^1Diego: ^7Hmm... Still alone. No sign of Scarlett nor Bruno.  I need an ally in this fight. Someone I can rely on when things get more dangerous - More wild!     Lady McKendrick?
hash_6adbb1c92fbefb41: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shake it off, Scar. Forget what he said on page 4. Forget everything the old bastard said. Concentrate on the now.
hash_6adbb4c92fbf005a: ^1Shaw: ^7That big stony thing I saw earlier looked really interesting.     Smelled nice, anyway. Very... Aromatic.
hash_6adfb9721e011418: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A lad could get to feeling invincible throwing these.
hash_6adfba721e0115cb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Best game of ring-toss I ever played.
hash_6adffdf266b459a4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I was wrong to doubt you, homunculus. Lesson learned.
hash_6adffef266b45b57: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Oh, I am granting you a field-promotion, Lieutenant Homunculus.
hash_6ae000f266b45ebd: ^1Godfrey: ^7That ghastly little beast just took down a ghoul! Where can I find more like him?
hash_6ae054de5fe4c04e: ^1Shaw: ^7It's not the bite that kills you... it's the fucking razor-storm.
hash_6ae056de5fe4c3b4: ^1Bruno: ^7It is as if the shards hypnotize them.
hash_6ae057de5fe4c567: ^1Diego: ^7You cannot resist the Viper's kiss, eh, chupacarnes?
hash_6ae8f65188e94213: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Is this just because I'm a dame?
hash_6aed43a50e52fa3e: ^1Shaw: ^7Life and death, all wrapped up in one handy package.
hash_6aed45a50e52fda4: ^1Bruno: ^7Let us send the monstres into the light.
hash_6aed46a50e52ff57: ^1Diego: ^7Let's light up this ocean liner -- make 'em see us from shore.
hash_6aed48a50e5302bd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's stick some light where the sun don't shine.
hash_6afa51919d488d81: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»Ā^≠`K∂Õ5Šās/ÉŃĺŔĹ[¬‚∂ó"ōßŖ∆ŖĮęe me, but the ghouls sure can.
hash_6afc316a3709b688: ^1Diego: ^7My body... I felt myself disintegrate. I hope I'm still 'built' as I was...
hash_6afc326a3709b83b: ^1Bruno: ^7Now where am I? Am I still on this cursed vessel?
hash_6afc336a3709b9ee: ^1Scarlett: ^7That thing's handy for a quick exit...      Leaves the stomach a bit rough, though.
hash_6afc386a3709c26d: ^1Shaw: ^7I've been ripped across time and space!!     Oh no, I'm still on the ship.    ...fuck me.
hash_6b024d75b4042414: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I demand satisfaction! And I usually get it.
hash_6b024e75b40425c7: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Tell the Devil that Gideon Jones sent ya.
hash_6b0c47459fb4a647: ^1Godfrey: ^7The Master insisted on all the modern conveniences. I'm sorry I ever questioned him.
hash_6b0c48459fb4a7fa: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I once saw a cow get struck by lightnin'. This here's a dramatic re-enactment.
hash_6b0c49459fb4a9ad: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Time to call down the lightning.
hash_6b2b9b1b339e7812: ^1Diego: ^7When will they learn not to bunch together like that?
hash_6b2b9c1b339e79c5: ^1Bruno: ^7I could have used you in my Paris days.
hash_6b448ef95081bfe8: ^1Godfrey: ^7You should put some ice on that.
hash_6b4491f95081c501: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I let my hammer do the talkin'...
hash_6b4883f0552573f0: ^1Bruno: ^7Some may call this weapon useless. I would call them unskilled.
hash_6b4884f0552575a3: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, the sniper rifle. Choice of the coward and the cautious.
hash_6b4886f055257909: ^1Scarlett: ^7Man, I've held gearsticks with more kickback that these puppies...
hash_6b4889f055257e22: ^1Shaw: ^7Evelyn would laugh if she saw me now.    Stop it, stop it! We don't care what she thinks, Shaw! Not anymore!
hash_6b532f5d19ae2e30: ^1Scarlett: ^7If you're looking to take something off, I'm sure these creatures would be more than happy to relieve you of a limb or two.      Either that or I will. Straighten up and fly right Shaw.
hash_6b5efa02ab5c1029: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»ĀE≠CÍéĮ<Ńéí*sÉďłüŚYĀrĚ/xť™ÜĽÍkn'! Blow my house down, will you?
hash_6b685f2bd03ed636: ^1Shaw: ^7Feel the bite of my blade! I mean whip! Wait. Blade-whip? Whip-blade?
hash_6b68612bd03ed99c: ^1Bruno: ^7Magnifique. They fall like wheat before le Viper.
hash_6b68622bd03edb4f: ^1Diego: ^7Not the first sword I have held, but never one like this!
hash_6b68642bd03edeb5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Damn! The Viper is mean as a snake!
hash_6b6cc87092227963: ^1Godfrey: ^7Why does this just feel like grasping at straws?
hash_6b6cc97092227b16: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Where's this shootin' iron come from? And where's the money go?
hash_6b6cca7092227cc9: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Ours is not to reason why, just grab a gun and watch lead fly.
hash_6b804bfcbd4a2293: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Oh, blast. Or lack of blast, as the case may be.
hash_6b804dfcbd4a25f9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, if things go pear-shaped I can always use this on myself.
hash_6b92dce3d32bbe7e: ^1Shaw: ^7Yes, yes, keep coming -- plenty of volts to go around.
hash_6b92dee3d32bc1e4: ^1Bruno: ^7Fry, monstres! Every last one of you!
hash_6b92dfe3d32bc397: ^1Diego: ^7What do you know? Lightning does strike twice.
hash_6bac38874cc9d882: ^1Scarlett: ^7Could everyone just shut their yaps and concentrate on securing the area? I was told I could trust you. Can you please show me that my father wasn't entirely full of shit?
hash_6bae057a22520af3: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I sure wish Buffalo Bill could see this. He'd be proud as can be!
hash_6bbd072ceb149725: ^1Shaw: ^7Ooooh. That's a toughie - I'm not really thinking clearly at the moment - probably because of all the... you know.     But I do know Alistair was very, very sorry about what happened to you.     Gutted in fact.
hash_6bcafc8864588353: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7It's just a flesh wound, my dear Brigadier. A little shot of this and Bob's your uncle.
hash_6bdf49c4aea801e0: ^1Ghost: ^7My, aren't you a strapping young buck? I'm Catherine, the nursemaid.
hash_6be2b91309abe6dc: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Zounds! Feels like I just got fired from a cannon!
hash_6be2ba1309abe88f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7"Fast travel"? More like, "Get the hell out of Dodge."
hash_6be562826c594bc0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7If Custer had this at the Little Bighorn, he'd still be alive.
hash_6be563826c594d73: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Not exactly standard issue, but it should do the trick.
hash_6be565826c5950d9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Assault rifle' has such a lovely ring to it.
hash_6be800032ab31b36: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Was that luck, or intuition? Who cares, eh?
hash_6be801032ab31ce9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Guess my noggin's good for more'n a hat-rack.

hash_6d0120a3629bb6bb: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I once whupped half a saloon with a pool cue. Wasn't nowhere near as fun as swingin' this thing.

hash_6f2119e6fb287b5d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Stone the crows! Smells like my whiskers are burning--!
hash_6f283f0c8ee9e10a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Just so's you know -- I won't be talking to you in the afterlife.

hash_6f6c44938d24a99f: ^1Bruno: ^7I do not consume for flavor - only for effect.
hash_6f6c45938d24ab52: ^1Scarlett: ^7Maybe mix it with a little whiskey next time.

hash_6fa4af4f36176ed3: ^1Narrator: ^7Perks can mean the difference between life and...you know.   Just buy it, will you?
