hash_6fc0a3bfe83935a2: ^1Godfrey: ^7Must take care not to bring down the house.
hash_6ffa8ec68c2f2eee: ^1Shaw: ^7Did that surprise you? It did me.

hash_6ffa93c68c2f376d: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm not in the mood tonight, slack-skin!

hash_7007de046fb26398: ^1Godfrey: ^7Sir, while I was down, I heard something...a voice... Never mind.
hash_7007e1046fb268b1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Feelin' pretty pleased with yourself, ain't ya?
hash_700860de8424530b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Ooh. I'm not sure I like that. I'm a bit woozy.
hash_700ec4931b35071d: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My shield is dead. Long live my next shield!
hash_70103806cee7cf1c: ^1Bruno: ^7I thought the medallion belonged to Scarlett - A gift from her father?
hash_701c3244456cdf46: ^1Shaw: ^7When Scarlett was little, Alistair brought her something quite similar as a gift. Hmmm... Maybe not the best idea.

hash_70814136074ee7d0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7That's it. Death has caught me at last and the pearly gates beckon. As the Bard said, "all good things must come to an end." Why am I not sorry? Why do I want to embrace Alistair and thank him for inviting me to this abattoir of a party? Because whatever else happens tonight, no one can deny that the old soldier has still got it!
hash_70814236074ee983: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7This ain't how I pictured my ultimate demise. Oh, I know I ain't headed for heaven, but I didn't think I'd see demons till after I gave up the ghost. I'm a fake, and a drunk, born twenty years too late to be any kind of cowboy. Wild West my ass. Whole thing was over before I even got there.
hash_7099a31813f75c50: ^1Shaw: ^7That one could have done with just a smidge more lemon, don't you think?
hash_7099a81813f764cf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Shaw may be a good chemist, but he's a terrible barkeep.
hash_7099a91813f76682: ^1Bruno: ^7As a Chemist, Shaw does not appear to have the Midas touch.
hash_7099aa1813f76835: ^1Diego: ^7Leave it to a Brit to underestimate the importance of 'taste'.
hash_70a5092920b6c06c: ^1The Brigadier: ^7"Madame Mirela." World-famous spiritualist. Queen of the Great Beyond. Don't sell me a dog, girl: is Mirela really your name?
hash_70b5472a2a30b800: ^1Shaw: ^7How long was I out? Did I miss anything?
hash_70b54c2a2a30c07f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Let's both pretend this didn't happen, all right?
hash_70b54e2a2a30c3e5: ^1Diego: ^7Admit it, Frenchman: the world would have been a darker place without Diego.
hash_70bcab00f5f49bb2: ^1Diego: ^7You should thank me for such a merciful death.
hash_70de8f4475e32d28: ^1Scarlett: ^7The passengers have been changed!   Just like that creep who snatched the artifact and started this whole thing!
hash_70de914475e3308e: ^1Diego: ^7I don't know why, but somehow - We  escaped being turned into monsters like everyone else on board.
hash_70de924475e33241: ^1Bruno: ^7A dark magique has cursed the whole ship - and those aboard.
hash_70e9fc6ccc1ad4f8: ^1Diego: ^7Did you see that?! I'm pretty sure several limbs definitely went airborne.
hash_70e9fd6ccc1ad6ab: ^1Bruno: ^7I've long become numb to the sound of explosions.
hash_70e9fe6ccc1ad85e: ^1Scarlett: ^7I've been on the receiving end of a few explosions in my time - It's not fun.
hash_70ea036ccc1ae0dd: ^1Shaw: ^7I blew you to bits! 'Bits' that's  all you are now!
hash_70f13685e1bd6450: ^1Bruno: ^7Seeing that creature vomit...    Makes me wish to...
hash_70f13785e1bd6603: ^1Diego: ^7I am surprised to learn you still have stomachs to vomit from.
hash_70f13c85e1bd6e82: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh deary... you didn't have fish for dinner, did you??

hash_71070c2de4354319: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'm thinking it may prove to be a pain to reload.
hash_711005654f1f3375: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Penny for your thoughts. Sorry - I don't have change.
hash_7110bfe8943b3403: ^1Godfrey: ^7Subtle? No. Refined? Certainly not. Brutal? Most definitely...
hash_7110c0e8943b35b6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I met indians who loved fightin' with war clubs. I'm startin' to get why.
hash_7110c1e8943b3769: ^1The Brigadier: ^7My enemies are broken things, and I have just the tool to fix them.
hash_71185ddf94f0e38b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Oh, that's cheerful. At least I've still got a long life ahead of me.
hash_711b05faa928fd56: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I wonder if this comes in pink. Y'know, for Godfrey.
hash_7121ff3bf6e9c779: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm getting REALLY into this whole  murdering business.     I'm so glad it's just a dream!
hash_7122003bf6e9c92c: ^1Diego: ^7I will stand strong this night. I have the stamina of stallion.
hash_7122013bf6e9cadf: ^1Bruno: ^7The red mist descends once more. Will it ever clear?
hash_7127dbc40210eab5: ^1Shaw: ^7Alistair, you devious devil! If this is all your way of collecting that bail money I still owe you...!
hash_713689f14d73e121: ^1Ghost: ^7You're a faithful one, aren't you, Brigadier? Not like my James. Not at all. James Dixon. Wife-beating drunk. He got what he deserved.
hash_713b062473962647: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Thank you, sir. I owe you one.
hash_713b0724739627fa: ^1Godfrey: ^7Sorry to be of trouble to you, sir.
hash_713fe1b6b87da153: ^1Shaw: ^7Looks like it has a weak spot on its shoulders. Achilles' pimples, if you will.
hash_713fe4b6b87da66c: ^1Scarlett: ^7Aim for the lumps on its back! And try not to throw up.
hash_719fb872fd7ae738: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Gotta say, this is my favorite wallpaper.
hash_71a92ddac723398c: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, come now, box. At least give me a fighting chance.
hash_71a92fdac7233cf2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I am underwhelmed, to say the least.
hash_71af682362cfac3a: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Excellent, Godfrey! The spirits say you'll save us all! And fix us sandwiches when this is over...!
hash_71b75b50a35d49f3: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hope that blast was effective as it sounded - I definitely heard bones break...
hash_71b75d50a35d4d59: ^1Diego: ^7I just got showered with blood. I may need a very long bath after this.
hash_71b75e50a35d4f0c: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not normally this destructive - except to myself.
hash_71bc5599ea6e24c0: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Any more for any more? I fucking dare you.
hash_71bc5799ea6e2826: ^1Godfrey: ^7I deserve a promotion for that. I won't get it.
hash_71c6e56229bdf780: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Howdy, ma'am. Guess you and me are in the same boat now. Spectrally speakin'.
hash_71d52f71d81884a7: ^1Diego: ^7I met Alistair last year - in Juarez, Mexico.     He was a man 'obsessed'...
hash_71db3cfb8b76d14f: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Careful. This one's down but not out.
hash_720561bc97e21378: ^1Shaw: ^7Si, Diego! Kill them all! Especially the ones nearest me!
hash_720566bc97e21bf7: ^1Scarlett: ^7You're enjoying this aren't you Diego? I can tell by that goofy grin.
hash_720567bc97e21daa: ^1Bruno: ^7You seem determined to show off, Diego...     Even if no one is watching.
hash_7206c8f8aa28c3d0: ^1Diego: ^7Out of ammo? How... reckless of me.
hash_7206c9f8aa28c583: ^1Bruno: ^7No ammo?     Fine. Then with my hands.
hash_7206caf8aa28c736: ^1Scarlett: ^7And that, as they say, is that...
hash_7206cff8aa28cfb5: ^1Shaw: ^7You see, Shaw? I told you you'd run out of ammo, and what did you do?     Nothing!
hash_720d8f6f208c426a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7The old soldier's still got it!
hash_720de7e8e26bee7e: ^1Shaw: ^7It must be the artifact... It's transmogrified the passengers, to create...     A box!!
hash_720de9e8e26bf1e4: ^1Bruno: ^7Everything aboard this vessel has become twisted and malformed... but for what purpose?
hash_720deae8e26bf397: ^1Diego: ^7It looks very much like a box... and the purpose of a box - however strange - it to contain something.
hash_720dece8e26bf6fd: ^1Scarlett: ^7Oh, what the hell?? Is that made from people??
hash_7224247fff4bb7f9: ^1Shaw: ^7Careful, now! The Viper's fangs are razor-sharp!
hash_7224257fff4bb9ac: ^1Diego: ^7You catch more flies with honey -- and more ghouls with blood.
hash_7224267fff4bbb5f: ^1Bruno: ^7I did not think the Viper could be more terrifying, but I was wrong.
hash_7224277fff4bbd12: ^1Scarlett: ^7Holy crap! The Viper just got meaner.

hash_72b09c91939e2b68: ^1Shaw: ^7Honestly, a weapon this heavy actually just helps keep my hands steady.

hash_72b0a291939e359a: ^1Bruno: ^7I look forward to the day when my life is no longer defined nor tainted by violence.
hash_72b0a391939e374d: ^1Diego: ^7Diego Necalli can master any weapon of combat - even one as cumbersome as this.
hash_72b9a8f6bfb207f8: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Y'know, Mutton Chops, I bet you were hot stuff back before they invented electricity.
hash_72e9816d9ed62a99: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Move your ass, Brigadier! Like, now!
hash_730c82172286827c: ^1Godfrey: ^7That's what I get for skipping university.
hash_730c8417228685e2: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Time to pull back and marshal my forces.
hash_730c851722868795: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Let's just call this a misfire.
hash_730cc3cd5a00224d: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Pop! The old man loves bustin' skulls.

hash_733864914174a8c0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Well it's this or build our own coffins.
hash_733865914174aa73: ^1The Brigadier: ^7We keep plugging holes, they keep getting in.
hash_733867914174add9: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, I suppose this beats emptying chamber pots.

hash_736a5a4f44253bbd: ^1Godfrey: ^7We have some unruly guests to attend to, you and I.
hash_736a73cb31cd44c7: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7I read a novel where a bloke used lightning to resurrect the dead. Just having a laugh. Imagine me reading a novel...

hash_7399743dcb34369a: ^1Bruno: ^7Well, no wonder it was screaming so much.
hash_73af0edfb3370da8: ^1Godfrey: ^7Regardless of the time, I am definitely in the wrong place.
hash_73af10dfb337110e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This is why I hate parties.
hash_73af11dfb33712c1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Don't box me in, you pushy sons of bitches.
hash_73b25554684d8e00: ^1Godfrey: ^7Why does every step forward only make things worse?
hash_73b25754684d9166: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Here come the dogs of war!

hash_73ec8f0521f4e44a: ^1Shaw: ^7I's probably best if I hold onto this. Not sure the others can be trusted...
hash_73f5911e57e2b730: ^1Shaw: ^7What manner of chemical interaction could lead to a combustion that targets *only* our adversaries...     Frankly, I'm drawing a blank.
hash_73f5971e57e2c162: ^1Bruno: ^7Sometimes - Fire brings new life.     This fire, brings only death.
hash_73f5981e57e2c315: ^1Diego: ^7These are no flames of passion, but still - they remind me of Paris.
hash_73f9dd72168380a4: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Got us a wanderin' campfire here.

hash_7412b9a5b91ade80: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7The dinin' room. Guess that fits the bill, now we're all on the menu.
hash_7412baa5b91ae033: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I've spent more than a few pleasant evenings in here with Alistair. Where the hell is he?
hash_7412bca5b91ae399: ^1Godfrey: ^7Sadly, I fear supper will not be served this evening. Nor ever again.
hash_741b522bf597f896: ^1Diego: ^7Give me a minute.     I'm sorry... But do you really not hear yourself?     I will help you - Just go over there for a little while.

hash_79bf9a0b69911b80: ^1Bruno: ^7There was a time I could readily lay my hands on any weapon I chose.     There was no cost involved.
hash_79bf9b0b69911d33: ^1Diego: ^7I hope no one is insinuating that I am unable to pay my own way.
hash_79bf9d0b69912099: ^1Scarlett: ^7Wish I could get a deal on a halfway decent toolkit...      The things I could do.
hash_79bfa00b699125b2: ^1Shaw: ^7Something's happening. I think it's   a good thing. A real money saver.
hash_79e85c8b63774bdc: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Where the hell did everyone go?! This better be a joke Alistair, or this is the worst party I've ever been invited to!
hash_7a1e454ee1e3b950: ^1Godfrey: ^7Things like, "Only the strong survive," and, "In the end, you'll kill them all." I know that may sound encouraging, but it scares the living daylights out of me.
hash_7a4a742e7439faa0: ^1Shaw: ^7Why does it seem like we just made things worse?
hash_7a4a792e743a031f: ^1Scarlett: ^7Anyone else feel like I just hit the 'on' switch for the meat-grinder?
hash_7a4a7b2e743a0685: ^1Diego: ^7You know...this 'simple' assignment gets more and more complicated by the minute.
hash_7a4abd24734eae0d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You okay, miss? Don't know if you noticed, but I been tryin' to watch over you. I gotta say you handle yourself pretty well.
hash_7a50d68bace1e4ae: ^1Diego: ^7I will keep this. If the others behave themselves, maybe I will share.
hash_7a50d78bace1e661: ^1Bruno: ^7One more scrap to hold on to.
hash_7a50d98bace1e9c7: ^1Shaw: ^7You know - there's a chance that *this* could prove to be the key to everything.

hash_7a6d493e06d1b730: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm not going to ask how this happened, Bruno - but I'm guessing you put up a hell of a fight!
hash_7a6d4e3e06d1bfaf: ^1Scarlett: ^7Nothing worse than a few bruises - You'll walk it off in no time.
hash_7a6d503e06d1c315: ^1Diego: ^7Did you fight many battles in the Legion - or was a lot of your time spent just sitting around.
hash_7a6fa7d4bbaa1628: ^1Godfrey: ^7Is it too much to ask for you bat-folk to wear some trousers?
hash_7a6faad4bbaa1b41: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7There's more of these pee-wee vampires than you can shake a stick at.
hash_7a71eec4c6d6b138: ^1Scarlett: ^7I'll be honest - I don't like all this extra attention.
hash_7a71f0c4c6d6b49e: ^1Diego: ^7Outnumbered again. Even in great numbers, your threats are somewhat 'toothless'.
hash_7a71f1c4c6d6b651: ^1Bruno: ^7So you finally realize that you are just too weak to threaten me alone.
hash_7a71f3c4c6d6b9b7: ^1Shaw: ^7If you've all gathered around hoping for a cure, I have some very bad news for you.
hash_7a7894a478692886: ^1Narrator: ^7You should already know how to open the door. That hasn't changed.
hash_7ac24f3a56ee14b8: ^1Bruno: ^7I will kill many birds with one stone. Explosive stone.
hash_7ac2503a56ee166b: ^1Diego: ^7I believe Pancho would love to get his hands on such firepower.
hash_7ac2523a56ee19d1: ^1Scarlett: ^7I built something like this when I was a kid. Dad never found out.
hash_7ac8baf29abdc860: ^1Bruno: ^7I hope your soul was freed long before now.
hash_7ac8bbf29abdca13: ^1Diego: ^7You thought your attack would leave me weakened? If anything, I was invigorated!
hash_7ad2bf4909634e23: ^1Scarlett: ^7Not so hot. We're not shooting clay pigeons today...
hash_7ad2c04909634fd6: ^1Bruno: ^7The perfect weapon for an enemy on horizon. Not for one within biting distance.
hash_7ad2c14909635189: ^1Diego: ^7Though one bullet is usually enough, I do prefer to know there are more in the chamber.
hash_7ad2c2490963533c: ^1Shaw: ^7It's like fire poker. I suppose it could make a good bludgeon.
hash_7ad511c9ea0f0210: ^1Diego: ^7You shovel coal for a living, I kill people for a living. This was never really a fair fight.
hash_7ad512c9ea0f03c3: ^1Bruno: ^7Its death reminds me of Diego. Overdramatic.
hash_7ad518c9ea0f0df5: ^1Shaw: ^7The downside to being made out of coal? You're pretty fucking combustible, I'll tell you that.
hash_7adfeba9c2b49ac8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Sometimes the old ways work best.
hash_7adfeca9c2b49c7b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7One thing's for sure: I ain't usin' this knife for cookin' no more.
hash_7b11cfcb7e0dee03: ^1Godfrey: ^7Oh, the way it hugs their faces. I'll be seeing that in nightmares till I die.
hash_7b11d0cb7e0defb6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That little bastard's a killin' machine!
hash_7b11d1cb7e0df169: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I'm giving that little monkey a medal.
hash_7b19ab05a72bb0cb: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm hoping I won't have to go up and down these stairs too often...    Bit hard on the old knees.
hash_7b19ae05a72bb5e4: ^1Scarlett: ^7By this point we should be relaxing in our cabins with the artifact safely stowed away.   Instead - We're fighting unnatural monsters aboard a sinking ship.
hash_7b19b005a72bb94a: ^1Diego: ^7I should have been drinking champagne on this staircase, enjoying the company of beautiful people, regaling aristocrats with tales of adventure.    But alas - it was not to be.
hash_7b19b105a72bbafd: ^1Bruno: ^7Throughout my life, whenever I have been in the presence of such wealth and opulence - violence and deceit were lurking in the shadows...
hash_7b1f61fff0da9af7: ^1Shaw: ^7The downside to being made out of coal? You're pretty combustible, I'll tell you that.
hash_7b2405ef4c6d2629: ^1Shaw: ^7I kill the monsters. Get paid points. Use said points to pay a wall for bullets.     What kind of economy is that?!
hash_7b2406ef4c6d27dc: ^1Diego: ^7I was hoping to not have to *purchase* more ammo...    That's a hint, fantasma.
hash_7b2408ef4c6d2b42: ^1Scarlett: ^7That's what I need. Ammo - and lots of it.
hash_7b3433b9c001f289: ^1Shaw: ^7Ow--! Like a shotgun blast...an inch from my ear...!
hash_7b3434b9c001f43c: ^1Diego: ^7Fucking mamon! I can't hear myself think!
hash_7b3435b9c001f5ef: ^1Bruno: ^7I will kill you for that...once my eyes start working...
hash_7b4243da20d4a7f4: ^1Scarlett: ^7Call it a mercy killing, though I don't feel much sympathy for any of you nightmares.
hash_7b4c801374a4ca58: ^1Scarlett: ^7First class... Just goes to show there's some things not even the rich can buy their way out of.
hash_7b4c821374a4cdbe: ^1Diego: ^7Ah, yes... Seems like only moments ago Lady McKendrick and I were here.     We had quite the evening planned.
hash_7b4c831374a4cf71: ^1Bruno: ^7Everything is twisted and broken.     Metal, flesh, bone - everything is... fused.
hash_7b4c851374a4d2d7: ^1Shaw: ^7Now that I think about it... how did the statue get in here?     I know, 'magic, magic, wooohoohoo!'     But seriously. That's solid stone. Even magic's gonna struggle with that.
hash_7b639be25b72c998: ^1Shaw: ^7The sun never sets -- least, not as long as I've got this little beauty.
hash_7b63a0e25b72d217: ^1Scarlett: ^7If I shoot this at Shaw, would screw his head on right?
hash_7b63a1e25b72d3ca: ^1Bruno: ^7I witnessed Ra's power before. I no longer question it.
hash_7b63a2e25b72d57d: ^1Diego: ^7Let's shed some light on these chupacarnes...
hash_7b9381e0c6821ef0: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7This is no work for a lady. Good thing I'm no lady.
hash_7ba74e1f1dd649f2: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Shut up! I can't hear myself think!
hash_7ba78c48657d0670: ^1The Brigadier: ^7All those nights I've longed for a bit of excitement. Huh. Be careful what you wish for.
hash_7ba78d48657d0823: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7God, I could use a drink. Or twenty.
hash_7bb72ed0ca39ef50: ^1Scarlett: ^7I hope I haven't given you too much of this, Shaw... Not that you'd feel it.
hash_7bb730d0ca39f2b6: ^1Diego: ^7You must be very unlucky, Shaw. Either that or just a bit... useless.
hash_7bb731d0ca39f469: ^1Bruno: ^7You have to stay alert, Shaw - Many of the monsters you see are in fact REAL.
hash_7bcccc4f3de9874b: ķu%™2≤rQÔőIKķ"xuBŤŘąÕ8ŃēShÉÉR6źM\vĘ`ą•2ł®Kā?{ow I wonder if it might not be useful tonight.
hash_7bd3fde65ae6172c: ^1Godfrey: ^7Can we not declare an armistice? Get it? Arm-istice...?
hash_7bd3ffe65ae61a92: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I shall tear you limb by limb from limb if I must!
hash_7bd400e65ae61c45: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Keep comin' and you'll lose more'n that.
hash_7bdc9f45940df4fa: ^1Scarlett: ^7I recognize that smell - Paint stripper?!     Isn't that stuff corrosive?!
hash_7be414bb2a66a482: ^1Diego: ^7Primal Material? I do not understand much of what you say my friend, but let's just pretend that it is because of your accent...     And overall weirdness.
hash_7bf20484ef245168: ^1Shaw: ^7You can get lost staring into the depths of that thing.
hash_7bf20984ef2459e7: ^1Scarlett: ^7Why is it that a gun from a wall makes my brain hurt more than walking dead people?
hash_7bf20a84ef245b9a: ^1Bruno: ^7The creatures wish to hurt us. But the walls wish to help us.     Someday life will make sense, but why start now?
hash_7bf20b84ef245d4d: ^1Diego: ^7So...was this originally designed as a military ship? Guns in the walls, hot and cold running ammo?
hash_7bffb6881ab8d99f: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Yee-haw! I feel like Pecos Bill ridin' the cyclone!
hash_7bffb7881ab8db52: ^1Godfrey: ^7Well, at least I won't have to dust when this is over.
hash_7c27bc7c16cbb05a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I wonder: if an old fart like me climbed in there, would a younger, stronger me emerge?
hash_7c27bd7c16cbb20d: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Maybe I'm here for a reason. Maybe this is why I got fired from the Wild West show. Nah, it was the drinkin' and the fightin'.
hash_7c2b11421c4e0d38: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Never mess with an underpaid Butler!
hash_7c7b5c487f9e3072: ^1The Brigadier: ^7This, my dear ghouls, is the Scepter of Ra. And your goose, as they say, is cooked. Thoroughly.
hash_7c7b5d487f9e3225: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Feels like a brandin' iron, and I'm  making my mark...
hash_7c85747a49bd3c94: ^1Godfrey: ^7More hideous in death than in life. I didn't think it possible.
hash_7c85767a49bd3ffa: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Bloodsucker. Lickspittle. Mumblecrust. There's no name foul enough for you...shithead.
hash_7c85777a49bd41ad: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7What'd the Brigadier call you? Nosey-fart-too? Well, ah-dee-ose, Nosey-fart-too.
hash_7c9b490a69412ad8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A big ball of sunshine -- that's me!
hash_7c9b4a0a69412c8b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gather round, ya walkin' corpses - Warm your bones by the fire.
hash_7c9b4b0a69412e3e: ^1Godfrey: ^7It would seem they aren't overfond of daylight.
hash_7c9eee20e6ca7216: ^1The Brigadier: ^7And here I thought that the Butler would be our weakest link.
hash_7c9eef20e6ca73c9: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Damn. I'm getting upstaged by a glorified waiter.
hash_7cb9de72ff0dfd4b: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Hello, lads. My friends Viper and Dragon would like to have a quick word.
hash_7cc185236005c920: ^1Godfrey: ^7I shall portray the humble tortoise in tonight's morality play.
hash_7cc187236005cc86: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Suitable for keeping rain off one's back, and pain off one's back.
hash_7cc188236005ce39: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7It's like walkin' with a stagecoach door on my back. Not that I'm complainin'.
hash_7cc3ee7ea332b4aa: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Time for my encore. Knock 'em dead, kid...
hash_7cc447929d3fe5b0: ^1Diego: ^7I know a cursed object when I see one. And boy oh boy do I see one.
hash_7cc449929d3fe916: ^1Scarlett: ^7What the Hell did you just say?
hash_7cc44e929d3ff195: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh, I know exactly what you are. Question is - Who made you?
hash_7d0b05b079ab8888: ^1Ghost: ^7How long you remain here is entirely up to you, Godfrey. Now come. Let's see if we can find a way out...for both of us.

hash_7d2457b05aa76194: ^1Godfrey: ^7We must find Master Rhodes. I only pray he's not been transformed into one of those wretched...things.
hash_7d3a6506eb1db16b: ^1Godfrey: ^7House rules: mistreat the help and you're out of here!
hash_7d3a6606eb1db31e: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That's for scratchin' up my Sunday best.
hash_7d3a6706eb1db4d1: ^1The Brigadier: ^7I actually recognized that one! Never could abide the lickspittle.
hash_7d4dccb76e9b665f: ^1The Brigadier: ^7If I let that go unanswered, everyone would want a turn.
hash_7d4f2ad31a149860: ^1Godfrey: ^7At least there are plenty of money-making opportunities shambling around this place.
hash_7d4f2cd31a149bc6: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Gold, pound notes, filthy lucre. That's what it always comes down to, isn't it?

hash_7d6a4b7a2829ec1d: ^1Diego: ^7We are trapped. If we wish to survive, we really must fight our way out!
hash_7d70055e5ae92407: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7They're scary enough, but setting 'em on fire? That's just gilding the lily.
hash_7d72f7ee1d356968: ^1Scarlett: ^7Didn't think I'd ever be this desperate for a fully loaded gun.
hash_7d72f9ee1d356cce: ^1Diego: ^7Hmmm... empty? That cannot be right. Maybe it's jammed.
hash_7d72fcee1d3571e7: ^1Shaw: ^7No ammunition... I should get more.     Sooner rather than later.
hash_7d832efc513f4641: ^1Shaw: ^7I'm far too modest and self effacing to point out that - THAT - was almost entirely my doing.
hash_7d832ffc513f47f4: ^1Diego: ^7I am only surprised that it took so long... Given my many talents.
hash_7d8330fc513f49a7: ^1Bruno: ^7Little by little, we are making progress. Eh?
hash_7d8331fc513f4b5a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Chalk one more up in Scarlett's 'fuck these dead-heads column'.

hash_7dad054be250fdb1: ^1Shaw: ^7Oh splendid - No ammunition! That's just dandy.
hash_7dad074be2510117: ^1Bruno: ^7I have fought without supplies before. I do not talk of it.
hash_7dad084be25102ca: ^1Scarlett: ^7Need to find some more ammo - The sooner the better.
hash_7db6e66764adf833: ^1Godfrey: ^7Once again, it falls to Godfrey to clean up everyone's mess. Beware, I shan't be gentle...
hash_7db6e76764adf9e6: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I got death in two flavors. Any takers?
hash_7db6e86764adfb99: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A cannon in one hand, a sword in the other -- all that's missing is a Jolly Roger!
hash_7db77e8a7b3d3cc2: ^1Narrator: ^7Now, grab this shield part. You already have the other two.
hash_7dc974437de5f972: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7You do not want to shortchange me like this again. Trust me.
hash_7ddac3c00a9ccfa8: ^1Godfrey: ^7I'm growing quite fond of this weapon. It feels... clean.
hash_7ddac5c00a9cd30e: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A torch that can kill from a distance. Will the wonders never cease?
hash_7ddac6c00a9cd4c1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Funny how this heals us live folk, but torches the dirt-nappers.
hash_7de000f14f31fca8: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Call me the Chairman of the "Board." Ha! Get it?
hash_7de001f14f31fe5b: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Hammers. Gunshots. All I do is raise a ruckus wherever I go.
hash_7de002f14f32000e: ^1Godfrey: ^7All I'm really building right now is a false sense of security.
hash_7de5b457f1cc470d: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»Ā6ńá»ō(1 ē∑/ųĖď∂ä◊A‚Ćoa‹ßĮŘļ*? A fireplace? A window to the Great Beyond? Well, don't look at me. I'm a big fake, remember?
hash_7de95a6caaf94b2a: ^1The Brigadier: ^7He's dropping them like bloody buffalo!
hash_7df0aafdf44c4ea8: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Well there's no quit in this one.
hash_7df193b085af536c: ^1Scarlett: ^7I learned long ago not to let failure get the better of me.
hash_7df196b085af5885: ^1Bruno: ^7A Legionnaire does not fail. He learns.
hash_7e186eecbd00bb04: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Empty. Might as well be standin' here holdin' my dingus.
hash_7e1871ecbd00c01d: ^1Godfrey: ^7This is worse than running out of champagne.
hash_7e1d49196ef29155: ^1Diego: ^7You toy with my emotions, before disappearing into the night...     What are you?
hash_7e22b1d76d95bda2: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7Gotta admit, Brigadier, that was "brill." I said that right, didn't I?
hash_7e2bf23c8d008b80: ^1Bruno: ^7Death does not always come quickly.     Sometimes it is... Agonizing.
hash_7e2bf33c8d008d33: ^1Diego: ^7And now, I shall perform a speciality of mine. It is known as -     El beso de la muerte!
hash_7e2bf53c8d009099: ^1Scarlett: ^7If it puts down the flesh-heads faster, then yes - I'm interested.
hash_7e2bf83c8d0095b2: ^1Shaw: ^7Ohh. I can feel that. I think I've been granted the touch of death.
hash_7e459b6d06b11260: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, no one ever accused me of being a spendthrift.
hash_7e459c6d06b11413: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7You don't get somethin' for nothin'. 'Specially here.
hash_7e4d3380b9a5124c: ^1Shaw: ^7Adios! Amigas! Can you help a fella out here? I'm not quite ready to unleash *The Beast* - so I'm looking for a bit of... support?
hash_7e5d21bcc4d7b623: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Looks like I made a new friend.
hash_7e61fc36d58073e3: ^1Godfrey: ^7Was that monster also a human being at one point? Oh, that thought is almost too distressing to even consider.
hash_7e61fd36d5807596: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I am done bein' afeared of you.
hash_7e61fe36d5807749: ^1The Brigadier: ^7It appears we've flushed out the big game. Shoot to kill.
hash_7e79b15db8123651: ^1Shaw: ^7You are the nicest ex-gangster, fugitive murderer, French Foreign Legion deserter I've ever met.
hash_7e79b25db8123804: ^1Diego: ^7Dear Diary: today, I was saved by an orangutan.
hash_7e79b45db8123b6a: ^1Scarlett: ^7You've got a pretty gentle touch. You know, for a human grizzly bear.
hash_7e7c29a5a2a55205: ^1The Brigadier: ^7You know Godfrey, I'm quite relieved that Alistair's little girl isn't here to witness all this. The poor dear would be horrified.
hash_7e7d3696edd025c3: ^1Shaw: ^7Is it dead?? Have we slain the beast??
hash_7e7d3996edd02adc: ^1Scarlett: ^7It died like it lived: ugly as fucking sin.
hash_7e7d3b96edd02e42: ^1Diego: ^7I feel...unclean after that. Like that time I seduced la abuela del alcalde.
hash_7e7d3c96edd02ff5: ^1Bruno: ^7Your twisted tongue torments me no more.
hash_7e8f3b5f005cb781: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Holy--! That's what you are now. Holey. As in, full of holes.
hash_7eb7a1efee22dc4c: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I'd promote you for that headshot, but you're already a damn Brigadier.
hash_7eb7a4efee22e165: ^1Godfrey: ^7I can't tell if your aim is guided by mercy or spite.
hash_7ec1505c89bbe2ce: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Straight from a Jules Verne novel. Not that I've actually read one...
hash_7ed63020d9e3a8c0: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7That's it, Mirela! Keep aimin' for the head!
hash_7ed63120d9e3aa73: ^1The Brigadier: ^7A woman after my own heart -- not to mention their heads.
hash_7ee52672303a3517: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Well, if this is the last night of my life, at least I'll go down fighting. Hey, cowboy, mind if I have a nip from that flask of yours?
hash_7f13a69efbd6d206: ^1Shaw: ^7I can't feel my legs! Are they gone?? Oh wait, there they are. Thank the lord!
hash_7f13a89efbd6d56c: ^1Bruno: ^7I know I still have purpose. I cannot die here.
hash_7f13a99efbd6d71f: ^1Diego: ^7That was unfortunate. Now I may require assistance.
hash_7f13ab9efbd6da85: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey Fellas! Even if I don't make it - I hope you figure all this out.       And find Alistair.
hash_7f1ba90e7d2319f3: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Looks like a mad scientist's workshop in here. Which is exactly what I'd expect from Alistair.
hash_7f2166701d83408e: ^1Scarlett: ^7Are you flapping those gums at me, Diego?     Or just self aggrandizing for your own amusement?
hash_7f2fc79514ef4ec4: ^1Narrator: ^7That's your gun. You're supposed to be using the hammer.
hash_7f4526c8c0f0a5ec: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»ĀXuÍ…ļ5y‚Čďo£ÉR6ĖMZH™ī=(xťčņ+©ęs did their whole tree-hugging thing? Could've used a woman's touch if you ask me.
hash_7f4544290c3a9700: ^1Bruno: ^7You give the French Kiss a bad name, you four-legged monstrosity!
hash_7f4547290c3a9c19: ^1Scarlett: ^7You are one ugly son of a bitch!
hash_7f454a290c3aa132: ^1Shaw: ^7Can somebody PLEASE shoot that pus-filled giraffe-legged donkey-cow!
hash_7f61d17dc72f6001: ^1Shaw: ^7A voice commands it. And it happens. An order. An order from the Great Beyond.     Is that how the world works now?
hash_7f61d27dc72f61b4: ^1Diego: ^7Mmmm, voices such as that are a usually a result of too much fine brandy - or cheap cigars.
hash_7f61d37dc72f6367: ^1Bruno: ^7Le fantome gives us with gifts with which to fight the monstres. I wonder which is our true enemy.
hash_7f61d47dc72f651a: ^1Scarlett: ^7Just what I need - And just what those brain-dead-fuck-heads don't.
hash_7f7eaaa618c42c88: ^1Godfrey: ^7Thank you, Box. Don't mind if I do.
hash_7f7eaca618c42fee: ^1The Brigadier: ^7Now this is a manly instrument. A great, bloody beast!
hash_7f7eada618c431a1: ^1Gideon Jones: ^7I almost pity whatever gets in my way.
hash_7f84c71f406d0408: ^1Shaw: ^7I actually got a whiff of your breath there...
hash_7f84ce1f406d0fed: ^1Diego: ^7Believe me, I would rather not have gotten so close.
hash_7f9e600777864963: “%k—≤ņ¨júSģę»Ā^≠`ł•- Ź3.čý^1Diego: ^7Bruno, my friend! It is clear you are a formidable fighter. I suggest we team up - to ensure our *mutual* survival.
hash_7fa33e92a5057a73: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7"L.M.G." Must stand for Lady Mutilating Ghouls.
hash_7faed14034099710: ^1Scarlett: ^7It's like they're filled with burning pitch.
hash_7faed44034099c29: ^1Bruno: ^7Merde! A little closer and I would be Bruno flambe.
hash_7faed64034099f8f: ^1Shaw: ^7Ahhhhhh--oh wait, no. That part of my skin's already burnt.     Never mind.
hash_7fb38e0a905c6801: ^1Madame Mirela: ^7Naked. Bitey. Pervy eyes. Too many reasons to kill you. Sorry.
hash_7fb992c7c602f67e: ^1Diego: ^7I almost married a legless woman in Juarez - And then she walked out on me.     It is not a joke. She was the only woman to ever leave me.
hash_7fb995c7c602fb97: ^1Shaw: ^7We should each claim a crawler and race them against each other! I'm naming mine, 'Floor Admiral.'
hash_7fbac7ad1f3a5356: ^1Shaw: ^7I'd appreciate it if you kept your grubby little paws away from me.
hash_7fbac9ad1f3a56bc: ^1Bruno: ^7You are starting a fight you will not win.
hash_7fbacaad1f3a586f: ^1Diego: ^7Hands off the merchandise! This coat was crafted by Italy's finest tailors.
hash_7fbaccad1f3a5bd5: ^1Scarlett: ^7Hey! We ain't doing the damn foxtrot!
hash_7fd84a790b240003: ^1Diego: ^7It seems the artifact - my medallion - has somehow wrought the chaos that unfolds all around us.    Now we must decide how best to react.
hash_7fe0edb8ef664efd: ^1Narrator: ^7There you go. I told you it wasn't as dangerous as it looked!
hash_7feb92f1a2f7383e: ^1Shaw: ^7This Order. Took Alistair. Very devious. Not good-willed. What do they want? What do we want? What do they know? What do we know?
hash_7feb94f1a2f73ba4: ^1Bruno: ^7When I met Alistair, he was a man driven by obsession. I almost envy him.
hash_7feb95f1a2f73d57: ^1Diego: ^7I think there is something Scarlett is not telling us - perhap
hash_7feb97f1a2f740bd: ^1Scarlett: ^7I find myself wondering why they weren't at the Mansion that night -      Are they really my father's closest friends?
hash_7ffddf1135c69df9: ^1Shaw: ^7Scarlett! Forgive me if this is a personal question, but have you ever killed a man before?
hash_7ffde01135c69fac: ^1Diego: ^7WOW Scarlett! You are a very fine shot indeed!     Very fine... indeed.
